t_id.iwq: Berkata Ibrahim: "Apakah berhala-berhala itu mendengar (doa)mu sewaktu kamu berdoa (kepadanya)?,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال هل يسمعونكم إذ» حين «تدعون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ هَلۡ يَسۡمَعُونَكُمۡ إِذۡ تَدۡعُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Berkata Ibrahim, "Apakah berhala-berhala itu mendengar seruan kalian di waktu) ketika (kalian berdoa kepadanya)

t.sahih-int: Or do they benefit you, or do they harm
t.asad: or benefit you or do you harm?”
t.yusuf-ali: Or do you good or harm
t.pickthall: Or do they benefit or harm you
t.arberry: or do they profit you, or harm
t.hilali-khan: Or do they benefit you or do they harm (you)
t.itani: Or do they benefit you, or harm you?”
t.mubarakpuri: "Or do they benefit you or do they cause harm"
t.qarib: Or do they benefit you, or harm you
t.wahiduddin: Do they help or harm you
t.shakir: Or do they profit you or cause you harm
t.haleem: Do they help or harm you?’
t.maariful: or do they bring benefit to you or harm?”
t.khattab: Or can they benefit or harm you?”
t.ghali: Or do they profit you or harm (you)
t.irving: or benefit you or harm [you]
t.iwq: Or do they benefit you, or do they harm

t_id.kemenag: atau (dapatkah) mereka memberi manfaat kepadamu atau memberi mudharat?"
t_id.sabiq: "Adakah berhala-berhala itu," lanjut Ibrâhîm, "dapat memberikan kebaikan jika kalian menaati mereka? Atau sebaliknya, dapatkah mereka mendatangkan keburukan jika kalian menentang mereka?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Atau dapatkah mereka memberi manfaat ke pada kalian) jika kalian menyembahnya (atau memberi mudarat?") kepada diri kalian, jika kalian tidak menyembahnya.
t_id.iwq: atau (dapatkah) mereka memberi manfaat kepadamu atau memberi mudharat?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أو ينفعونكم» إن عبدتموهم «أو يضرونـ» كم إن لم تعبدوهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَوۡ يَنفَعُونَكُمۡ أَوۡ يَضُرُّونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Atau dapatkah mereka memberi manfaat ke pada kalian) jika kalian menyembahnya (atau memberi mudarat?") kepada diri kalian, jika kalian tidak menyembahnya

ar: قَالُوا۟ بَلۡ وَجَدۡنَاۤ ءَابَاۤءَنَا كَذَ ٰلِكَ یَفۡعَلُونَ
ar_simple: قَالُوا بَلْ وَجَدْنَا آبَاءَنَا كَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ

t.sahih-int: They said, "But we found our fathers doing thus
t.asad: They exclaimed: But we found our forefathers doing the same!”
t.yusuf-ali: They said: "Nay, but we found our fathers doing thus (what we do)
t.pickthall: They said: Nay, but we found our fathers acting on this wise
t.arberry: They said, 'Nay, but we found our fathers so doing
t.hilali-khan: They said: "Nay, but we found our fathers doing so
t.itani: They said, “But we found our ancestors doing so.”
t.mubarakpuri: They said: "(Nay) but we found our fathers doing so."
t.qarib: They said, "But this is what we found our fathers doing
t.wahiduddin: They replied, "But we found our fathers doing the same
t.shakir: They said: Nay, we found our fathers doing so
t.haleem: They replied, ‘No, but this is what we saw our fathers doing.’
t.maariful: They said, “No, but we have found our fathers doing like this.”
t.khattab: They replied, “No! But we found our forefathers doing the same.”
t.ghali: They said, "No indeed, (but) we found our fathers thus performing
t.irving: They said: "Rather we found our fathers doing so
t.iwq: And they said, "But we found our fathers doing thus

t_id.kemenag: Mereka menjawab: "(Bukan karena itu) sebenarnya kami mendapati nenek moyang kami berbuat demikian".
t_id.sabiq: Mereka menjawab, "Mereka memang tidak dapat melakukan semua itu. Tetapi kami mendapatkan para nenek moyang kami melakukan penyembahan yang kami lakukan ini. Kami hanya sekadar mengikuti apa yang telah mereka lakukan."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka menjawab, "Sebenarnya kami mendapati nenek moyang kami berbuat demikian") yakni mereka melakukan sebagaimana apa yang kami lakukan sekarang ini.
t_id.iwq: Mereka menjawab: "(Bukan karena itu) sebenarnya kami mendapati nenek moyang kami berbuat demikian".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا بل وجدنا آباءنا كذلك يفعلون» أي مثل فعلنا
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُواْ بَلۡ وَجَدۡنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا كَذَٰلِكَ يَفۡعَلُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka menjawab, "Sebenarnya kami mendapati nenek moyang kami berbuat demikian") yakni mereka melakukan sebagaimana apa yang kami lakukan sekarang ini

t.sahih-int: He said, "Then do you see what you have been worshipping
t.asad: Said [Abraham]: “Have you, then, ever considered what it is that you have been worshipping
t.yusuf-ali: He said: "Do ye then see whom ye have been worshipping
t.pickthall: He said: See now that which ye worship
t.arberry: He said, 'And have you considered what you have been serving
t.hilali-khan: He said: "Do you observe that which you have been worshipping
t.itani: He said, “Have you considered what you worship.
t.mubarakpuri: He said: "Do you observe that which you have been worshipping --"
t.qarib: He said, "Have you really thought about what You have been worshipping
t.wahiduddin: Abraham said, "Have you really thought about what you have been worshipping
t.shakir: He said: Have you then considered what you have been worshipping
t.haleem: Abraham said, ‘Those idols you have worshipped
t.maariful: He said, “Have you then ever considered what you have been worshipping
t.khattab: Abraham responded, “Have you ˹really˺ considered what you have been worshipping—
t.ghali: He said, "Have you then seen what you have been worshiping
t.irving: He said: "Have you ever seen what you have been worshipping
t.iwq: And he said, "Then do you see what you have been worshipping

t_id.kemenag: Ibrahim berkata: "Maka apakah kamu telah memperhatikan apa yang selalu kamu sembah,
t_id.sabiq: Untuk membungkam mulut mereka, Ibrâhîm berkata, "Tidak berpikirkah kalian, sehingga kalian mengetahui hakikat berhala-berhala yang disembah,
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ibrahim berkata, "Maka apakah kalian telah memperhatikan apa yang selalu kalian sembah).
t_id.iwq: Ibrahim berkata: "Maka apakah kamu telah memperhatikan apa yang selalu kamu sembah,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال أفرآيتم ما كنتم تعبدون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ أَفَرَءَيۡتُم مَّا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡبُدُونَ (أَفَرَأَيْتُم: أَبْصَرْتُمْ بِتَدَبُّرٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Ibrahim berkata, "Maka apakah kalian telah memperhatikan apa yang selalu kalian sembah

t.sahih-int: You and your ancient forefathers
t.asad: you and those ancient forebears of yours
t.yusuf-ali: Ye and your fathers before you
t.pickthall: Ye and your forefathers
t.arberry: you and your fathers, the elders
t.hilali-khan: You and your ancient fathers
t.itani: You and your ancient ancestors?
t.mubarakpuri: "You and your ancient fathers"
t.qarib: you and your forefathers
t.wahiduddin: you and your forefathers
t.shakir: You and your ancient sires
t.haleem: you and your forefathers
t.maariful: you and your ancient fathers
t.khattab: you and your ancestors
t.ghali: You and your fathers of old
t.irving: you and your forefathers, the oldtimers
t.iwq: You and your ancient forefathers

t_id.kemenag: kamu dan nenek moyang kamu yang dahulu?,
t_id.sabiq: oleh kalian dan para nenek moyang sebelum kalian? Adakah berhala-berhala itu patut disembah atau tidak? Jika kalian memikirkan hal ini secara saksama, niscaya kalian menyadari bahwa selama ini kalian berada dalam kesesatan yang nyata.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kalian dan nenek moyang kalian yang dahulu?)
t_id.iwq: kamu dan nenek moyang kamu yang dahulu?,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أنتم وآبائكم الأقدمون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَنتُمۡ وَءَابَآؤُكُمُ ٱلۡأَقۡدَمُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Kalian dan nenek moyang kalian yang dahulu

ar: فَإِنَّهُمۡ عَدُوࣱّ لِّیۤ إِلَّا رَبَّ ٱلۡعَـٰلَمِینَ
ar_simple: فَإِنَّهُمْ عَدُوٌّ لِي إِلَّا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ

t.sahih-int: Indeed, they are enemies to me, except the Lord of the worlds
t.asad: “Now [as for me, I know that,] verily, these [false deities] are my enemies, [and that none is my helper] save the Sustainer of all the worlds
t.yusuf-ali: For they are enemies to me; not so the Lord and Cherisher of the Worlds
t.pickthall: Lo! they are (all) an enemy unto me, save the Lord of the Worlds
t.arberry: They are an enemy to me, except the Lord of all Being
t.hilali-khan: Verily! They are enemies to me, save the Lord of the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists)
t.itani: They are enemies to me, but not so the Lord of the Worlds.
t.mubarakpuri: "Verily, they are enemies to me, save the Lord of Al-`Alamin,"
t.qarib: They are enemies to me. [I worship none] except the Lord of the worlds
t.wahiduddin: they are all my enemies, not so the Lord of the Universe
t.shakir: Surely they are enemies to me, but not (so) the Lord of the worlds
t.haleem: are my enemies; not so the Lord of the Worlds
t.maariful: they all are an enemy to me, except the Lord of the worlds
t.khattab: They are ˹all˺ enemies to me, except the Lord of all worlds
t.ghali: Yet, surely they are an enemy to me, except The Lord of the worlds
t.irving: They are enemies of mine, except for the Lord of the Universe
t.iwq: Indeed, they are enemies to me, except Lord of all worlds

t_id.kemenag: karena sesungguhnya apa yang kamu sembah itu adalah musuhku, kecuali Tuhan Semesta Alam,
t_id.sabiq: Sembahan kalian selain Allah ini adalah musuh-musuhku, juga musuh kalian. Aku tidak akan menyembah mereka. Hanya Sang Pencipta, Penguasa dan Pemelihara alam semesta yang aku sembah. Dan aku akan selalu mendekatkan diri kepada-Nya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Karena sesungguhnya apa yang kalian sembah itu adalah musuhku) aku tidak menyembah mereka (melainkan) aku hanya menyembah (Rabb semesta alam).
t_id.iwq: karena sesungguhnya apa yang kamu sembah itu adalah musuhku, kecuali Tuhan Semesta Alam,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فإنهم عدو لي» لا أعبدهم «إلا» لكن «ربَّ العالمين» فإني أعبده
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَإِنَّهُمۡ عَدُوّٞ لِّيٓ إِلَّا رَبَّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Karena sesungguhnya apa yang kalian sembah itu adalah musuhku) aku tidak menyembah mereka (melainkan) aku hanya menyembah (Rabb semesta alam)

t.sahih-int: Who created me, and He [it is who] guides me
t.asad: who has created me and is the One who guides me
t.yusuf-ali: Who created me, and it is He Who guides me
t.pickthall: Who created me, and He doth guide me
t.arberry: who created me, and Himself guides me
t.hilali-khan: Who has created me, and it is He Who guides me
t.itani: He who created me, and guides me.
t.mubarakpuri: Who has created me, and it is He Who guides me.
t.qarib: Who created me. It is He Who guides me
t.wahiduddin: who created me. It is He who guides me
t.shakir: Who created me, then He has shown me the way
t.haleem: who created me. It is He who guides me
t.maariful: who created me, and who guides me
t.khattab: ˹He is˺ the One Who created me, and He ˹alone˺ guides me
t.ghali: Who created me. And so He, Ever He, guides me
t.irving: Who created me. He guides me
t.iwq: Who created me, and He it is who guides me

t_id.kemenag: (yaitu Tuhan) Yang telah menciptakan aku, maka Dialah yang menunjuki aku,
t_id.sabiq: Dialah yang telah menciptakan aku dari ketiadaan dalam bentuk yang sempurna. Dia juga memberi petunjuk kepadaku agar dapat mencapai kebahagiaan dunia dan akhirat.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu Tuhan yang telah menciptakan aku, maka Dia-lah yang menunjuki aku) kepada agama yang benar.
t_id.iwq: (yaitu Tuhan) Yang telah menciptakan aku, maka Dialah yang menunjuki aku,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «الذي خلقني فهو يهدين» إلى الدين
tafsir.siraj-ar: ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَنِي فَهُوَ يَهۡدِينِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu Tuhan yang telah menciptakan aku, maka Dia-lah yang menunjuki aku) kepada agama yang benar

t.sahih-int: And it is He who feeds me and gives me drink
t.asad: and is the One who gives me to eat and to drink
t.yusuf-ali: Who gives me food and drink
t.pickthall: And Who feedeth me and watereth me
t.arberry: and Himself gives me to eat and drink
t.hilali-khan: And it is He Who feeds me and gives me to drink
t.itani: He who feeds me, and waters me.
t.mubarakpuri: And it is He Who feeds me and gives me to drink.
t.qarib: and He who feeds me and gives me drink
t.wahiduddin: He who gives me food and drink
t.shakir: And He Who gives me to eat and gives me to drink
t.haleem: He who gives me food and drink
t.maariful: and Who feeds me and gives me drink
t.khattab: ˹He is˺ the One Who provides me with food and drink
t.ghali: And (it is He) Who, Ever He, feeds me and He gives me to drink
t.irving: and is the One Who feeds me and gives me something to drink
t.iwq: And it is He who feeds me and gives me drink

t_id.kemenag: dan Tuhanku, Yang Dia memberi makan dan minum kepadaku,
t_id.sabiq: Dan Dialah yang mengaruniakan makanan dan minuman kepadaku sehingga aku dapat memperoleh dan memanfaatkannya untuk kelangsungan hidupku.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Tuhanku, yang memberi makan dan minum kepadaku).
t_id.iwq: dan Tuhanku, Yang Dia memberi makan dan minum kepadaku,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والذي هو يطعمني ويسقين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلَّذِي هُوَ يُطۡعِمُنِي وَيَسۡقِينِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan Tuhanku, yang memberi makan dan minum kepadaku

t.sahih-int: And when I am ill, it is He who cures me
t.asad: and when I fall ill, is the One who restores me to health
t.yusuf-ali: And when I am ill, it is He Who cures me
t.pickthall: And when I sicken, then He healeth me
t.arberry: and, whenever I am sick, heals me
t.hilali-khan: And when I am ill, it is He who cures me
t.itani: And when I get sick, He heals me.
t.mubarakpuri: And when I am ill, it is He Who cures me.
t.qarib: and He who heals me when I am ill
t.wahiduddin: He who cures me when I am ill
t.shakir: And when I am sick, then He restores me to health
t.haleem: He who cures me when I am ill
t.maariful: and when I become sick, He heals me
t.khattab: And He ˹alone˺ heals me when I am sick
t.ghali: And when I am sick, then He, Ever He, cures me
t.irving: Whenever I fall ill, He heals me
t.iwq: And when I am ill, it is He who cures me

t_id.kemenag: dan apabila aku sakit, Dialah Yang menyembuhkan aku,
t_id.sabiq: Bila aku menderita sakit, Dialah yang menyembuhkan aku dengan mempermudah pengobatan sambil berserah diri kepada-Nya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan apabila aku sakit. Dialah yang menyembuhkan aku).
t_id.iwq: dan apabila aku sakit, Dialah Yang menyembuhkan aku,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإذا مرضت فهو يشفين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِذَا مَرِضۡتُ فَهُوَ يَشۡفِينِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan apabila aku sakit. Dialah yang menyembuhkan aku

t.sahih-int: And who will cause me to die and then bring me to life
t.asad: and who will cause me to die and then will bring me back to life –
t.yusuf-ali: Who will cause me to die, and then to life (again)
t.pickthall: And Who causeth me to die, then giveth me life (again)
t.arberry: who makes me to die, then gives me life
t.hilali-khan: And Who will cause me to die, and then will bring me to life (again)
t.itani: He who makes me die, and then revives me.
t.mubarakpuri: And Who will cause me to die, and then will bring me to life.
t.qarib: and He who will cause me to die and then bring me back to life
t.wahiduddin: He who will cause me to die and bring me back to life
t.shakir: And He Who will cause me to die, then give me life
t.haleem: He who will make me die and then give me life again
t.maariful: and who will make me die, then will give me life
t.khattab: And He ˹is the One Who˺ will cause me to die, and then bring me back to life
t.ghali: And (it is He) Who makes me to die; thereafter He gives me life
t.irving: [He is] the One Who will cause me to die, then bring me back to life [again]
t.iwq: And who will cause me to die and then bring me to life

t_id.kemenag: dan Yang akan mematikan aku, kemudian akan menghidupkan aku (kembali),
t_id.sabiq: Dialah yang mewafatkan aku jika ajal telah tiba, dan kemudian menghidupkan aku kembali untuk memperoleh perhitungan dan balasan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Yang akan mematikan aku, kemudian akan menghidupkan aku kembali).
t_id.iwq: dan Yang akan mematikan aku, kemudian akan menghidupkan aku (kembali),

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والذي يُميتني ثم يحيين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلَّذِي يُمِيتُنِي ثُمَّ يُحۡيِينِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan Yang akan mematikan aku, kemudian akan menghidupkan aku kembali

ar: وَٱلَّذِیۤ أَطۡمَعُ أَن یَغۡفِرَ لِی خَطِیۤءَتِی یَوۡمَ ٱلدِّینِ
ar_simple: وَالَّذِي أَطْمَعُ أَنْ يَغْفِرَ لِي خَطِيئَتِي يَوْمَ الدِّينِ

t.sahih-int: And who I aspire that He will forgive me my sin on the Day of Recompense
t.asad: and who, I hope, will forgive me my faults on Judgment Day
t.yusuf-ali: And who, I hope, will forgive me my faults on the day of Judgment
t.pickthall: And Who, I ardently hope, will forgive me my sin on the Day of Judgment
t.arberry: and who I am eager shall forgive me my offence on the Day of Doom
t.hilali-khan: And Who, I hope will forgive me my faults on the Day of Recompense, (the Day of Resurrection)
t.itani: He who, I hope, will forgive my sins on the Day of the Reckoning.”
t.mubarakpuri: And Who, I hope, will forgive me my faults on the Day of Recompense.
t.qarib: and who, I hope, will forgive my sins on the Day of Judgment
t.wahiduddin: and He who will, I hope, forgive me my faults on the Day of the Judgement
t.shakir: And Who, I hope, will forgive me my mistakes on the day of judgment
t.haleem: and He who will, I hope, forgive my faults on the Day of Judgement
t.maariful: and who, I hope, will forgive my fault on the Day of Retribution
t.khattab: And He is ˹the One˺ Who, I hope, will forgive my flaws on Judgment Day.”
t.ghali: And Whom I long (that) He will forgive me my offense (s) on the Day of Doom. (Or: Judgment)
t.irving: the One Who I expect will forgive me my mistakes on the Day for Repayment
t.iwq: And who I aspire that He will forgive me my sin on the Day of Recompense

t_id.kemenag: dan Yang amat kuinginkan akan mengampuni kesalahanku pada hari kiamat".
t_id.sabiq: Dialah yang ampunan-Nya amat kuinginkan, agar--saat perhitungan nanti--segala kealpaan dan kekhilafanku di dunia terhapus."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Yang amat kuinginkan) amat kuharapkan (akan mengampuni kesalahanku pada hari kiamat") yaitu hari pembalasan.
t_id.iwq: dan Yang amat kuinginkan akan mengampuni kesalahanku pada hari kiamat".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والذي أطمع» أرجو «أن يغفر لي خطيئتي يوم الدين» الجزاء
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلَّذِيٓ أَطۡمَعُ أَن يَغۡفِرَ لِي خَطِيٓـَٔتِي يَوۡمَ ٱلدِّينِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Yang amat kuinginkan) amat kuharapkan (akan mengampuni kesalahanku pada hari kiamat") yaitu hari pembalasan

ar: رَبِّ هَبۡ لِی حُكۡمࣰا وَأَلۡحِقۡنِی بِٱلصَّـٰلِحِینَ
ar_simple: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ

t.sahih-int: [And he said], "My Lord, grant me authority and join me with the righteous
t.asad: “O my Sustainer! Endow me with the ability to judge [between right and wrong], and make me one with the righteous
t.yusuf-ali: O my Lord! bestow wisdom on me, and join me with the righteous
t.pickthall: My Lord! Vouchsafe me wisdom and unite me to the righteous
t.arberry: My Lord, give me Judgment, and join me with the righteous
t.hilali-khan: My Lord! Bestow Hukman (religious knowledge, right judgement of the affairs and Prophethood) on me, and join me with the righteous
t.itani: “My Lord! Grant me wisdom, and include me with the righteous.
t.mubarakpuri: My Lord! Bestow Hukm on me, and join me with the righteous.
t.qarib: [Abraham then said], "My Lord, grant me wisdom and allow me to join with the righteous
t.wahiduddin: My Lord, bestow wisdom upon me; unite me with the righteous
t.shakir: My Lord: Grant me wisdom, and join me with the good
t.haleem: My Lord, grant me wisdom; join me with the righteous
t.maariful: O my Lord, give me wisdom, and make me join the righteous
t.khattab: “My Lord! Grant me wisdom, and join me with the righteous
t.ghali: My Lord! Bestow upon me judgment, and join me with the righteous
t.irving: My Lord, bestow discretion on me and acquaint me with honorable men
t.iwq: And he said, "My Lord, grant me authority and join me with the righteous

t_id.kemenag: (Ibrahim berdoa): "Ya Tuhanku, berikanlah kepadaku hikmah dan masukkanlah aku ke dalam golongan orang-orang yang saleh,
t_id.sabiq: Kemudian Ibrâhîm a. s. memanjatkan doa, "Ya Tuhanku, anugerahilah kesempurnaan ilmu dan amal kepadaku, sehingga--dari sekian banyak hamba-Mu--aku layak mengemban risalah dan hikmah. Dan terimalah diriku untuk berada dalam golongan orang yang saleh.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ya Rabbku! Berikanlah kepadaku hikmah) yakni ilmu (dan masukkanlah aku ke dalam golongan orang-orang yang saleh) golongan para nabi.
t_id.iwq: (Ibrahim berdoa): "Ya Tuhanku, berikanlah kepadaku hikmah dan masukkanlah aku ke dalam golongan orang-orang yang saleh,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «رب هب لي حكما» علما «وألحقني بالصالحين» النبيين
tafsir.siraj-ar: رَبِّ هَبۡ لِي حُكۡمٗا وَأَلۡحِقۡنِي بِٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ (حُكْمًا: عِلْمًا وَفَهْمًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ya Rabbku! Berikanlah kepadaku hikmah) yakni ilmu (dan masukkanlah aku ke dalam golongan orang-orang yang saleh) golongan para nabi

ar: وَٱجۡعَل لِّی لِسَانَ صِدۡقࣲ فِی ٱلۡءَاخِرِینَ
ar_simple: وَاجْعَلْ لِي لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِي الْآخِرِينَ

t.sahih-int: And grant me a reputation of honor among later generations
t.asad: and grant me the power to convey the truth unto those who will come after me
t.yusuf-ali: Grant me honourable mention on the tongue of truth among the latest (generations)
t.pickthall: And give unto me a good report in later generations
t.arberry: and appoint me a tongue of truthfulness among the others
t.hilali-khan: And grant me an honourable mention in later generations
t.itani: And give me a reputation of truth among the others.
t.mubarakpuri: And grant me an honorable mention in later generations.
t.qarib: and grant me a lasting mention as one who told the truth among later generations
t.wahiduddin: give me a good name among later generations
t.shakir: And ordain for me a goodly mention among posterity
t.haleem: give me a good name among later generations
t.maariful: and destine for me a truthful description among the next generations
t.khattab: Bless me with honourable mention among later generations
t.ghali: And make for me a tongue of sincerity (Truthfulness) in the later (generations)
t.irving: Grant me a truthful reputation among later men
t.iwq: And grant me a reputation of honor among later generations

t_id.kemenag: dan jadikanlah aku buah tutur yang baik bagi orang-orang (yang datang) kemudian,
t_id.sabiq: Dan jadikanlah diriku sebagai buah bibir yang baik dan kesan yang indah bagi umat-umat yang datang setelah aku, sehingga keharumanku tetap tercatat sampai hari kiamat nanti.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan jadikanlah aku buah tutur yang baik) pujian yang baik (bagi orang-orang yang datang kemudian) maksudnya orang-orang yang datang sesudahku hingga hari kiamat.
t_id.iwq: dan jadikanlah aku buah tutur yang baik bagi orang-orang (yang datang) kemudian,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «واجعل لي لسان صدق» ثناء حسنا «في الآخرين» الذين يأتون بعدي إلى يوم القيامة
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱجۡعَل لِّي لِسَانَ صِدۡقٖ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ (لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ: ثَنَاءً حَسَنًا, الْآخِرِينَ: مَنْ يَاتُونَ بَعْدِي إِلَى يَوْمِ القِيَامَةِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan jadikanlah aku buah tutur yang baik) pujian yang baik (bagi orang-orang yang datang kemudian) maksudnya orang-orang yang datang sesudahku hingga hari kiamat

t.sahih-int: And place me among the inheritors of the Garden of Pleasure
t.asad: and place me among those who shall inherit the garden of bliss
t.yusuf-ali: Make me one of the inheritors of the Garden of Bliss
t.pickthall: And place me among the inheritors of the Garden of Delight
t.arberry: Make me one of the inheritors of the Garden of Bliss
t.hilali-khan: And make me one of the inheritors of the Paradise of Delight
t.itani: And make me of the inheritors of the Garden of Bliss.
t.mubarakpuri: And make me one of the inheritors of the Paradise of Delight.
t.qarib: And make me among those who will inherit the Garden of Bliss
t.wahiduddin: and make me one of the inheritors of the Garden of Bliss
t.shakir: And make me of the heirs of the garden of bliss
t.haleem: make me one of those given the Garden of Bliss
t.maariful: and make me among those who will inherit the Garden of Bliss
t.khattab: Make me one of those awarded the Garden of Bliss
t.ghali: And make me among the heirs of the Garden of Bliss
t.irving: Grant me an inheritance in the Garden of Bliss
t.iwq: And place me among the inheritors of Paradise of Pleasure

t_id.kemenag: dan jadikanlah aku termasuk orang-orang yang mempusakai surga yang penuh kenikmatan,
t_id.sabiq: Masukkanlah aku ke dalam golongan hamba-Mu yang dianugerahi kenikmatan surga, sebagai balasan dari keimanan dan ibadah mereka kepada-Mu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan jadikanlah aku termasuk orang-orang yang mewarisi surga yang penuh kenikmatan) yakni di antara orang-orang yang memperolehnya.
t_id.iwq: dan jadikanlah aku termasuk orang-orang yang mempusakai surga yang penuh kenikmatan,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «واجعلني من ورثة جنة النعيم» ممن يعطاها
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱجۡعَلۡنِي مِن وَرَثَةِ جَنَّةِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan jadikanlah aku termasuk orang-orang yang mewarisi surga yang penuh kenikmatan) yakni di antara orang-orang yang memperolehnya

ar: وَٱغۡفِرۡ لِأَبِیۤ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلضَّاۤلِّینَ
ar_simple: وَاغْفِرْ لِأَبِي إِنَّهُ كَانَ مِنَ الضَّالِّينَ

t.sahih-int: And forgive my father. Indeed, he has been of those astray
t.asad: “And forgive my father - for, verily, he is among those who have gone astray –
t.yusuf-ali: Forgive my father, for that he is among those astray
t.pickthall: And forgive my father. Lo! he is of those who err
t.arberry: and forgive my father, for he is one of those astray
t.hilali-khan: And forgive my father, verily he is of the erring
t.itani: And forgive my father—he was one of the misguided.
t.mubarakpuri: And forgive my father, verily, he is of the erring.
t.qarib: Forgive my father, for he has been of those who were misguided
t.wahiduddin: and forgive my father; for he is one of the misguided
t.shakir: And forgive my father, for surely he is of those who have gone astray
t.haleem: forgive my father, for he is one of those who have gone astray
t.maariful: and forgive my father. Indeed he was one of those who went astray
t.khattab: Forgive my father, for he is certainly one of the misguided
t.ghali: And forgive my father; surely he is one of the erring
t.irving: Forgive my father even though he may be [considered] lost
t.iwq: And forgive my father. Indeed, he has been of those astray

t_id.kemenag: dan ampunilah bapakku, karena sesungguhnya ia adalah termasuk golongan orang-orang yang sesat,
t_id.sabiq: Jadikanlah bapakku sebagai orang yang layak mendapatkan ampunan-Mu, dengan memberi petunjuk kepadanya untuk memeluk Islam. (Dahulu, saat perpisahan, Ibrâhîm menjanjikan bapaknya dapat masuk Islam). Sebab, ia adalah salah seorang yang menyimpang dari petunjuk dan kebenaran.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan ampunilah bapakku, karena sesungguhnya ia adalah termasuk orang-orang yang sesat) umpamanya, Engkau memberikan jalan bertobat kepadanya, lalu Engkau mengampuninya. Doa ini diucapkan oleh Nabi Ibrahim sebelum jelas baginya, bahwa dia adalah musuh Allah, sebagaimana yang telah diterangkan dalam surah Al Bara'ah atau surah At Taubah.
t_id.iwq: dan ampunilah bapakku, karena sesungguhnya ia adalah termasuk golongan orang-orang yang sesat,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «واغفر لأبي إنه كان من الضالين» بأن تتوب عليه فتغفر له وهذا قبل أن يتبين له أنه عدو لله كما ذكر في سورة براءة
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱغۡفِرۡ لِأَبِيٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan ampunilah bapakku, karena sesungguhnya ia adalah termasuk orang-orang yang sesat) umpamanya, Engkau memberikan jalan bertobat kepadanya, lalu Engkau mengampuninya. Doa ini diucapkan oleh Nabi Ibrahim sebelum jelas baginya, bahwa dia adalah musuh Allah, sebagaimana yang telah diterangkan dalam surah Al Bara'ah atau surah At Taubah

t.sahih-int: And do not disgrace me on the Day they are [all] resurrected
t.asad: and do not put me to shame on the Day when all shall be raised from the dead
t.yusuf-ali: And let me not be in disgrace on the Day when (men) will be raised up
t.pickthall: And abase me not on the day when they are raised
t.arberry: Degrade me not upon the day when they are raised up
t.hilali-khan: And disgrace me not on the Day when (all the creatures) will be resurrected
t.itani: And do not disgrace me on the Day they are resurrected.
t.mubarakpuri: And disgrace me not on the Day when they will be resurrected.
t.qarib: and do not disgrace me on the Day they are [all] resurrected
t.wahiduddin: and do not disgrace me on the Day when all people are resurrected
t.shakir: And disgrace me not on the day when they are raised
t.haleem: and do not disgrace me on the Day when all people are resurrected
t.maariful: and do not put me to disgrace on the Day when all will be raised to life
t.khattab: And do not disgrace me on the Day all will be resurrected—
t.ghali: And do not disgrace me the Day when they are made to rise (again)
t.irving: Do not disgrace me on the day they are raised up again
t.iwq: And do not disgrace me on the Day they are all resurrected

t_id.kemenag: dan janganlah Engkau hinakan aku pada hari mereka dibangkitkan,
t_id.sabiq: Janganlah Engkau mempermalukan dan membuat aku terhina di hadapan manusia pada hari dibangkitkannya manusia dari kubur untuk mendapatkan perhitungan dan balasan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan janganlah Engkau hinakan aku) janganlah Engkau jelek-jelekkan aku (pada hari mereka dibangkithan) di hari semua manusia dibangkitkan.
t_id.iwq: dan janganlah Engkau hinakan aku pada hari mereka dibangkitkan,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولا تخزني» تفضحني «يوم يُبعثون» الناس
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَا تُخۡزِنِي يَوۡمَ يُبۡعَثُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan janganlah Engkau hinakan aku) janganlah Engkau jelek-jelekkan aku (pada hari mereka dibangkithan) di hari semua manusia dibangkitkan

ar: یَوۡمَ لَا یَنفَعُ مَالࣱ وَلَا بَنُونَ
ar_simple: يَوْمَ لَا يَنْفَعُ مَالٌ وَلَا بَنُونَ

t.sahih-int: The Day when there will not benefit [anyone] wealth or children
t.asad: the Day on which neither wealth will be of any use, nor children
t.yusuf-ali: The Day whereon neither wealth nor sons will avail
t.pickthall: The day when wealth and sons avail not (any man)
t.arberry: the day when neither wealth nor sons shall profit
t.hilali-khan: The Day whereon neither wealth nor sons will avail
t.itani: The Day when neither wealth nor children will help.
t.mubarakpuri: The Day whereon neither wealth nor sons will avail,
t.qarib: the Day when neither wealth nor children will benefit [anyone]
t.wahiduddin: the Day when wealth and sons will be of no avail
t.shakir: The day on which property will not avail, nor sons
t.haleem: the Day when neither wealth nor children can help
t.maariful: the Day when neither wealth will be of any use (to any one) nor sons
t.khattab: the Day when neither wealth nor children will be of any benefit
t.ghali: The Day when neither money nor sons will profit (anyone)
t.irving: the day when neither wealth nor children will benefit anyone
t.iwq: The Day when there will not benefit anyone wealth or children

t_id.kemenag: (yaitu) di hari harta dan anak-anak laki-laki tidak berguna,
t_id.sabiq: Pada hari ketika harta yang dikeluarkan dan pertolongan anak keturunan tidak berguna lagi.
t_id.jalalayn-id: Yang pada hari itu Allah berfirman, ("Di hari ini harta dan anak-anak laki-laki tidak berguna) bagi seorang pun.
t_id.iwq: (yaitu) di hari harta dan anak-anak laki-laki tidak berguna,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: قال تعالى فيه: «يوم لا ينفع مال ولا بنون» أحدا
tafsir.siraj-ar: يَوۡمَ لَا يَنفَعُ مَالٞ وَلَا بَنُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Yang pada hari itu Allah berfirman, ("Di hari ini harta dan anak-anak laki-laki tidak berguna) bagi seorang pun

ar: إِلَّا مَنۡ أَتَى ٱللَّهَ بِقَلۡبࣲ سَلِیمࣲ
ar_simple: إِلَّا مَنْ أَتَى اللَّهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ

t.sahih-int: But only one who comes to Allah with a sound heart
t.asad: [and when] only he [will be happy] who comes before God with a heart free of evil!”
t.yusuf-ali: But only he (will prosper) that brings to Allah a sound heart
t.pickthall: Save him who bringeth unto Allah a whole heart
t.arberry: except for him who comes to God with a pure heart
t.hilali-khan: Except him who brings to Allah a clean heart [clean from Shirk (polytheism) and Nifaq (hypocrisy)
t.itani: Except for him who comes to God with a sound heart.”
t.mubarakpuri: Except him who brings to Allah a clean heart.
t.qarib: except the one who comes to God with a flawless heart
t.wahiduddin: and when he alone will be saved who comes to God with a sound heart
t.shakir: Except him who comes to Allah with a heart free (from evil)
t.haleem: when the only one who will be saved is the one who comes before God with a heart devoted to Him.’
t.maariful: except to him who will come to Allah with a sound heart
t.khattab: Only those who come before Allah with a pure heart ˹will be saved˺.”
t.ghali: Except for him who comes up to Allah with a sound heart
t.irving: except for someone who comes to God with a sound heart
t.iwq: But only one who comes to Allah with a sound heart

t_id.kemenag: kecuali orang-orang yang menghadap Allah dengan hati yang bersih,
t_id.sabiq: Kecuali bagi mereka yang beriman dan mengharap Allah dengan jiwa yang bersih dari kekufuran, kemunafikan dan sikap pamer.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali) lain halnya dengan (orang-orang yang menghadap Allah dengan hati yang bersih") dari syirik dan munafik, yang dimaksud adalah hati orang Mukmin, maka sesungguhnya imannya itu dapat memberi manfaat kepada dirinya.
t_id.iwq: kecuali orang-orang yang menghadap Allah dengan hati yang bersih,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إلا» لكن «من أتى الله بقلب سليم» من الشرك والنفاق وهو قلب المؤمن فإنه ينفعه ذلك
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِلَّا مَنۡ أَتَى ٱللَّهَ بِقَلۡبٖ سَلِيمٖ (سَلِيمٍ: سَالِمٍ مِنَ الشِّرْكِ وَالنِّفَاقِ وَالضَّغِينَةِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali) lain halnya dengan (orang-orang yang menghadap Allah dengan hati yang bersih") dari syirik dan munafik, yang dimaksud adalah hati orang Mukmin, maka sesungguhnya imannya itu dapat memberi manfaat kepada dirinya

t.sahih-int: And Paradise will be brought near [that Day] to the righteous
t.asad: For, [on that Day,] paradise will be brought within sight of the God-conscious
t.yusuf-ali: To the righteous, the Garden will be brought near
t.pickthall: And the Garden will be brought nigh for those who ward off (evil)
t.arberry: And Paradise shall be brought forward for the godfearing
t.hilali-khan: And Paradise will be brought near to the Muttaqun (pious - see V)
t.itani: And Paradise will be brought near for the righteous.
t.mubarakpuri: And Paradise will be brought near to those who had Taqwa.
t.qarib: [On that day], Paradise will be brought near to those who were mindful of God
t.wahiduddin: When Paradise shall be brought near to the God-fearing
t.shakir: And the garden shall be brought near for those who guard (against evil)
t.haleem: When the Garden is brought near to the righteous
t.maariful: and the Paradise will be brought near to the God-fearing
t.khattab: ˹On that Day˺ Paradise will be brought near to the God-fearing
t.ghali: And the Garden will be drawn forward for the pious
t.irving: The Garden will be brought near for those who did their duty
t.iwq: And Paradise will be brought near that Day to the righteous

t_id.kemenag: dan (di hari itu) didekatkanlah surga kepada orang-orang yang bertakwa,
t_id.sabiq: Pada hari didekatkannya surga ke tempat orang-orang yang berbahagia, lalu mereka--yang telah menjauhkan diri dari kekufuran dan kemaksiatan serta menerima keimanan dan ketaatan di dunia--berjalan ke arah surga."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan didekatkanlah surga) yakni dijadikan dekat- (kepada orang-orang yang bertakwa) hingga mereka dapat melihatnya dengan jelas.
t_id.iwq: dan (di hari itu) didekatkanlah surga kepada orang-orang yang bertakwa,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وأُزلفت الجنة» قربت «للمتقين» فيرونها
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَأُزۡلِفَتِ ٱلۡجَنَّةُ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ (وَأُزْلِفَتِ: قُرِّبَتْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan didekatkanlah surga) yakni dijadikan dekat- (kepada orang-orang yang bertakwa) hingga mereka dapat melihatnya dengan jelas

t.sahih-int: And Hellfire will be brought forth for the deviators
t.asad: whereas the blazing fire will be laid open before those who had been lost in grievous error
t.yusuf-ali: And to those straying in Evil, the Fire will be placed in full view
t.pickthall: And hell will appear plainly to the erring
t.arberry: and Hell advanced for the perverse
t.hilali-khan: And the (Hell) Fire will be placed in full view of the erring
t.itani: And the Blaze will be displayed to the deviators.
t.mubarakpuri: And the (Hell) Fire will be placed in full view of the astray.
t.qarib: and Hell will be brought forth for those who were misled
t.wahiduddin: and Hell shall be revealed to the misguided
t.shakir: And the hell shall be made manifest to the erring ones
t.haleem: and the Fire is placed in full view of the misguided
t.maariful: and the Hell will be fully uncovered for the perverse
t.khattab: and the Hellfire will be displayed to the deviant
t.ghali: And Hell Fire will be brought forth for the misguided
t.irving: while Hades will appear for the straying
t.iwq: And Hellfire will be brought forth for the deviators

t_id.kemenag: dan diperlihatkan dengan jelas neraka Jahim kepada orang-orang yang sesat",
t_id.sabiq: Adapun orang-orang yang menolak kebenaran, neraka jahim akan ditampakkan kepada mereka, sehingga jilatan apinya hampir mengenai mereka. Di saat itu, mereka sangat bersedih dan menyesal.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan diperlihatkan dengan jelas neraka Jahim) yakni ditampakkan (kepada orang-orang yang Sesat) yakni orang-orang kafir.
t_id.iwq: dan diperlihatkan dengan jelas neraka Jahim kepada orang-orang yang sesat",

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وبرزت الجحيم» أظهرت «للغاوين» الكافرين
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَبُرِّزَتِ ٱلۡجَحِيمُ لِلۡغَاوِينَ (وَبُرِّزَتِ: أُظْهِرَتْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan diperlihatkan dengan jelas neraka Jahim) yakni ditampakkan (kepada orang-orang yang Sesat) yakni orang-orang kafir

ar: وَقِیلَ لَهُمۡ أَیۡنَ مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡبُدُونَ
ar_simple: وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنْتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ

t.sahih-int: And it will be said to them, "Where are those you used to worship
t.asad: and they will be asked: “Where now is all that you were wont to worship
t.yusuf-ali: And it shall be said to them: 'Where are the (gods) ye worshipped
t.pickthall: And it will be said unto them: Where is (all) that ye used to worship
t.arberry: It shall be said to them, 'Where is that you were serving
t.hilali-khan: And it will be said to them: "Where are those (the false gods whom you used to set up as rivals with Allah) that you used to worship
t.itani: And it will be said to them, “Where are those you used to worship?”
t.mubarakpuri: And it will be said to them: "Where are those that you used to worship."
t.qarib: It will be said to them, "Where are those you used to worship
t.wahiduddin: they will be asked, "Where are those whom you worshipped
t.shakir: And it shall be said to them: Where are those that you used to worship
t.haleem: it will be said to them, ‘Where are those you worshipped
t.maariful: and it will be said to them, ‘Where is that which you used to worship
t.khattab: And it will be said to them, “Where are those you used to worship
t.ghali: And it will be said to them, "Where is that which you used to worship
t.irving: and someone will say to them: "Where is whatever you were serving
t.iwq: And it will be said to them, "Where are those you used to worship

t_id.kemenag: dan dikatakan kepada mereka: "Dimanakah berhala-berhala yang dahulu kamu selalu menyembah(nya)
t_id.sabiq: Mereka akan dibentak, "Mana tuhan-tuhan selain Allah yang kalian sembah itu?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan dikatakan kepada mereka, "Di manakah berhala-berhala yang dahulu kalian menyembahnya).
t_id.iwq: dan dikatakan kepada mereka: "Dimanakah berhala-berhala yang dahulu kamu selalu menyembah(nya)

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وقيل لهم أين ما كنتم تعبدون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَقِيلَ لَهُمۡ أَيۡنَ مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡبُدُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan dikatakan kepada mereka, "Di manakah berhala-berhala yang dahulu kalian menyembahnya

ar: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ هَلۡ یَنصُرُونَكُمۡ أَوۡ یَنتَصِرُونَ
ar_simple: مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ هَلْ يَنْصُرُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَنْتَصِرُونَ

t.sahih-int: Other than Allah? Can they help you or help themselves
t.asad: instead of God? Can these [things and beings] be of any help to you or to themselves?”
t.yusuf-ali: Besides Allah? Can they help you or help themselves
t.pickthall: Instead of Allah? Can they help you or help themselves
t.arberry: apart from God? Do they help you or help themselves
t.hilali-khan: Instead of Allah? Can they help you or (even) help themselves
t.itani: Besides God? Can they help you, or help themselves?”
t.mubarakpuri: "Instead of Allah Can they help you or help themselves"
t.qarib: other than God? Can they help you or help themselves
t.wahiduddin: besides God? Can they help you or even help themselves
t.shakir: Besides Allah? Can they help you or yet help themselves
t.haleem: beside God? Can they help you now, or even help themselves?’
t.maariful: beside Allah? Can they help you or help themselves?’
t.khattab: besides Allah? Can they help you or even help themselves?”
t.ghali: Apart from Allah? Do they vindicate you or vindicate themselves
t.irving: instead of God? Will they support you, or even support themselves
t.iwq: Other than Allah? Can they help you or help themselves

t_id.kemenag: selain dari Allah? Dapatkah mereka menolong kamu atau menolong diri mereka sendiri?"
t_id.sabiq: Adakah di hari ini sembahan-sembahan selain Allah yang kalian anggap sebagai juru selamat dapat menolong kalian? Atau, bahkan, menolong diri mereka sendiri?" Sembahan-sembahan mereka, tentu, tidak dapat melakukan semua itu. Sebab, mereka beserta sesembahan adalah bara dari api neraka itu sendiri.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Selain dari Allah?) selain dari-Nya, yang dimaksud adalah berhala-berhala. (Dapatkah mereka menolong kalian) menolak azab yang akan menimpa diri kalian (atau menolong diri mereka sendiri?") yaitu menyelamatkan diri mereka sendiri dari azab?, tentu saja tidak bisa.
t_id.iwq: selain dari Allah? Dapatkah mereka menolong kamu atau menolong diri mereka sendiri?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «من دون الله» أي غيره من الأصنام «هل ينصرونكم» بدفع العذاب عنكم «أو ينتصرون» بدفعه عن أنفسهم، لا
tafsir.siraj-ar: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ هَلۡ يَنصُرُونَكُمۡ أَوۡ يَنتَصِرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Selain dari Allah?) selain dari-Nya, yang dimaksud adalah berhala-berhala. (Dapatkah mereka menolong kalian) menolak azab yang akan menimpa diri kalian (atau menolong diri mereka sendiri?") yaitu menyelamatkan diri mereka sendiri dari azab?, tentu saja tidak bisa

t.sahih-int: So they will be overturned into Hellfire, they and the deviators
t.asad: Thereupon they will be hurled into hell – they, as well as all [others] who had been lost in grievous error
t.yusuf-ali: Then they will be thrown headlong into the (Fire),- they and those straying in Evil
t.pickthall: Then will they be hurled therein, they and the seducers
t.arberry: Then they shall be pitched into it, they and the perverse
t.hilali-khan: Then they will be thrown on their faces into the (Fire), They and the Ghawun (devils, and those who were in error)
t.itani: Then they will be toppled into it, together with the seducers.
t.mubarakpuri: Then they will be thrown on their faces into it (the Fire), they and the astray.
t.qarib: So They will be hurled into Hell with those who misled them
t.wahiduddin: Then they will be thrown headlong into Hell, both they and the misguided ones
t.shakir: So they shall be thrown down into it, they and the erring ones
t.haleem: and then they will all be hurled into Hell, together with those that misled them
t.maariful: So they (their false gods) will be thrown on their faces into it - they and the erring people
t.khattab: Then the idols will be hurled headlong into Hell, along with the deviant
t.ghali: Then they will be pitched (headlong) into it, they and the misguided
t.irving: So they will be toppled into it, both they and the misguided ones
t.iwq: Thus they will be overturned into Hellfire, they and the deviators

t_id.kemenag: Maka mereka (sembahan-sembahan itu) dijungkirkan ke dalam neraka bersama-sama orang-orang yang sesat,
t_id.sabiq: Wajah-wajah mereka akan dijungkirkan berkali-kali ke dalam neraka jahim, hingga akhirnya mereka, juga orang-orang yang membuat mereka sesat, akan menetap di dasar neraka jahim.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka sesembahan-sesembahan itu dijungkirkan) dicampakkan (ke dalam neraka bersama-sama orang-orang yang sesat).
t_id.iwq: Maka mereka (sembahan-sembahan itu) dijungkirkan ke dalam neraka bersama-sama orang-orang yang sesat,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فكُبْكِبوا» ألقوا «فيها هم والغاوون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَكُبۡكِبُواْ فِيهَا هُمۡ وَٱلۡغَاوُۥنَ (فَكُبْكِبُوا: فَجُمِعُوا، وَأُلْقُوا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka sesembahan-sesembahan itu dijungkirkan) dicampakkan (ke dalam neraka bersama-sama orang-orang yang sesat)

t.sahih-int: And the soldiers of Iblees, all together
t.asad: and the hosts of Iblis - all together
t.yusuf-ali: And the whole hosts of Iblis together
t.pickthall: And the hosts of Iblis, together
t.arberry: and the hosts of Iblis, all together
t.hilali-khan: And the whole hosts of Iblis (Satan) together
t.itani: And the soldiers of Satan, all of them.
t.mubarakpuri: And all of the hosts of Iblis together.
t.qarib: with Iblis' helpers, all together
t.wahiduddin: and Satan's legions, all together
t.shakir: And the hosts of the Shaitan, all
t.haleem: and all Iblis’s supporters
t.maariful: and the entire army of Iblīs (Satan), all together
t.khattab: and the soldiers of Iblîs, all together
t.ghali: And the hosts ofIblis, all together
t.irving: as well as all of Diabolis´ armies
t.iwq: And the soldiers of Iblees, all together

t_id.kemenag: dan bala tentara iblis semuanya.
t_id.sabiq: Mereka juga akan ditemani para kaki tangan iblis. Yakni, mereka yang selalu mengemas kejahatan dan dosa sehingga terlihat indah oleh manusia, atau jin dan manusia pelaku kemaksiatan yang selalu mengikuti jalan Iblîs.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan bala tentara iblis) yakni pengikut-pengikutnya dan orang-orang yang menaatinya dari jenis jin dan manusia (semuanya).
t_id.iwq: dan bala tentara iblis semuanya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وجنود إبليس» أتباعه، ومن أطاعه من الجن والإنس «أجمعون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَجُنُودُ إِبۡلِيسَ أَجۡمَعُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan bala tentara iblis) yakni pengikut-pengikutnya dan orang-orang yang menaatinya dari jenis jin dan manusia (semuanya)

t.sahih-int: They will say while they dispute therein
t.asad: And there and then, blaming one another, they [who had grievously sinned in life] will exclaim
t.yusuf-ali: They will say there in their mutual bickerings
t.pickthall: And they will say, when they are quarrelling therein
t.arberry: They shall say, as they dispute there one with another
t.hilali-khan: They will say while contending therein
t.itani: They will say, as they feud in it.
t.mubarakpuri: They will say while contending therein,
t.qarib: While bickering with each other they will say
t.wahiduddin: They will dispute between themselves therein, and will say
t.shakir: They shall say while they contend therein
t.haleem: There they will say to their gods, as they bicker among themselves
t.maariful: They will say when they will be quarreling there with each other
t.khattab: There the deviant will cry while disputing with their idols
t.ghali: They will say, (as) they stood therein, adversaries with each other
t.irving: They will say while they quarrel away in it
t.iwq: And they will say while they dispute therein

t_id.kemenag: Mereka berkata sedang mereka bertengkar di dalam neraka:
t_id.sabiq: Di hari itu mereka akan mengetahui dan meratapi kesalahan yang mereka perbuat. Mereka dan sembahan-sembahan yang menyesatkan mereka bertengkar saling menyalahkan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata,) orang-orang yang sesat itu (sedangkan mereka bertengkar di dalam neraka itu) bersama dengan sesembahan-sesembahan mereka.
t_id.iwq: Mereka berkata sedang mereka bertengkar di dalam neraka:

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا» أي الغاوون «وهم فيها يختصمون» مع معبوديهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُواْ وَهُمۡ فِيهَا يَخۡتَصِمُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata,) orang-orang yang sesat itu (sedangkan mereka bertengkar di dalam neraka itu) bersama dengan sesembahan-sesembahan mereka

ar: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِی ضَلَـٰلࣲ مُّبِینٍ
ar_simple: تَاللَّهِ إِنْ كُنَّا لَفِي ضَلَالٍ مُبِينٍ

t.sahih-int: By Allah, we were indeed in manifest error
t.asad: “By God, we were most obviously astray
t.yusuf-ali: By Allah, we were truly in an error manifest
t.pickthall: By Allah, of a truth we were in error manifest
t.arberry: By God, we were certainly in manifest error
t.hilali-khan: By Allah, we were truly in a manifest error
t.itani: “By God, We were in evident error.
t.mubarakpuri: "By Allah, we were truly in a manifest error,
t.qarib: By God, we were obviously misguided
t.wahiduddin: We were clearly misguided
t.shakir: By Allah! we were certainly in manifest error
t.haleem: ‘We were clearly misguided
t.maariful: ‘By Allah, we were in open error
t.khattab: “By Allah! We were clearly mistaken
t.ghali: By Allah, decidedly we were indeed in evident error
t.irving: By God, we were in such obvious error
t.iwq: By Allah, we were verily in manifest error

t_id.kemenag: "demi Allah: sungguh kita dahulu (di dunia) dalam kesesatan yang nyata,
t_id.sabiq: "Demi Allah, sesungguhnya kami di dunia berada dalam kerancuan dan kebodohan yang jelas, serta menyimpang dari kebenaran yang sangat tampak.
t_id.jalalayn-id: ("Demi Allah; sungguh) lafal In di sini merupakan bentuk takhfif daripada Inna, sedangkan isimnya tidak disebutkan, pada asalnya adalah Innahuu (kita dahulu dalam kesesatan yang nyata) yakni jelas sesatnya.
t_id.iwq: "demi Allah: sungguh kita dahulu (di dunia) dalam kesesatan yang nyata,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «تالله إن» مخففة من الثقلية واسمها محذوف أي إنه «كنا لفي ضلال مبين» بين
tafsir.siraj-ar: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِي ضَلَٰلٖ مُّبِينٍ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Demi Allah; sungguh) lafal In di sini merupakan bentuk takhfif daripada Inna, sedangkan isimnya tidak disebutkan, pada asalnya adalah Innahuu (kita dahulu dalam kesesatan yang nyata) yakni jelas sesatnya

t.sahih-int: When we equated you with the Lord of the worlds
t.asad: when we deemed you [false deities] equal to the Sustainer of all the worlds –
t.yusuf-ali: When we held you as equals with the Lord of the Worlds
t.pickthall: When we made you equal with the Lord of the Worlds
t.arberry: when we made you equal with the Lord of all Being
t.hilali-khan: When We held you (false gods) as equals (in worship) with the Lord of the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists)
t.itani: For equating you with the Lord of the Worlds.
t.mubarakpuri: "When we held you as equals with the Lord of all that exists;"
t.qarib: when we equated you with the Lord of the worlds
t.wahiduddin: when we made you equal with the Lord of the Universe
t.shakir: When we made you equal to the Lord of the worlds
t.haleem: when we made you equal with the Lord of the Worlds
t.maariful: when we used to equate you with the Lord of the worlds
t.khattab: when we made you equal to the Lord of all worlds
t.ghali: As we made you equal with The Lord of the worlds
t.irving: when we put you (all) on the same footing as the Lord of the Universe
t.iwq: When we equated you with Lord of all worlds

t_id.kemenag: karena kita mempersamakan kamu dengan Tuhan semesta alam".
t_id.sabiq: Yaitu tatkala kami menyederajatkan kalian, wahai sembahan, setara untuk disembah dengan Tuhan semesta alam. Padahal jelas perbedaan antara kalian yang lemah dengan Dia yang Mahakuasa.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Karena) sebab (kita mempersamakan kalian dengan Rabb semesta alam) dalam hal menyembah.
t_id.iwq: karena kita mempersamakan kamu dengan Tuhan semesta alam".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إذ» حيث «نسويكم برب العالمين» في العبادة
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِذۡ نُسَوِّيكُم بِرَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Karena) sebab (kita mempersamakan kalian dengan Rabb semesta alam) dalam hal menyembah

t.sahih-int: And no one misguided us except the criminals
t.asad: yet they who have seduced us [into believing in you] are the truly guilty ones
t.yusuf-ali: And our seducers were only those who were steeped in guilt
t.pickthall: It was but the guilty who misled us
t.arberry: It was naught but the sinners that led us astray
t.hilali-khan: And none has brought us into error except the Mujrimun [Iblis (Satan) and those of human beings who commit crimes, murderers, polytheists, oppressors, etc
t.itani: No one misled us except the sinners.
t.mubarakpuri: "And none has brought us into error except the criminals."
t.qarib: No one misguided us except those who forced us to reject God's messages
t.wahiduddin: It was the evildoers who led us astray
t.shakir: And none but the guilty led us astray
t.haleem: It was the evildoers who led us astray
t.maariful: and it is only the sinners who misguided us
t.khattab: And none led us astray other than the wicked
t.ghali: And in no way did anybody lead us into error except the criminals
t.irving: It has only been criminals who have led us astray
t.iwq: And no one misguided us except the criminals

t_id.kemenag: Dan tiadalah yang menyesatkan kami kecuali orang-orang yang berdosa.
t_id.sabiq: Dan kami tidak akan terperosok dalam kebinasaan seperti ini melainkan disebabkan oleh para pembuat dosa yang menyesatkan kami dari jalan kebenaran.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan tiadalah yang menyesatkan kita) dari petunjuk (kecuali orang-orang yang berdosa) yakni setan atau para pendahulu kita yang kita tiru perbuatan mereka.
t_id.iwq: Dan tiadalah yang menyesatkan kami kecuali orang-orang yang berdosa.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وما أضلنا» عن الهدى «إلا المجرمون» أي الشياطين أو أوّلونا الذين اقتدينا بهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَآ أَضَلَّنَآ إِلَّا ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan tiadalah yang menyesatkan kita) dari petunjuk (kecuali orang-orang yang berdosa) yakni setan atau para pendahulu kita yang kita tiru perbuatan mereka

t.sahih-int: So now we have no intercessors
t.asad: And now we have none to intercede for us
t.yusuf-ali: Now, then, we have none to intercede (for us)
t.pickthall: Now we have no intercessors
t.arberry: so now we have no intercessors
t.hilali-khan: Now we have no intercessors
t.itani: Now we have no intercessors.
t.mubarakpuri: "Now we have no intercessors,"
t.qarib: So now we have no intercessors
t.wahiduddin: and we have no intercessors now
t.shakir: So we have no intercessors
t.haleem: and now we have no intercessor
t.maariful: Now we have neither any intercessors
t.khattab: Now we have none to intercede for us
t.ghali: So (now) in no way do we have any intercessors
t.irving: We have no intercessors
t.iwq: Thus now we have no intercessors

t_id.kemenag: Maka kami tidak mempunyai pemberi syafa'at seorangpun,
t_id.sabiq: Maka kami pun tidak mendapatkan penolong yang dapat menyelamatkan kami dari siksa, seperti yang kami duga sebelumnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka kami tidak mempunyai pemberi syafaat seorang pun) tidak sebagaimana orang-orang Mukmin; mereka memiliki para Malaikat, para Nabi dan orang-orang Mukmin lainnya yang dapat memberi syafaat kepada mereka.
t_id.iwq: Maka kami tidak mempunyai pemberi syafa'at seorangpun,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فما لنا من شافعين» كما للمؤمنين من الملائكة والنبيين والمؤمنين
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَمَا لَنَا مِن شَٰفِعِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka kami tidak mempunyai pemberi syafaat seorang pun) tidak sebagaimana orang-orang Mukmin; mereka memiliki para Malaikat, para Nabi dan orang-orang Mukmin lainnya yang dapat memberi syafaat kepada mereka

t.sahih-int: And not a devoted friend
t.asad: nor any loving friend
t.yusuf-ali: Nor a single friend to feel (for us)
t.pickthall: Nor any loving friend
t.arberry: no loyal friend
t.hilali-khan: Nor a close friend (to help us)
t.itani: And no sincere friend.
t.mubarakpuri: "Nor a close friend."
t.qarib: nor a devoted friend
t.wahiduddin: and no sincere friend
t.shakir: Nor a true friend
t.haleem: and no true friend
t.maariful: nor any true friend
t.khattab: nor a close friend
t.ghali: Nor any intimate friend
t.irving: nor any bosom friend
t.iwq: And not a devoted friend

t_id.kemenag: dan tidak pula mempunyai teman yang akrab,
t_id.sabiq: Bahkan tak seorang karib pun--jika memang tak dapat mengeluarkan mereka dari siksaan--yang dapat dijadikan tempat mengadu dari kepedihan yang kami alami ini."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan tidak pula mempunyai teman yang akrab) yaitu teman yang memperhatikan perkara kita.
t_id.iwq: dan tidak pula mempunyai teman yang akrab,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولا صديق حميم» يهمه أمرنا
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَا صَدِيقٍ حَمِيمٖ (حَمِيمٍ: مُشْفِقٍ يَهْتَمُّ بِأَمْرِنَا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan tidak pula mempunyai teman yang akrab) yaitu teman yang memperhatikan perkara kita

ar: فَلَوۡ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةࣰ فَنَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِینَ
ar_simple: فَلَوْ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةً فَنَكُونَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ

t.sahih-int: Then if we only had a return [to the world] and could be of the believers
t.asad: Would that we had a second chance [in life], so that we could be among the believers!”
t.yusuf-ali: Now if we only had a chance of return we shall truly be of those who believe
t.pickthall: Oh, that we had another turn (on earth), that we might be of the believers
t.arberry: O that we might return again, and be among the believers
t.hilali-khan: (Alas!) If we only had a chance to return (to the world), we shall truly be among the believers
t.itani: If only we could have another chance, we would be among the faithful.”
t.mubarakpuri: "(Alas!) If we only had a chance to return, we shall truly be among the believers!"
t.qarib: If we can only go back [to the world) , we will be believers
t.wahiduddin: If we could only return to the world and be among the believers
t.shakir: But if we could but once return, we would be of the believers
t.haleem: If only we could live our lives again, we would be true believers!’
t.maariful: Would that we have a chance to return whereby we may join the believers!’”
t.khattab: If only we could have a second chance, then we would be believers.”
t.ghali: So, if we had (a chance) to recur, (i.e., to live again) then we should be among the believers
t.irving: If we had another chance, we would then be believers
t.iwq: Then if we only had a return to the world and could be of the believers

t_id.kemenag: maka sekiranya kita dapat kembali sekali lagi (ke dunia) niscaya kami menjadi orang-orang yang beriman".
t_id.sabiq: Di saat itulah mereka berharap dapat kembali lagi ke dunia agar dapat beriman dan memperoleh keselamatan."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka sekiranya kita dapat kembali sekali lagi) ke alam dunia (niscaya kami menjadi orang-orang yang beriman") makna Lau di sini menunjukkan arti Tamanni atau mengharapkan sesuatu yang mustahil dapat dicapai, dan lafal Nakuunu adalah Jawab dari Lau.
t_id.iwq: maka sekiranya kita dapat kembali sekali lagi (ke dunia) niscaya kami menjadi orang-orang yang beriman".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فلو أن لنا كرَّة» رجعة إلى الدنيا «فنكون من المؤمنين» لو هنا للتمني ونكون جوابه
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَلَوۡ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةٗ فَنَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ (كَرَّةً: رَجْعَةً إِلَى الدُّنْيَا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka sekiranya kita dapat kembali sekali lagi) ke alam dunia (niscaya kami menjadi orang-orang yang beriman") makna Lau di sini menunjukkan arti Tamanni atau mengharapkan sesuatu yang mustahil dapat dicapai, dan lafal Nakuunu adalah Jawab dari Lau

ar: إِنَّ فِی ذَ ٰلِكَ لَءَایَةࣰۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِینَ
ar_simple: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ

t.sahih-int: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
t.asad: In all this, behold, there is a message [unto men], even though most of them will not believe [in it]
t.yusuf-ali: Verily in this is a Sign but most of them do not believe
t.pickthall: Lo! herein is indeed a portent, yet most of them are not believers
t.arberry: Surely in that is a sign, yet most of them are not believers
t.hilali-khan: Verily! In this is indeed a sign, yet most of them are not believers
t.itani: Surely in this is a sign, but most of them are not believers.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, in this is indeed a sign, yet most of them are not believers.
t.qarib: There is a sign in this, but most of them will not believe
t.wahiduddin: There is certainly a sign in that, but most of them would not believe
t.shakir: Most surely there is a sign in this, but most of them do not believe
t.haleem: There truly is a sign in this, though most of them do not believe
t.maariful: Surely, in this there is a sign, but most of them are not believers
t.khattab: Surely in this is a sign. Yet most of them would not believe
t.ghali: Surely in that is indeed a sign; and in no way were most of them believers
t.irving: In that is a sign, though most of them are not believers
t.iwq: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda-tanda (kekuasaan Allah), tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya apa yang telah Allah sebutkan dalam kisah Ibrâhîm ini merupakan nasihat dan renungan bagi orang-orang yang mau menerima nasihat dan mengambil pelajaran. Tetapi kebanyakan kaummu yang mendengar kisah ini, wahai Muhammad, tidak juga menuruti seruanmu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu) yaitu apa yang telah disebutkan tadi menyangkut kisah Nabi Ibrahim bersama dengan kaumnya (benar-benar terdapat tanda-tanda kekuasaan Allah, tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman).
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda-tanda (kekuasaan Allah), tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن في ذلك» المذكور من قصة إبراهيم وقومه «لآية وما كان أكثرهم مؤمنين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu) yaitu apa yang telah disebutkan tadi menyangkut kisah Nabi Ibrahim bersama dengan kaumnya (benar-benar terdapat tanda-tanda kekuasaan Allah, tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman)

t.sahih-int: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
t.asad: But, verily, thy Sustainer - He alone - is almighty, a dispenser of grace
t.yusuf-ali: And verily thy Lord is He, the Exalted in Might, Most Merciful
t.pickthall: And lo, thy Lord! He is indeed the Mighty, the Merciful
t.arberry: Surely thy Lord, He is the All-mighty, the All-compassionate
t.hilali-khan: And verily, your Lord! He is truly the All-Mighty, the Most Merciful
t.itani: Your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful.
t.mubarakpuri: And verily your Lord, He is truly the All-Mighty, the Most Merciful.
t.qarib: Truly your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful-to-all
t.wahiduddin: surely, your Lord is the Mighty One, the Merciful
t.shakir: And most surely your Lord is the Mighty, the Merciful
t.haleem: your Lord alone is the Almighty, the Merciful
t.maariful: and indeed your Lord is the Mighty, the Merciful
t.khattab: And your Lord is certainly the Almighty, Most Merciful
t.ghali: And surely your Lord, He is indeed The Ever-Mighty, The Ever-Merciful
t.irving: Yet your Lord is the Powerful, the Merciful
t.iwq: And verily, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu benar-benar Dialah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu Mahakuasa untuk membalas orang-orang yang mendustakan kebenaran; Maha Pemberi nikmat bagi orang-orang yang melakukan kebaikan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Rabbmu benar- benar Dia-lah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang).
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu benar-benar Dialah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإن ربك لهم العزيز الرحيم»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan sesungguhnya Rabbmu benar- benar Dia-lah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang

t.sahih-int: The people of Noah denied the messengers
t.asad: The people of Noah [too] gave the lie to [one of God’s] message-bearers
t.yusuf-ali: The people of Noah rejected the messengers
t.pickthall: Noah's folk denied the messengers (of Allah)
t.arberry: The people of Noah cried lies to the Envoys
t.hilali-khan: The people of Nuh (Noah) belied the Messengers
t.itani: The people of Noah disbelieved the messengers.
t.mubarakpuri: The people of Nuh denied the Messengers.
t.qarib: The people of Noah denied the Messengers
t.wahiduddin: The people of Noah also rejected the messengers
t.shakir: The people of Nuh rejected the apostles
t.haleem: The people of Noah, too, called the messengers liars
t.maariful: The people of NūH rejected the messengers
t.khattab: The people of Noah rejected the messengers
t.ghali: The people of Nuh (Noah) cried lies to the Emissaries
t.irving: Noah´s folk rejected the emissaries
t.iwq: The people of Noah denied the messengers

t_id.kemenag: Kaum Nuh telah mendustakan para rasul.
t_id.sabiq: Dalam firman-Nya, Allah telah menyebutkan berita tentang Nûh. Disebutkan bahwa kaum Nûh telah mendustakan risalah dan menolak seruan rasul mereka. Dengan demikian, mereka berarti telah mendustakan seluruh rasul, karena kesamaan prinsip dan tujuan dakwah mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kaum Nuh telah mendustakan para Rasul) disebabkan mereka mendustakan Nabi Nuh, maka mereka dikatakan telah mendustakan para Rasul yang lain; karena sesungguhnya semua ajaran yang dibawa para Rasul itu adalah sama, yaitu menyeru kepada ajaran tauhid. Atau makna yang dimaksud karena mengingat Nabi Nuh tinggal bersama kaumnya dalam kurun waktu yang sangat lama sehingga kedudukan Nabi Nuh sama saja dengan kedudukan Rasul-rasul yang banyak. Di-ta'nits-kannya dhamir yang kembali kepada lafal Qaum karena memandang dari segi makna lafal Qaum, sedangkan jika dhamir yang kembali kepadanya itu berbentuk mudzakkar, karena memandang dari segi lafalnya.
t_id.iwq: Kaum Nuh telah mendustakan para rasul.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «كذبت قوم نوح المرسلين» بتكذيبهم له لاشتراكهم في المجيء بالتوحيد، أو لأنه لطول لبثه فيهم كأنه رسل وتأنيث قوم باعتبار معناه وتذكيره باعتبار لفظه
tafsir.siraj-ar: كَذَّبَتۡ قَوۡمُ نُوحٍ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kaum Nuh telah mendustakan para Rasul) disebabkan mereka mendustakan Nabi Nuh, maka mereka dikatakan telah mendustakan para Rasul yang lain; karena sesungguhnya semua ajaran yang dibawa para Rasul itu adalah sama, yaitu menyeru kepada ajaran tauhid. Atau makna yang dimaksud karena mengingat Nabi Nuh tinggal bersama kaumnya dalam kurun waktu yang sangat lama sehingga kedudukan Nabi Nuh sama saja dengan kedudukan Rasul-rasul yang banyak. Di-ta'nits-kannya dhamir yang kembali kepada lafal Qaum karena memandang dari segi makna lafal Qaum, sedangkan jika dhamir yang kembali kepadanya itu berbentuk mudzakkar, karena memandang dari segi lafalnya

ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ar_simple: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ

t.sahih-int: When their brother Noah said to them, "Will you not fear Allah
t.asad: when their brother Noah said unto them: “Will you not be conscious of God
t.yusuf-ali: Behold, their brother Noah said to them: "Will ye not fear (Allah)
t.pickthall: When their brother Noah said unto them: Will ye not ward off (evil)
t.arberry: when their brother Noah said to them, 'Will you not be godfearing
t.hilali-khan: When their brother Nuh (Noah) said to them: "Will you not fear Allah and obey Him
t.itani: Their brother Noah said to them, “Do you not fear?
t.mubarakpuri: When their brother Nuh said to them: "Will you not have Taqwa"
t.qarib: when their brother Noah said to them, "Will you not be mindful of God
t.wahiduddin: When their brother Noah said to them, "Will you have no fear of God
t.shakir: When their brother Nuh said to them: Will you not guard (against evil)
t.haleem: Their brother Noah said to them, ‘Will you not be mindful of God
t.maariful: when their brother NūH said to them, “Do you not fear Allah
t.khattab: when their brother Noah said to them, “Will you not fear ˹Allah˺
t.ghali: As their brother Nuh said to them, "Will you not be pious
t.irving: when their brother Noah said to them: "Will you not do your duty
t.iwq: When their brother Noah said to them, "Will you not fear Allah

t_id.kemenag: Ketika saudara mereka (Nuh) berkata kepada mereka: "Mengapa kamu tidak bertakwa?
t_id.sabiq: Mereka telah mendustakan risalah di kala Nûh, saudara mereka dalam pertalian keluarga, bukan saudara seagama, memperingatkan mereka, "Apakah kalian tidak takut kepada Allah sehingga kalian meninggalkan menyembah selain-Nya?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ketika Saudara mereka berkata kepada mereka,) yang dimaksud adalah Nabi Nuh sendiri, pengertian saudara di sini adalah dari segi nasab atau keturunan ("Mengapa kalian tidak bertakwa?") kepada Allah.
t_id.iwq: Ketika saudara mereka (Nuh) berkata kepada mereka: "Mengapa kamu tidak bertakwa?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إذ قال لهم أخوهم» نسبا «نوح ألا تتقون» الله
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ketika Saudara mereka berkata kepada mereka,) yang dimaksud adalah Nabi Nuh sendiri, pengertian saudara di sini adalah dari segi nasab atau keturunan ("Mengapa kalian tidak bertakwa?") kepada Allah

t.sahih-int: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger
t.asad: Behold, I am an apostle [sent by Him] to you, [and therefore] worthy of your trust
t.yusuf-ali: I am to you a messenger worthy of all trust
t.pickthall: Lo! I am a faithful messenger unto you
t.arberry: I am for you a faithful Messenger
t.hilali-khan: I am a trustworthy Messenger to you
t.itani: I am to you a faithful messenger.
t.mubarakpuri: "I am a trustworthy Messenger to you."
t.qarib: I am a trustworthy messenger to you
t.wahiduddin: I am a trustworthy messenger for you
t.shakir: Surely I am a faithful apostle to you
t.haleem: I am a faithful messenger sent to you
t.maariful: I am an honest messenger for you
t.khattab: I am truly a trustworthy messenger to you
t.ghali: Surely I am for you a trustworthy Messenger
t.irving: I am a trustworthy messenger for you
t.iwq: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang rasul kepercayaan (yang diutus) kepadamu,
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya aku adalah utusan Allah kepada kalian untuk mengajak ke jalan yang lurus. Dan aku adalah seorang yang dapat dipercaya untuk menyampaikan risalah-Nya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang Rasul kepercayaan yang diutus kepada kalian) guna menyampaikan apa yang aku diutus untuk menyampaikannya.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang rasul kepercayaan (yang diutus) kepadamu,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إني لكم رسول أمين» على تبليغ ما أرسلت به
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنِّي لَكُمۡ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٞ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang Rasul kepercayaan yang diutus kepada kalian) guna menyampaikan apa yang aku diutus untuk menyampaikannya

t.sahih-int: So fear Allah and obey me
t.asad: be, then, conscious of God, and pay heed unto me
t.yusuf-ali: So fear Allah, and obey me
t.pickthall: So keep your duty to Allah, and obey me
t.arberry: so serve you God, and obey you me
t.hilali-khan: So fear Allah, keep your duty to Him, and obey me
t.itani: So fear God, and obey me.
t.mubarakpuri: "So have Taqwa of Allah, and obey me."
t.qarib: So be mindful of God and obey me
t.wahiduddin: fear God, and obey me
t.shakir: Therefore guard against (the punishment of) Allah and obey me
t.haleem: be mindful of God and obey me
t.maariful: So, fear Allah and obey me
t.khattab: So fear Allah, and obey me
t.ghali: So be pious to Allah, and obey me
t.irving: so heed God and obey me
t.iwq: Thus fear Allah and obey me

t_id.kemenag: maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku.
t_id.sabiq: Maka takutlah kalian kepada Allah, laksanakanlah perintah yang kuserukan untuk mengesakan dan menaati-Nya ini.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku) di dalam semua apa yang kuperintahkan kalian mengerjakannya, yaitu mentauhidkan Allah dan taat kepada-Nya.
t_id.iwq: maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فاتقوا الله وأطيعون» فيما آمركم به من توحيد الله وطاعته
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku) di dalam semua apa yang kuperintahkan kalian mengerjakannya, yaitu mentauhidkan Allah dan taat kepada-Nya

ar: وَمَاۤ أَسۡءَلُكُمۡ عَلَیۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِیَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَـٰلَمِینَ
ar_simple: وَمَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ

t.sahih-int: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds
t.asad: “And no reward whatever do I ask of you for it: my reward rests with none but the Sustainer of all the worlds
t.yusuf-ali: No reward do I ask of you for it: my reward is only from the Lord of the Worlds
t.pickthall: And I ask of you no wage therefor; my wage is the concern only of the Lord of the Worlds
t.arberry: I ask of you no wage for this; my wage falls only upon the Lord of all Being
t.hilali-khan: No reward do I ask of you for it (my Message of Islamic Monotheism), my reward is only from the Lord of the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists)
t.itani: I ask of you no payment for this. My payment is only from the Lord of the Worlds.
t.mubarakpuri: "No reward do I ask of you for it; my reward is only from the Lord of all that exists."
t.qarib: I ask no reward from you for doing this; my reward comes only from the Lord of the worlds
t.wahiduddin: I ask of you no recompense for it, for my only reward is with the Lord of the Universe
t.shakir: And I do not ask you any reward for it; my reward is only with the Lord of the worlds
t.haleem: I ask no reward of you, for my only reward is with the Lord of the Worlds
t.maariful: I do not claim from you any reward for it. My reward is with none but with the Lord of the worlds
t.khattab: I do not ask you for any reward for this ˹message˺. My reward is only from the Lord of all worlds
t.ghali: And in no way do I ask of you any reward for (this); decidedly my reward (falls) upon no one except The Lord of the worlds
t.irving: I do not ask you for any payment for it; my payment only concerns the Lord of the Universe
t.iwq: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from Lord of all worlds

t_id.kemenag: Dan aku sekali-kali tidak minta upah kepadamu atas ajakan-ajakan itu; upahku tidak lain hanyalah dari Tuhan semesta alam.
t_id.sabiq: Aku tak sedikit pun mengharapkan imbalan kalian sebagai balasan dari nasihat dan doa yang kulakukan demi kalian ini.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan aku sekali-kali tidak meminta kepada kalian atas ajakan-ajakan itu) imbalan dari menyampaikannya (suatu upah pun, tidak lain) (upahku) pahalaku (hanyalah dari Rabb semesta alam).
t_id.iwq: Dan aku sekali-kali tidak minta upah kepadamu atas ajakan-ajakan itu; upahku tidak lain hanyalah dari Tuhan semesta alam.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وما أسألكم عليه» على تبليغه «من أجر إن» ما «أجريَ» أي ثوابي «إلا على رب العالمين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan aku sekali-kali tidak meminta kepada kalian atas ajakan-ajakan itu) imbalan dari menyampaikannya (suatu upah pun, tidak lain) (upahku) pahalaku (hanyalah dari Rabb semesta alam)

t.sahih-int: So fear Allah and obey me
t.asad: Hence, remain conscious of God, and pay heed unto me!”
t.yusuf-ali: So fear Allah, and obey me
t.pickthall: So keep your duty to Allah, and obey me
t.arberry: so fear you God, and obey you me
t.hilali-khan: So keep your duty to Allah, fear Him and obey me
t.itani: So fear God, and obey me.”
t.mubarakpuri: "So have Taqwa of Allah, and obey me."
t.qarib: So be mindful of God, and obey me
t.wahiduddin: so fear God and obey me
t.shakir: So guard against (the punishment of) Allah and obey me
t.haleem: be mindful of God and obey me.’
t.maariful: so, fear Allah and obey me.”
t.khattab: So fear Allah, and obey me.”
t.ghali: So be pious to Allah, and obey me
t.irving: So heed God and obey me
t.iwq: Thus fear Allah and obey me

t_id.kemenag: Maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku".
t_id.sabiq: Maka waspadalah terhadap siksa Allah dan laksanakanlah perintahku."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku) Nabi Nuh mengulang-ulang kalimat ini untuk menegaskan perintahnya.
t_id.iwq: Maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فاتقوا الله وأطيعون» كرره تأكيدا
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku) Nabi Nuh mengulang-ulang kalimat ini untuk menegaskan perintahnya

t.sahih-int: They said, "Should we believe you while you are followed by the lowest [class of people]
t.asad: They answered: “Shall we place our faith in thee, even though [only] the most abject [of people] follow thee?”
t.yusuf-ali: They said: "Shall we believe in thee when it is the meanest that follow thee
t.pickthall: They said: Shall we put faith in thee, when the lowest (of the people) follow thee
t.arberry: They said, 'Shall we believe thee, whom the vilest follow
t.hilali-khan: They said: "Shall we believe in you, when the meanest (of the people) follow you
t.itani: They said, “Shall we believe in you, when it is the lowliest who follow you?”
t.mubarakpuri: They said: "Shall we believe in you, when the inferior follow you"
t.qarib: They said, "How can we believe you when you are followed mostly by the lowest [class of People]
t.wahiduddin: They replied, "Are we to believe in you when your followers are but the lowest of the low
t.shakir: They said: Shall we believe in you while the meanest follow you
t.haleem: They answered, ‘Why should we believe you when the worst sort of people follow you?’
t.maariful: They said, “Shall we believe in you while you are followed by the lowest people?”
t.khattab: They argued, “How can we believe in you, when you are followed ˹only˺ by the lowest of the low?”
t.ghali: They said, "should we believe you, and the most decrepit closely follow you
t.irving: They said: "Are we to believe in you while the meanest people follow you
t.iwq: They said, "Should we believe you while you are followed by the lowest class of people

t_id.kemenag: Mereka berkata: "Apakah kami akan beriman kepadamu, padahal yang mengikuti kamu ialah orang-orang yang hina?".
t_id.sabiq: Kaum Nûh, yang menolak seruan itu, berkata, "Kami tak akan beriman kepadamu selama pengikut- pengikutmu adalah mereka yang berasal dari kalangan kelas bawah yang rendah kedudukannya serta sedikit hartanya."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata, "Apakah kami akan beriman) percaya (kepadamu) dengan perkataan itu (padahal yang mengikuti kamu) menurut suatu qiraat dibaca Atbaa'uka, jamak dari lafal Taabi'un yang berkedudukan menjadi Mubtada (ialah orang-orang yang hina?") yakni orang-orang yang rendah.
t_id.iwq: Mereka berkata: "Apakah kami akan beriman kepadamu, padahal yang mengikuti kamu ialah orang-orang yang hina?".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا أنؤمن» نصدق «لك» لقولك «واتبعك» وفي قراءة وأتباعك جمع تابع مبتدأ «الأرذلون» السفلة كالحاكة والأساكفة
tafsir.siraj-ar: ۞قَالُوٓاْ أَنُؤۡمِنُ لَكَ وَٱتَّبَعَكَ ٱلۡأَرۡذَلُونَ (الْأَرْذَلُونَ: السَّفَلَةُ مِنَ النَّاسِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata, "Apakah kami akan beriman) percaya (kepadamu) dengan perkataan itu (padahal yang mengikuti kamu) menurut suatu qiraat dibaca Atbaa'uka, jamak dari lafal Taabi'un yang berkedudukan menjadi Mubtada (ialah orang-orang yang hina?") yakni orang-orang yang rendah

ar: قَالَ وَمَا عِلۡمِی بِمَا كَانُوا۟ یَعۡمَلُونَ
ar_simple: قَالَ وَمَا عِلْمِي بِمَا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُونَ
