t.sahih-int: He said, "And what is my knowledge of what they used to do
t.asad: Said he: “And what knowledge could I have as to what they were doing [before they came to me]
t.yusuf-ali: He said: "And what do I know as to what they do
t.pickthall: He said: And what knowledge have I of what they may have been doing (in the past)
t.arberry: He said, 'What knowledge have I of that they have been doing
t.hilali-khan: He said: "And what knowledge have I of what they used to do
t.itani: He said, “What do I know about what they do?
t.mubarakpuri: He said: "And what knowledge have I of what they used to do"
t.qarib: He said, "What do I know about what they have been doing
t.wahiduddin: He said, "What knowledge do I have of their doings
t.shakir: He said: And what knowledge have I of what they do
t.haleem: He said, ‘What knowledge do I have of what they used to do
t.maariful: He said, “I do not know about what they do
t.khattab: He responded, “And what knowledge do I have of what they do
t.ghali: He said, "What knowledge have I of whatever they were doing
t.irving: He said: "What knowledge do I have about what they have been doings
t.iwq: And he said, "And what is my knowledge of what they used to do

t_id.kemenag: Nuh menjawab: "Bagaimana aku mengetahui apa yang telah mereka kerjakan?
t_id.sabiq: Nûh berkata, "Dari mana aku tahu bahwa mereka itu rendah kedudukannya dan sedikit hartanya? Aku hanya ditugaskan untuk mengajak mereka beriman tanpa harus mengetahui lebih dulu kekayaan dan status mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Nuh menjawab, "Bagaimana aku mengetahui) mana mungkin aku mengetahui (apa yang telah mereka kerjakan?).
t_id.iwq: Nuh menjawab: "Bagaimana aku mengetahui apa yang telah mereka kerjakan?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال وما علمي» أيّ علم لي «بما كانوا يعلمون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ وَمَا عِلۡمِي بِمَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Nuh menjawab, "Bagaimana aku mengetahui) mana mungkin aku mengetahui (apa yang telah mereka kerjakan)

ar: إِنۡ حِسَابُهُمۡ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّیۖ لَوۡ تَشۡعُرُونَ
ar_simple: إِنْ حِسَابُهُمْ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّي ۖ لَوْ تَشْعُرُونَ

t.sahih-int: Their account is only upon my Lord, if you [could] perceive
t.asad: Their reckoning rests with none but my Sustainer: if you could but understand [this]
t.yusuf-ali: Their account is only with my Lord, if ye could (but) understand
t.pickthall: Lo! their reckoning is my Lord's concern, if ye but knew
t.arberry: Their account falls only upon my Lord, were you but aware
t.hilali-khan: Their account is only with my Lord, if you could (but) know
t.itani: Their account rests only with my Lord, if you have sense.
t.mubarakpuri: "Their account is only with my Lord, if you could (but) know."
t.qarib: It is for my Lord alone to bring them to account, if you [could] only understand
t.wahiduddin: My Lord alone can bring them to account, if only you could understand
t.shakir: Their account is only with my Lord, if you could perceive
t.haleem: It is for my Lord alone to bring them to account- if only you could see
t.maariful: their account is with none but with my Lord, if you have sense
t.khattab: Their judgment is with my Lord, if you had any sense
t.ghali: Decidedly their reckoning (falls) upon no one except my Lord, if you are aware
t.irving: Their reckoning only concerns my Lord, if you will only notice it
t.iwq: Their account is only upon my Lord, if you could perceive

t_id.kemenag: Perhitungan (amal perbuatan) mereka tidak lain hanyalah kepada Tuhanku, kalau kamu menyadari.
t_id.sabiq: Tuhanlah yang akan membalas hasil usaha mereka. Dia Maha Mengetahui apa yang ada dalam benak mereka. Kalau kalian termasuk orang yang berpikiran jernih, kalian tentu akan mengetahui hal ini.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Tidak lain) (perhitungan amal perbuatan mereka hanyalah kepada Rabbku) maka Dia akan membalasnya kepada mereka (kalau kalian menyadari) jika kalian mengetahui hal tersebut niscaya kalian tidak akan mencelanya.
t_id.iwq: Perhitungan (amal perbuatan) mereka tidak lain hanyalah kepada Tuhanku, kalau kamu menyadari.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن» ما «حسابهم إلا على ربي» فيجازيهم «لو تشعرون» تعلمون ذلك ما عبَّدتموهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنۡ حِسَابُهُمۡ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّيۖ لَوۡ تَشۡعُرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Tidak lain) (perhitungan amal perbuatan mereka hanyalah kepada Rabbku) maka Dia akan membalasnya kepada mereka (kalau kalian menyadari) jika kalian mengetahui hal tersebut niscaya kalian tidak akan mencelanya

t.sahih-int: And I am not one to drive away the believers
t.asad: Hence, I shall not drive away [any of] those [who profess to be] believers
t.yusuf-ali: I am not one to drive away those who believe
t.pickthall: And I am not (here) to repulse believers
t.arberry: I would not drive away the believers
t.hilali-khan: And I am not going to drive away the believers
t.itani: And I am not about to drive away the believers.
t.mubarakpuri: "And I am not going to drive away the believers."
t.qarib: I am not one to drive away the believers
t.wahiduddin: I am not going to drive away any believers
t.shakir: And I am not going to drive away the believers
t.haleem: I will not drive believers away
t.maariful: And I am not the one who would drive the believers away
t.khattab: I am not going to expel the believers
t.ghali: And in no way would I drive away the believers
t.irving: I do not intend to drive any believers away
t.iwq: And I am not one to drive away those who believe

t_id.kemenag: Dan aku sekali-kali tidak akan mengusir orang-orang yang beriman.
t_id.sabiq: Dan aku tidak akan mengusir mereka yang mempercayai seruanku--bagaimanapun status mereka, kaya atau miskin--untuk sekadar memenuhi syarat yang kalian ajukan untuk beriman kepadaku.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan aku sekali-kali tidak akan mengusir orang-orang yang beriman.)
t_id.iwq: Dan aku sekali-kali tidak akan mengusir orang-orang yang beriman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وما أنا بطارد المؤمنين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِطَارِدِ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan aku sekali-kali tidak akan mengusir orang-orang yang beriman

t.sahih-int: I am only a clear warner
t.asad: I am nothing but a plain warner.”
t.yusuf-ali: I am sent only to warn plainly in public
t.pickthall: I am only a plain warner
t.arberry: I am naught but a plain warner
t.hilali-khan: I am only a plain warner
t.itani: I am only a clear warner.”
t.mubarakpuri: "I am only a plain warner."
t.qarib: I am only a clear warner
t.wahiduddin: I am only a plain warner
t.shakir: I am naught but a plain warner
t.haleem: I am here only to give people a clear warning.’
t.maariful: I am no more than a plain warner.”
t.khattab: I am only sent with a clear warning.”
t.ghali: Decidedly I am nothing except an evident warner
t.irving: I am merely a plain warner
t.iwq: I am only a clear warner

t_id.kemenag: Aku (ini) tidak lain melainkan pemberi peringatan yang menjelaskan".
t_id.sabiq: Aku tidak lain hanyalah seorang rasul yang diutus untuk memberi peringatan kepada manusia dengan didukung bukti-bukti yang dapat memilah mana yang hak dan mana yang batil. Karenanya, tak ada perbedaan antara golongan bangsawan dan rakyat jelata. Bagaimana mungkin aku mengusir orang-orang Mukmin hanya lantaran kemiskinan mereka?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Tiada lain) (aku ini hanyalah pemberi peringatan yang jelas") jelas peringatannya.
t_id.iwq: Aku (ini) tidak lain melainkan pemberi peringatan yang menjelaskan".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن» ما «أنا إلا نذير مبين» بيَّن الإنذار
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنۡ أَنَا۠ إِلَّا نَذِيرٞ مُّبِينٞ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Tiada lain) (aku ini hanyalah pemberi peringatan yang jelas") jelas peringatannya

ar: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمۡ تَنتَهِ یَـٰنُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡمَرۡجُومِینَ
ar_simple: قَالُوا لَئِنْ لَمْ تَنْتَهِ يَا نُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْمَرْجُومِينَ

t.sahih-int: They said, "If you do not desist, O Noah, you will surely be of those who are stoned
t.asad: Said they: “Indeed, if thou desist not, O Noah, thou wilt surely be stoned to death!”
t.yusuf-ali: They said: "If thou desist not, O Noah! thou shalt be stoned (to death)
t.pickthall: They said: If thou cease not, O Noah, thou wilt surely be among those stoned (to death)
t.arberry: They said, 'If thou givest not over, Noah, thou shalt assuredly be one of the stoned
t.hilali-khan: They said: "If you cease not, O Nuh (Noah)! You will surely be among those stoned (to death)
t.itani: They said, “If you do not refrain, O Noah, you will be stoned.”
t.mubarakpuri: They said: "If you cease not, O Nuh you will surely be among those stoned."
t.qarib: They said, "If you do not desist, Noah, you will surely be stoned
t.wahiduddin: They said, "Noah, if you do not desist, you will be stoned
t.shakir: They said: If you desist not, O Nuh, you shall most certainly be of those stoned to death
t.haleem: So they said, ‘Noah, if you do not stop this, you will be stoned.’
t.maariful: They said, “Should you not stop, O NūH, you will surely be stoned.”
t.khattab: They threatened, “If you do not desist, O Noah, you will surely be stoned ˹to death˺.”
t.ghali: They said, "Indeed, decidedly in case you do not refrain, O Nuh, (Noah) indeed you will definitely be one of the stoned
t.irving: They said: "If you do not stop, Noah, you will become an outcast
t.iwq: And they said, "If you do not desist, O Noah, you will surely be of those who are stoned

t_id.kemenag: Mereka berkata: "Sungguh jika kamu tidak (mau) berhenti hai Nuh, niscaya benar-benar kamu akan termasuk orang-orang yang dirajam".
t_id.sabiq: Mereka berkata, "Wahai Nûh, jika kamu tidak menghentikan seruanmu, sungguh kami akan merajammu dengan bebatuan." Demikianlah, mereka mengancam untuk membunuh Nûh.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata, "Sungguh jika kamu tidak mau berhenti hai Nuh,) dari apa yang kamu katakan kepada kami itu (niscaya benar-benar kamu akan termasuk orang-orang yang dirajam") dengan batu atau dengan makian.
t_id.iwq: Mereka berkata: "Sungguh jika kamu tidak (mau) berhenti hai Nuh, niscaya benar-benar kamu akan termasuk orang-orang yang dirajam".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا لئن لم تنته يا نوح» عما تقول لنا «لتكونن من المرجومين» بالحجارة أو بالشتم
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُواْ لَئِن لَّمۡ تَنتَهِ يَٰنُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡمَرۡجُومِينَ (الْمَرْجُومِينَ: المَقْتُولِينَ رَمْيًا بِالحِجَارَةِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata, "Sungguh jika kamu tidak mau berhenti hai Nuh,) dari apa yang kamu katakan kepada kami itu (niscaya benar-benar kamu akan termasuk orang-orang yang dirajam") dengan batu atau dengan makian

t.sahih-int: He said, "My Lord, indeed my people have denied me
t.asad: [Whereupon] he prayed: “O my Sustainer! Behold, my people have given me the lie
t.yusuf-ali: He said: "O my Lord! truly my people have rejected me
t.pickthall: He said: My Lord! Lo! my own folk deny me
t.arberry: He said, 'My Lord, my people have cried me lies
t.hilali-khan: He said: "My Lord! Verily, my people have belied me
t.itani: He said, “My Lord, my people have denied me.
t.mubarakpuri: He said: "My Lord! Verily, my people have denied me."
t.qarib: He said, "My Lord, my people have denied me
t.wahiduddin: Noah said, "My Lord, my people have rejected me
t.shakir: He said: My Lord! Surely my people give me the lie
t.haleem: He said, ‘My Lord, my people have rejected me
t.maariful: He said, “My Lord, my people have rejected me
t.khattab: Noah prayed, “My Lord! My people have truly rejected me
t.ghali: He said, "Lord! Surely my people have cried me lies
t.irving: He said: "My Lord, my folk have rejected me
t.iwq: He said, "My Lord, verily my people have denied me

t_id.kemenag: Nuh berkata: "Ya Tuhanku, sesungguhnya kaumku telah mendustakan aku;
t_id.sabiq: Nûh mengadukan kekukuhan pendustaan kaumnya, seraya berseru, "Ya Tuhanku, sesungguhnya kaumku adalah orang-orang yang selalu mendustakan aku." Oleh karena itu, Nûh mempunyai alasan untuk memohonkan keburukan bagi mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Berkata) Nuh ("Ya Rabbku! Sesungguhnya kaumku telah mendustakan aku).
t_id.iwq: Nuh berkata: "Ya Tuhanku, sesungguhnya kaumku telah mendustakan aku;

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال» نوح «رب إن قومي كذبون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنَّ قَوۡمِي كَذَّبُونِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Berkata) Nuh ("Ya Rabbku! Sesungguhnya kaumku telah mendustakan aku)

ar: فَٱفۡتَحۡ بَیۡنِی وَبَیۡنَهُمۡ فَتۡحࣰا وَنَجِّنِی وَمَن مَّعِیَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِینَ
ar_simple: فَافْتَحْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَهُمْ فَتْحًا وَنَجِّنِي وَمَنْ مَعِيَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ

t.sahih-int: Then judge between me and them with decisive judgement and save me and those with me of the believers
t.asad: hence, lay Thou wide open the truth between me and them, and save me and those of the believers who are with me!”
t.yusuf-ali: Judge Thou, then, between me and them openly, and deliver me and those of the Believers who are with me
t.pickthall: Therefor judge Thou between us, a (conclusive) judgment, and save me and those believers who are with me
t.arberry: so give true deliverance between me and them, and deliver me and the believers that are with me
t.hilali-khan: Therefore judge You between me and them, and save me and those of the believers who are with me
t.itani: So judge between me and them decisively, and deliver me and the believers who are with me.
t.mubarakpuri: "Therefore judge You between me and them, and save me and those of the believers who are with me."
t.qarib: Judge between us decisively, and save me and those believers with me
t.wahiduddin: therefore, judge decisively between me and them; and save me and the believers who are with me
t.shakir: Therefore judge Thou between me and them with a (just) judgment, and deliver me and those who are with me of the believers
t.haleem: so make a firm judgement between me and them, and save me and my believing followers.’
t.maariful: So judge between me and them with an open verdict, and save me and all the believers who are with me.”
t.khattab: So judge between me and them decisively, and save me and the believers with me.”
t.ghali: So arbitrate between me and them a (conclusive) arbitration, and deliver me safely and the ones who are with me of the believers
t.irving: Decide the case between me and them, and rescue me as well as any believers who may be with me
t.iwq: Then judge between me and them with decisive judgement and save me and those with me of those who believe

t_id.kemenag: maka itu adakanlah suatu keputusan antaraku dan antara mereka, dan selamatkanlah aku dan orang-orang yang mukmin besertaku".
t_id.sabiq: Nûh melanjutkan, "Maka putuskanlah perkara antara aku dengan mereka ini dengan suatu keputusan yang dapat membinasakan mereka yang telah mengingkari keesaan-Mu serta mendustakan rasul-Mu. Dan selamatkanlah aku dan orang-orang Mukmin yang menyertaiku dari siksa akibat pembangkangan mereka."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Karena itu adakanlah keputusan antaraku dan mereka) putuskanlah (dan selamatkanlah aku dan orang-orang yang mukmin besertaku").
t_id.iwq: maka itu adakanlah suatu keputusan antaraku dan antara mereka, dan selamatkanlah aku dan orang-orang yang mukmin besertaku".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فافتح بيني وبينهم فتحا» أي احكم «ونجني ومن معي من المؤمنين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَٱفۡتَحۡ بَيۡنِي وَبَيۡنَهُمۡ فَتۡحٗا وَنَجِّنِي وَمَن مَّعِيَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ (فَافْتَحْ: احْكُمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Karena itu adakanlah keputusan antaraku dan mereka) putuskanlah (dan selamatkanlah aku dan orang-orang yang mukmin besertaku)

ar: فَأَنجَیۡنَـٰهُ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥ فِی ٱلۡفُلۡكِ ٱلۡمَشۡحُونِ
ar_simple: فَأَنْجَيْنَاهُ وَمَنْ مَعَهُ فِي الْفُلْكِ الْمَشْحُونِ

t.sahih-int: So We saved him and those with him in the laden ship
t.asad: And so We saved him and those [who were] with him in the fully-laden ark
t.yusuf-ali: So We delivered him and those with him, in the Ark filled (with all creatures)
t.pickthall: And We saved him and those with him in the laden ship
t.arberry: So We delivered him, and those with him, in the laden ship
t.hilali-khan: And We saved him and those with him in the laden ship
t.itani: So We delivered him and those with him in the laden Ark.
t.mubarakpuri: And We saved him and those with him in the laden ship.
t.qarib: So We saved him and those with him in the laden ark
t.wahiduddin: So We saved him, and those who were with him in the laden ark
t.shakir: So We delivered him and those with him in the laden ark
t.haleem: So We saved him and his followers in the fully laden ship
t.maariful: So We saved him and those with him in the Ark that was fully occupied
t.khattab: So We saved him and those with him in the fully loaded Ark
t.ghali: So We delivered him, and the ones with him, in the laden ship
t.irving: So We rescued him and anyone who was with him on the laden ship
t.iwq: Thus We saved him and those with him in the laden ship

t_id.kemenag: Maka Kami selamatkan Nuh dan orang-orang yang besertanya di dalam kapal yang penuh muatan.
t_id.sabiq: Maka--untuk mengabulkan doa Nûh--Kami menyelamatkannya dan orang-orang Mukmin yang menyertainya dalam sebuah bahtera yang mereka naiki dan muati dengan apa yang mereka butuhkan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: Allah berfirman, ("Maka Kami selamatkan Nuh dan orang-orang yang besertanya di dalam kapal yang penuh muatan) yang penuh dengan manusia, hewan dan burung-burung.
t_id.iwq: Maka Kami selamatkan Nuh dan orang-orang yang besertanya di dalam kapal yang penuh muatan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: قال تعالى «فأنجيناه ومن معه في الفلك المشحون» المملوء من الناس والحيوان والطير
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَأَنجَيۡنَٰهُ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥ فِي ٱلۡفُلۡكِ ٱلۡمَشۡحُونِ (الْمَشْحُونِ: المَمْلُوءِ بِالنَّاسِ، وَالدَّوَابِّ، وَالمَتَاعِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Allah berfirman, ("Maka Kami selamatkan Nuh dan orang-orang yang besertanya di dalam kapal yang penuh muatan) yang penuh dengan manusia, hewan dan burung-burung

t.sahih-int: Then We drowned thereafter the remaining ones
t.asad: and then We caused those who stayed behind to drown
t.yusuf-ali: Thereafter We drowned those who remained behind
t.pickthall: Then afterward We drowned the others
t.arberry: then afterwards We drowned the rest
t.hilali-khan: Then We drowned the rest (disbelievers) thereafter
t.itani: Then We drowned the rest.
t.mubarakpuri: Then We drowned the rest thereafter.
t.qarib: and then We drowned the rest
t.wahiduddin: and drowned the rest
t.shakir: Then We drowned the rest afterwards
t.haleem: and drowned the rest
t.maariful: Then We drowned, after that, all the remaining
t.khattab: Then afterwards We drowned the rest
t.ghali: Thereafter We drowned afterwords the remaining ones
t.irving: Then later on We let those who remained drown
t.iwq: Then We drowned after that the remaining ones

t_id.kemenag: Kemudian sesudah itu Kami tenggelamkan orang-orang yang tinggal.
t_id.sabiq: Setelah menyelamatkan Nûh dan orang-orang Mukmin, Kami menenggelamkan sisa kaumnya yang tidak beriman.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian sesudah itu Kami tenggelamkan) sesudah Nabi Nuh dan orang-orang yang besertanya diselamatkan (orang-orang yang tertinggal) di antara kaumnya.
t_id.iwq: Kemudian sesudah itu Kami tenggelamkan orang-orang yang tinggal.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ثم أغرقنا بعد» بعد إنجائهم «الباقين» من قومه
tafsir.siraj-ar: ثُمَّ أَغۡرَقۡنَا بَعۡدُ ٱلۡبَاقِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian sesudah itu Kami tenggelamkan) sesudah Nabi Nuh dan orang-orang yang besertanya diselamatkan (orang-orang yang tertinggal) di antara kaumnya

ar: إِنَّ فِی ذَ ٰلِكَ لَءَایَةࣰۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِینَ
ar_simple: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ

t.sahih-int: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
t.asad: In this [story], behold, there is a message [unto men], even though most of them will not believe [in it]
t.yusuf-ali: Verily in this is a Sign: but most of them do not believe
t.pickthall: Lo! herein is indeed a portent, yet most of them are not believers
t.arberry: Surely in that is a sign, yet most of them are not believers
t.hilali-khan: Verily, in this is indeed a sign, yet most of them are not believers
t.itani: In that is a sign, but most of them are not believers.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, in this is indeed a sign, yet most of them are not believers.
t.qarib: There is a sign in this, but most of them will not believe
t.wahiduddin: There is certainly a sign in that; but most of them do not believe
t.shakir: Most surely there is a sign in this, but most of them do not believe
t.haleem: There truly is a sign in this, though most of them do not believe
t.maariful: Surely, in this there is a sign, but most of them are not believers
t.khattab: Surely in this is a sign. Yet most of them would not believe
t.ghali: Surely in that is indeed a sign; and in no way were most of them believers
t.irving: In that is a sign, though most of them are not believers
t.iwq: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda (kekuasaan Allah), tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya apa yang dipaparkan al-Qur'ân tentang kisah ini merupakan bukti kebenaran para rasul dan kekuasaan Allah. Tetapi, kebanyakan mereka yang telah diperdengarkan kisah ini, tidak beriman.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda -kekuasaan Allah- tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman).
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda (kekuasaan Allah), tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن ذلك لآية وما كان أكثرهم مؤمنين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Sesungguhnya yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda -kekuasaan Allah- tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman

t.sahih-int: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
t.asad: But, verily, thy Sustainer - He alone - is almighty, a dispenser of grace
t.yusuf-ali: And verily thy Lord is He, the Exalted in Might, Most Merciful
t.pickthall: And lo, thy Lord, He is indeed the Mighty, the Merciful
t.arberry: Surely thy Lord, He is the All-mighty, the All-compassionate
t.hilali-khan: And verily! Your Lord, He is indeed the All-Mighty, the Most Merciful
t.itani: Your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful.
t.mubarakpuri: And verily your Lord, He is indeed the All-Mighty, the Most Merciful.
t.qarib: Truly your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful-to-all
t.wahiduddin: surely your Lord is the Mighty One, the Merciful
t.shakir: And most surely your Lord is the Mighty, the Merciful
t.haleem: your Lord alone is the Almighty, the Merciful
t.maariful: and indeed your Lord is the Mighty, the Very-Merciful
t.khattab: And your Lord is certainly the Almighty, Most Merciful
t.ghali: And surely your Lord, He is indeed The Ever-Mighty, The Ever-Merciful
t.irving: Yet your Lord is the Powerful, the Merciful
t.iwq: And verily, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu Dialah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang.
t_id.sabiq: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu Mahaperkasa untuk membalas para tiran yang membangkang; Maha Pemberi nikmat bagi orang-orang yang bertakwa.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Rabbmu, Dia-lah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang").
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu Dialah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإن ربك لهو العزيز الرحيم»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan sesungguhnya Rabbmu, Dia-lah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang

t.sahih-int: Aad denied the messengers
t.asad: [AND the tribe of] Ad gave the lie to [one of God’s] message-bearers
t.yusuf-ali: The 'Ad (people) rejected the messengers
t.pickthall: (The tribe of) A'ad denied the messengers (of Allah)
t.arberry: Ad cried lies to the Envoys
t.hilali-khan: Ad (people) belied the Messengers
t.itani: Aad disbelieved the messengers.
t.mubarakpuri: `Ad denied the Messengers.
t.qarib: [The people of] Aad denied the Messengers
t.wahiduddin: The people of 'Ad, too, rejected the messengers
t.shakir: Ad gave the lie to the apostles
t.haleem: The people of Ad, too, called the messengers liars
t.maariful: The (people of) ‘Ād rejected the messengers
t.khattab: The people of ’Âd rejected the messengers
t.ghali: Aad cried lies to the Emissaries
t.irving: Ad rejected the emissaries
t.iwq: Aad denied the messengers

t_id.kemenag: Kaum 'Aad telah mendustakan para rasul.
t_id.sabiq: Kabilah 'Ad telah mendustakan Hûd a. s., rasul mereka. Mereka, karenanya, telah mendustakan semua rasul. Sebab, prinsip dan tujuan dakwah seluruh rasul adalah sama.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kaum Ad telah mendustakan para Rasul).
t_id.iwq: Kaum 'Aad telah mendustakan para rasul.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «كذبت عادٌ المرسلين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: كَذَّبَتۡ عَادٌ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Kaum Ad telah mendustakan para Rasul

ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ هُودٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ar_simple: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ هُودٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ

t.sahih-int: When their brother Hud said to them, "Will you not fear Allah
t.asad: when their brother Hud said unto them: “Will you not be conscious of God
t.yusuf-ali: Behold, their brother Hud said to them: "Will ye not fear (Allah)
t.pickthall: When their brother Hud said unto them: Will ye not ward off (evil)
t.arberry: when their brother Hood said to them, 'Will you not be godfearing
t.hilali-khan: When their brother Hud said to them: "Will you not fear Allah and obey Him
t.itani: When their brother Hud said to them, “Do you not fear?
t.mubarakpuri: When their brother Hud said to them: "Will you not have Taqwa"
t.qarib: when their brother Hud said to them, "Will you not be mindful of God
t.wahiduddin: Their brother Hud said to them, "Will you not fear God
t.shakir: When their brother Hud said to them: Will you not guard (against evil)
t.haleem: Their brother Hud said to them, ‘Will you not be mindful of God
t.maariful: when their brother Hūd said to them, “Do you not fear Allah
t.khattab: when their brother Hûd said to them, “Will you not fear ˹Allah˺
t.ghali: As their brother H?d said to them, "Will you not be pious
t.irving: when their brother Hud said to them; "Will you not do our duty
t.iwq: When their brother Hud said to them, "Will you not fear Allah

t_id.kemenag: Ketika saudara mereka Hud berkata kepada mereka: "Mengapa kamu tidak bertakwa?
t_id.sabiq: Tatkala saudara mereka, Hûd, berkata, "Tidakkah kalian takut kepada Allah sehingga kalian mengikhlaskan diri untuk beribadah kepada-Nya?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ketika saudara mereka Hud berkata kepada mereka, "Mengapa kalian tidak bertakwa?).
t_id.iwq: Ketika saudara mereka Hud berkata kepada mereka: "Mengapa kamu tidak bertakwa?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إذ قال لهم أخوهم هود ألا تتقون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ هُودٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Ketika saudara mereka Hud berkata kepada mereka, "Mengapa kalian tidak bertakwa

t.sahih-int: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger
t.asad: Behold, I am an apostle [sent by Him] to you, [and therefore] worthy of your trust
t.yusuf-ali: I am to you a messenger worthy of all trust
t.pickthall: Lo! I am a faithful messenger unto you
t.arberry: I am for you a faithful Messenger
t.hilali-khan: Verily! I am a trustworthy Messenger to you
t.itani: I am to you a faithful messenger.
t.mubarakpuri: "Verily, I am a trustworthy Messenger to you."
t.qarib: I am a trustworthy messenger to you
t.wahiduddin: I am a trustworthy messenger for you
t.shakir: Surely I am a faithful apostle to you
t.haleem: I am a faithful messenger sent to you
t.maariful: I am an honest messenger for you
t.khattab: I am truly a trustworthy messenger to you
t.ghali: Surely I am for you a trustworthy Messenger
t.irving: I am a trustworthy messenger for you
t.iwq: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang rasul kepercayaan (yang diutus) kepadamu,
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya aku diutus oleh Allah untuk menunjuki kalian jalan kebenaran. Dan aku selalu bersikap amanah terhadap risalah Allah ini dengan menyampaikan kepada kalian semua yang Allah perintahkan kepadaku.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang Rasul kepercayaan yang diutus kepada kalian).
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang rasul kepercayaan (yang diutus) kepadamu,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إني لكم رسول أمين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنِّي لَكُمۡ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٞ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang Rasul kepercayaan yang diutus kepada kalian

t.sahih-int: So fear Allah and obey me
t.asad: be, then, conscious of God, and pay heed unto me
t.yusuf-ali: So fear Allah and obey me
t.pickthall: So keep your duty to Allah and obey me
t.arberry: so fear you God, and obey you me
t.hilali-khan: So fear Allah, keep your duty to Him, and obey me
t.itani: So fear God, and obey me.
t.mubarakpuri: "So, have Taqwa of Allah, and obey me."
t.qarib: so be mindful of God, and obey me
t.wahiduddin: fear God, then, and obey me
t.shakir: Therefore guard against (the punishment of) Allah and obey me
t.haleem: be mindful of God and obey me
t.maariful: so fear Allah and obey me
t.khattab: So fear Allah, and obey me
t.ghali: So be pious to Allah, and obey me
t.irving: so heed God and obey me
t.iwq: Thus fear Allah and obey me

t_id.kemenag: maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku.
t_id.sabiq: Maka laksanakanlah segala perintah Allah, takutlah kepada-Nya dan ikutilah apa yang kuserukan kepada kalian dari sisi Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka bertakwalah kalian kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku).
t_id.iwq: maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فاتقوا الله وأطيعون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Maka bertakwalah kalian kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku

ar: وَمَاۤ أَسۡءَلُكُمۡ عَلَیۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِیَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَـٰلَمِینَ
ar_simple: وَمَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ

t.sahih-int: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds
t.asad: “And no reward whatever do I ask of you for it: my reward rests with none but the Sustainer of all the worlds
t.yusuf-ali: No reward do I ask of you for it: my reward is only from the Lord of the Worlds
t.pickthall: And I ask of you no wage therefor; my wage is the concern only of the Lord of the Worlds
t.arberry: I ask of you no wage for this; my wage falls only upon the Lord of all Being
t.hilali-khan: No reward do I ask of you for it (my Message of Islamic Monotheism), my reward is only from the Lord of the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns, and all that exists)
t.itani: I ask of you no payment for this. My payment is only from the Lord of the Worlds.
t.mubarakpuri: "No reward do I ask of you for it; my reward is only from the Lord of all that exists."
t.qarib: I ask no reward from you for doing this; my reward is only from the Lord of the worlds
t.wahiduddin: I ask no recompense of you; my reward is only with the Lord of the Universe
t.shakir: And I do not ask you any reward for it; surely my reward is only with the Lord of the worlds
t.haleem: I ask no reward of you, for my only reward is with the Lord of the Worlds
t.maariful: I do not claim from you any reward for it. My reward is with none but with the Lord of the worlds
t.khattab: I do not ask you for any reward for this ˹message˺. My reward is only from the Lord of all worlds
t.ghali: And in no way do I ask of you any reward for (this); decidedly my reward (falls) upon no one except The Lord of the worlds
t.irving: I do not ask you for any payment for it; my payment only concerns the Lord of the Universe
t.iwq: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from Lord of all worlds

t_id.kemenag: Dan sekali-kali aku tidak minta upah kepadamu atas ajakan itu; upahku tidak lain hanyalah dari Tuhan semesta alam.
t_id.sabiq: Nasihat dan petunjuk yang kuberikan kepada kalian ini tidak aku maksudkan untuk mendapatkan segala bentuk imbalan dari kalian. Hanya Tuhan semesta alamlah yang imbalan-Nya amat kuharapkan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sekali-kali aku tidak meminta upah kepada kalian atas ajakan itu, tiada lain upahku hanyalah dari Rabb semesta alam).
t_id.iwq: Dan sekali-kali aku tidak minta upah kepadamu atas ajakan itu; upahku tidak lain hanyalah dari Tuhan semesta alam.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وما أسألكم عليه من أجر إن» ما «أجري إلا على رب العالمين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan sekali-kali aku tidak meminta upah kepada kalian atas ajakan itu, tiada lain upahku hanyalah dari Rabb semesta alam

t.sahih-int: Do you construct on every elevation a sign, amusing yourselves
t.asad: “Will you, in your wanton folly, build [idolatrous] altars on every height
t.yusuf-ali: Do ye build a landmark on every high place to amuse yourselves
t.pickthall: Build ye on every high place a monument for vain delight
t.arberry: What, do you build on every prominence a sign, sporting
t.hilali-khan: Do you build high palaces on every high place, while you do not live in them
t.itani: Do you build a monument on every height for vanity's sake?
t.mubarakpuri: "Do you build on every Ri` an Ayah for your amusement"
t.qarib: Do you build a tower on every hill just to amuse yourselves
t.wahiduddin: Do you build monuments on every high place in vanity
t.shakir: Do you build on every height a monument? Vain is it that you do
t.haleem: How can you be so vain that you set up monuments on every high place
t.maariful: Do you erect on every height a monument, having no sound purpose
t.khattab: ˹Why˺ do you build a landmark on every high place in vanity
t.ghali: Do you build on every prominence a sign, sporting? (i.e., huge prominence inspiring fear)
t.irving: Are you building a sign on every hill just so you may fool around
t.iwq: Do you construct on every elevation a sign, amusing yourselves

t_id.kemenag: Apakah kamu mendirikan pada tiap-tiap tanah tinggi bangunan untuk bermain-main,
t_id.sabiq: Adakah kalian mendirikan bangunan yang kokoh di semua dataran tinggi untuk berbangga-bangga dan menjadikannya tempat berkumpul untuk berfoya-foya dan membuat kerusakan? (Dalam ayat ini, Allah hendak mengingatkan mereka hal-hal yang bermanfaat dan mencela ketidakberimanan dan perbuatan buruk mereka).
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Apakah kalian mendirikan pada tiap-tiap tanah yang tinggi) tempat yang tinggi (bangunan) yang berfungsi sebagai pertanda bagi orang-orang yang lewat (untuk bermain-main) di tempat-tempat tersebut kalian memperolok-olok orang-orang yang melewatinya. Kalimat ini berkedudukan menjadi Hal atau kata keterangan keadaan bagi dhamir yang terkandung di dalam lafal Tabnuuna.
t_id.iwq: Apakah kamu mendirikan pada tiap-tiap tanah tinggi bangunan untuk bermain-main,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أتبنون بكل ريع» مكان مرتفع «آية» بنا علما للمارة «تعبثون» ممن يمر بكم وتسخرون منهم والجملة حال من ضمير تبنون
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَتَبۡنُونَ بِكُلِّ رِيعٍ ءَايَةٗ تَعۡبَثُونَ (رِيعٍ: مَكَانٍ مُرْتَفِعٍ, آيَةً: بِنَاءً عَالِيًا, تَعْبَثُونَ: تُشْرِفُونَ مِنْهُ فَتَسْخَرُونَ مِنَ المَارَّةِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Apakah kalian mendirikan pada tiap-tiap tanah yang tinggi) tempat yang tinggi (bangunan) yang berfungsi sebagai pertanda bagi orang-orang yang lewat (untuk bermain-main) di tempat-tempat tersebut kalian memperolok-olok orang-orang yang melewatinya. Kalimat ini berkedudukan menjadi Hal atau kata keterangan keadaan bagi dhamir yang terkandung di dalam lafal Tabnuuna

t.sahih-int: And take for yourselves palaces and fortresses that you might abide eternally
t.asad: and make for yourselves mighty castles, [hoping] that you might become immortal
t.yusuf-ali: And do ye get for yourselves fine buildings in the hope of living therein (for ever)
t.pickthall: And seek ye out strongholds, that haply ye may last for ever
t.arberry: and do you take to you castles, haply to dwell forever
t.hilali-khan: And do you get for yourselves palaces (fine buildings) as if you will live therein for ever
t.itani: And you set up fortresses, hoping to live forever?
t.mubarakpuri: "And do you get for yourselves Masani` as if you will live therein forever"
t.qarib: and construct for yourselves mighty castles hoping to live there eternally
t.wahiduddin: and erect castles hoping that you will live forever
t.shakir: And you make strong fortresses that perhaps you may
t.haleem: Do you build fortresses because you hope to be immortal
t.maariful: and take the objects of architecture as if you are going to live forever
t.khattab: and construct castles, as if you are going to live forever
t.ghali: And do you take to yourselves castles (Or: huge buildings and tombs) that possibly you may abide eternally
t.irving: Are you setting up workshops so that you may live forever
t.iwq: And take for yourselves palaces and fortresses that you might abide eternally

t_id.kemenag: dan kamu membuat benteng-benteng dengan maksud supaya kamu kekal (di dunia)?
t_id.sabiq: Dan kalian membangun istana-istana yang kuat dan kokoh dengan kolam-kolam airnya, seolah-olah kalian akan kekal di dunia dan tidak pernah mati!
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan kalian membuat benteng-benteng) yakni penampungan-penampungan air di bawah tanah (dengan maksud supaya kalian) seolah-olah kalian akan (hidup kekal) di dunia ini dan tidak akan mati.
t_id.iwq: dan kamu membuat benteng-benteng dengan maksud supaya kamu kekal (di dunia)?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وتتخذون مصانع» للماء تحت الأرض «لعلكم» كأنكم «تخلدون» فيها لا تموتون
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَتَتَّخِذُونَ مَصَانِعَ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَخۡلُدُونَ (مَصَانِعَ: قُصُورًا مَنِيعَةً وَحُصُونًا مُشَيَّدَةً)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan kalian membuat benteng-benteng) yakni penampungan-penampungan air di bawah tanah (dengan maksud supaya kalian) seolah-olah kalian akan (hidup kekal) di dunia ini dan tidak akan mati

t.sahih-int: And when you strike, you strike as tyrants
t.asad: And will you [always], whenever you lay hand [on others], lay hand [on them] cruelly, without any restraint
t.yusuf-ali: And when ye exert your strong hand, do ye do it like men of absolute power
t.pickthall: And if ye seize by force, seize ye as tyrants
t.arberry: When you assault, you assault like tyrants
t.hilali-khan: And when you seize, seize you as tyrants
t.itani: And when you strike, you strike mercilessly?
t.mubarakpuri: "And when you seize (somebody), seize you (him) as tyrants"
t.qarib: And when you attack, why do you attack like tyrants
t.wahiduddin: When you lay hands upon anyone, you do so as tyrants
t.shakir: And when you lay hands (on men) you lay hands (like) tyrants
t.haleem: Why do you act like tyrants whenever you attack someone
t.maariful: and when you seize (someone) you seize as tyrants
t.khattab: and act so viciously when you attack ˹others˺
t.ghali: And when you assault, you assault as potentates
t.irving: Whenever you assault anyone, you pounce on them like bullies
t.iwq: And when you strike, you strike as tyrants

t_id.kemenag: Dan apabila kamu menyiksa, maka kamu menyiksa sebagai orang-orang kejam dan bengis.
t_id.sabiq: Jika kalian melakukan penyiksaan, kalian terlalu berlebihan melakukannya dengan cara-cara yang bengis dan kejam. Kalian membunuh dan memukul tanpa belas kasihan sedikit pun.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan apabila kalian menyiksa) dengan pukulan atau membunuh (maka kalian menyiksa sebagai orang-orang yang kejam dan bengis) tanpa belas kasihan sedikit pun.
t_id.iwq: Dan apabila kamu menyiksa, maka kamu menyiksa sebagai orang-orang kejam dan bengis.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإذا بطشتم» بضرب أو قتل «بطشتم جبارين» من غير رأفة
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِذَا بَطَشۡتُم بَطَشۡتُمۡ جَبَّارِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan apabila kalian menyiksa) dengan pukulan atau membunuh (maka kalian menyiksa sebagai orang-orang yang kejam dan bengis) tanpa belas kasihan sedikit pun

t.sahih-int: So fear Allah and obey me
t.asad: “Be, then, conscious of God and pay heed unto me
t.yusuf-ali: Now fear Allah, and obey me
t.pickthall: Rather keep your duty to Allah, and obey me
t.arberry: So fear you God, and obey you me
t.hilali-khan: So fear Allah, keep your duty to Him, and obey me
t.itani: So fear God, and obey me.
t.mubarakpuri: "So have Taqwa of Allah, and obey me."
t.qarib: So be mindful of God, and obey me
t.wahiduddin: So fear God, and obey me
t.shakir: So guard against (the punishment of) Allah and obey me
t.haleem: Be mindful of God and obey me
t.maariful: So fear Allah and obey me
t.khattab: So fear Allah, and obey me
t.ghali: So be pious to Allah, and obey me
t.irving: So heed God and obey me
t.iwq: Thus fear Allah and obey me

t_id.kemenag: Maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku.
t_id.sabiq: Maka takutlah kepada Allah saat melakukan penyiksaan. Dengarkanlah perintah yang kuserukan ini, karena hal itu lebih berguna dan lebih kekal.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka bertakwalah kalian kepada Allah) dalam hal itu (dan taatlah kalian kepadaku) di dalam semua apa yang aku perintahkan kalian untuk melakukannya.
t_id.iwq: Maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فاتقوا الله» في ذلك «وأطيعون» فيما أمرتكم به
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka bertakwalah kalian kepada Allah) dalam hal itu (dan taatlah kalian kepadaku) di dalam semua apa yang aku perintahkan kalian untuk melakukannya

t.sahih-int: And fear He who provided you with that which you know
t.asad: and [thus] be conscious of Him who has [so] amply provided you with all [the good] that you might think of
t.yusuf-ali: Yea, fear Him Who has bestowed on you freely all that ye know
t.pickthall: Keep your duty toward Him Who hath aided you with (the good things) that ye know
t.arberry: and fear Him who has succoured you with what you know
t.hilali-khan: And keep your duty to Him, fear Him Who has aided you with all (good things) that you know
t.itani: And reverence Him, who supplied you with everything you know.
t.mubarakpuri: "And have Taqwa of Him, fear Him Who has aided you with all (good things) that you know."
t.qarib: and be mindful of Him Who provided you with everything you know
t.wahiduddin: fear Him who has aided you with all that you know
t.shakir: And be careful of (your duty to) Him Who has given you abundance of what you know
t.haleem: be mindful of Him who has provided you with everything you know
t.maariful: And fear the One who has supported you with what you know
t.khattab: Fear the One Who has provided you with ˹the good˺ things you know
t.ghali: And be pious to Him Who has supplied you with whatever you know
t.irving: heed the One Who has furnished you with whatever you know
t.iwq: And fear He who provided you with that which you know

t_id.kemenag: Dan bertakwalah kepada Allah yang telah menganugerahkan kepadamu apa yang kamu ketahui.
t_id.sabiq: Dan waspadalah terhadap murka Allah yang telah bermurah hati mengaruniakan segala yang telah kalian ketahui dari pelbagai pemberian-Nya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan bertakwalah kalian kepada Allah yang telah menganugerahkan kepada kalian) yakni yang telah melimpahkan nikmat kepada kalian (apa yang kalian ketahui).
t_id.iwq: Dan bertakwalah kepada Allah yang telah menganugerahkan kepadamu apa yang kamu ketahui.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «واتقوا الذي أمدكم» أنعم عليكم «بما تعملون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَمَدَّكُم بِمَا تَعۡلَمُونَ (أَمَدَّكُم: أَعْطَاكُمْ وَأَنْعَمَ عَلَيْكُمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan bertakwalah kalian kepada Allah yang telah menganugerahkan kepada kalian) yakni yang telah melimpahkan nikmat kepada kalian (apa yang kalian ketahui)

t.sahih-int: Provided you with grazing livestock and children
t.asad: amply provided you with flocks, and children
t.yusuf-ali: Freely has He bestowed on you cattle and sons
t.pickthall: Hath aided you with cattle and sons
t.arberry: succoured you with flocks and sons
t.hilali-khan: He has aided you with cattle and children
t.itani: He supplied you with livestock and children.
t.mubarakpuri: "He has aided you with cattle and children."
t.qarib: grazing livestock and children
t.wahiduddin: He has bestowed on you cattle, and sons
t.shakir: He has given you abundance of cattle and children
t.haleem: He has given you livestock, sons
t.maariful: He has supported you with cattle and sons
t.khattab: He provided you with cattle, and children
t.ghali: He has supplied you with cattle (Ancam includes cattle, camels, sheep, and goats) and sons
t.irving: He has furnished you with livestock and children
t.iwq: Provided you with grazing livestock and children

t_id.kemenag: Dia telah menganugerahkan kepadamu binatang-binatang ternak, dan anak-anak,
t_id.sabiq: Yaitu sejumlah karunia Allah kepada kalian berupa unta, sapi dan domba, serta anak keturunan yang kuat, yang dapat memelihara ternak dan membantu kalian menanggung beban kehidupan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dia telah menganugerahkan kepada kalian binatang-binatang ternak dan anak-anak).
t_id.iwq: Dia telah menganugerahkan kepadamu binatang-binatang ternak, dan anak-anak,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أمدكم بأنعام وبنين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَمَدَّكُم بِأَنۡعَٰمٖ وَبَنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dia telah menganugerahkan kepada kalian binatang-binatang ternak dan anak-anak

t.sahih-int: And gardens and springs
t.asad: and gardens, and springs
t.yusuf-ali: And Gardens and Springs
t.pickthall: And gardens and watersprings
t.arberry: gardens and fountains
t.hilali-khan: And gardens and springs
t.itani: And gardens and springs.
t.mubarakpuri: "And gardens and springs."
t.qarib: gardens and springs
t.wahiduddin: and gardens, and springs
t.shakir: And gardens and fountains
t.haleem: gardens, springs
t.maariful: and with gardens and springs
t.khattab: and gardens, and springs
t.ghali: And gardens and springs
t.irving: gardens and springs
t.iwq: And gardens and springs

t_id.kemenag: dan kebun-kebun dan mata air,
t_id.sabiq: Juga berupa kebun-kebun yang dipenuhi buah serta berbagai mata air yang kalian butuhkan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan kebun-kebun) ladang-ladang (dan mata air) sungai-sungai.
t_id.iwq: dan kebun-kebun dan mata air,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وجنات» بساتين «وعيون» أنهار
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَجَنَّـٰتٖ وَعُيُونٍ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan kebun-kebun) ladang-ladang (dan mata air) sungai-sungai

ar: إِنِّیۤ أَخَافُ عَلَیۡكُمۡ عَذَابَ یَوۡمٍ عَظِیمࣲ
ar_simple: إِنِّي أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ

t.sahih-int: Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a terrible day
t.asad: for, verily, I fear lest suffering befall you on an awesome day!”
t.yusuf-ali: Truly I fear for you the Penalty of a Great Day
t.pickthall: Lo! I fear for you the retribution of an awful day
t.arberry: Indeed, I fear for you the chastisement of a dreadful day
t.hilali-khan: Verily, I fear for you the torment of a Great Day
t.itani: I fear for you the punishment of an awesome Day.”
t.mubarakpuri: "Verily, I fear for you the torment of a Great Day."
t.qarib: I fear for you the punishment of a terrible day
t.wahiduddin: indeed, I fear for you the torment of an awful day
t.shakir: Surely I fear for you the chastisement of a grievous day
t.haleem: for I truly fear that the torment of a grievous day will overtake you.’
t.maariful: In fact I fear for you the punishment of a horrible day.”
t.khattab: I truly fear for you the torment of a tremendous day.”
t.ghali: Surely I fear for you the torment of a tremendous Day
t.irving: Yet I fear the torment of a terrible day for you
t.iwq: Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a terrible day

t_id.kemenag: sesungguhnya aku takut kamu akan ditimpa azab hari yang besar".
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya aku khawatir Allah akan menurunkan azab yang pedih di dunia ini kepada kalian. Sementara di akhirat nanti kalian akan dijerumuskan ke dalam neraka Jahanam, disebabkan kesewenang- wenangan kalian atas segala nikmat-Nya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya aku takut kalian akan ditimpa azab hari yang besar") di dunia dan di akhirat jika kalian durhaka kepadaku.
t_id.iwq: sesungguhnya aku takut kamu akan ditimpa azab hari yang besar".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إني أخاف عليكم عذاب يوم عظيم» في الدنيا والآخرة إن عصيتموني
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنِّيٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمٖ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya aku takut kalian akan ditimpa azab hari yang besar") di dunia dan di akhirat jika kalian durhaka kepadaku

ar: قَالُوا۟ سَوَاۤءٌ عَلَیۡنَاۤ أَوَعَظۡتَ أَمۡ لَمۡ تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلۡوَ ٰعِظِینَ
ar_simple: قَالُوا سَوَاءٌ عَلَيْنَا أَوَعَظْتَ أَمْ لَمْ تَكُنْ مِنَ الْوَاعِظِينَ

t.sahih-int: They said, "It is all the same to us whether you advise or are not of the advisors
t.asad: [But] they answered. “It is all one to us whether thou preachest [something new] or art not of those who [like to] preach
t.yusuf-ali: They said: "It is the same to us whether thou admonish us or be not among (our) admonishers
t.pickthall: They said: It is all one to us whether thou preachest or art not of those who preach
t.arberry: They said, 'Alike it is to us, whether thou admonishest, or art not one of the admonishers
t.hilali-khan: They said: "It is the same to us whether you preach or be not of those who preach
t.itani: They said, “It is the same for us, whether you lecture us, or do not lecture.
t.mubarakpuri: They said: "It is the same to us whether you preach or be not of those who preach."
t.qarib: They said, "It is all the same to us whether you preach or not
t.wahiduddin: They replied, "It makes no difference to us whether you preach or do not preach
t.shakir: They said: It is the same to us whether you admonish or are not one of the admonishers
t.haleem: They replied, ‘It makes no difference to us whether you warn us or not
t.maariful: They said, “It is all equal for us, whether you give us advice or you do not become one of the advisors
t.khattab: They responded, “It is all the same to us whether you warn ˹us˺ or not
t.ghali: They said, "It is equal to us, whether you admonish or you are not one of the admonishers
t.irving: They said: "It´s all the same for us whether you lecture [us] or are not lecturing
t.iwq: And they said, "It is all the same to us whether you advise or are not of the advisors

t_id.kemenag: Mereka menjawab: "Adalah sama saja bagi kami, apakah kamu memberi nasehat atau tidak memberi nasehat,
t_id.sabiq: Dengan sikap mencemooh, mereka berkata, "Baik kamu sampaikan nasihat dan peringatan itu kepada kami ataupun tidak, sebenarnya sama saja bagi kami.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka menjawab, "Adalah sama saja bagi kami apakah kamu memberi nasihat atau tidak memberi nasihat) pada prinsipnya sama saja, yaitu kami tidak akan mengindahkan lagi nasihatmu.
t_id.iwq: Mereka menjawab: "Adalah sama saja bagi kami, apakah kamu memberi nasehat atau tidak memberi nasehat,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا سواء علينا» مستو عندنا «أوعظت أم لم تكن من الواعظين» أصلا أي لا نرعوي لوعظك
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُواْ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيۡنَآ أَوَعَظۡتَ أَمۡ لَمۡ تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلۡوَٰعِظِينَ (سَوَاءٌ عَلَيْنَا: يَسْتَوِي عِنْدَنَا, أَوَعَظْتَ: أَخَوَّفْتَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka menjawab, "Adalah sama saja bagi kami apakah kamu memberi nasihat atau tidak memberi nasihat) pada prinsipnya sama saja, yaitu kami tidak akan mengindahkan lagi nasihatmu

t.sahih-int: This is not but the custom of the former peoples
t.asad: This [religion of ours] is none other than that to which our forebears clung
t.yusuf-ali: This is no other than a customary device of the ancients
t.pickthall: This is but a fable of the men of old
t.arberry: this is nothing but the habit of the ancients
t.hilali-khan: This is no other than the false-tales and religion of the ancients, [Tafsir At-Tabari, Vol. 19, Page]
t.itani: This is nothing but morals of the ancients.
t.mubarakpuri: "This is no other than Khuluq of the ancients,"
t.qarib: this is only what our forefathers used to do
t.wahiduddin: this is nothing but a habit of the ancients
t.shakir: This is naught but a custom of the ancients
t.haleem: for we only do what our forefathers used to do
t.maariful: This is nothing but the practice of the ancient
t.khattab: This is simply the tradition of our predecessors
t.ghali: Decidedly this is nothing except the character of the earliest (people)
t.irving: This is only a fabrication [made up] by primitive men
t.iwq: This is not but the custom of the former peoples

t_id.kemenag: (agama kami) ini tidak lain hanyalah adat kebiasaan orang dahulu.
t_id.sabiq: Apa yang kamu sampaikan itu tidak lebih dari kebohongan dan kebatilan orang-orang sebelum kamu yang dikemas dalam bentuk lain. Oleh karenanya, kami tidak akan meninggalkan apa yang ada pada kami.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Tiada lain) (hal ini) apa yang kamu takut-takuti kami dengannya (hanyalah adat kebiasaan dahulu,) kebiasaan dan kedustaan mereka. Menurut qiraat yang lain dibaca Khalqul Awwaliina; maksudnya: Tiada lain apa yang kami lakukan ini, yaitu ingkar kepada adanya hari berbangkit, melainkan kebiasaan dan tradisi orang-orang dahulu.
t_id.iwq: (agama kami) ini tidak lain hanyalah adat kebiasaan orang dahulu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن» ما «هذا» الذي خوفنا به «إلا خَلْق الأولين» اختلافهم وكذبهم وفي قراءة بضم الخاء واللام أي ما هذا الذي نحن عليه من إنكار للبعث إلا خلق الأولين أي طبيعتهم وعادتهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا خُلُقُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ (خُلُقُ: دِينُ، وَعَادَةُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Tiada lain) (hal ini) apa yang kamu takut-takuti kami dengannya (hanyalah adat kebiasaan dahulu,) kebiasaan dan kedustaan mereka. Menurut qiraat yang lain dibaca Khalqul Awwaliina; maksudnya: Tiada lain apa yang kami lakukan ini, yaitu ingkar kepada adanya hari berbangkit, melainkan kebiasaan dan tradisi orang-orang dahulu

t.sahih-int: And we are not to be punished
t.asad: and we are not going to be chastised [for adhering to it]!”
t.yusuf-ali: And we are not the ones to receive Pains and Penalties
t.pickthall: And we shall not be doomed
t.arberry: and we shall not be chastised
t.hilali-khan: And we are not going to be punished
t.itani: And we will not be punished.”
t.mubarakpuri: "And we are not going to be punished."
t.qarib: We will not be punished
t.wahiduddin: and we shall not be punished
t.shakir: And we are not going to be punished
t.haleem: we shall not be punished.’
t.maariful: and we are not going to be punished.”
t.khattab: And we will never be punished.”
t.ghali: And in no way will we be tormented
t.irving: we are not going to be punished
t.iwq: And we are not to be punished

t_id.kemenag: dan kami sekali-kali tidak akan di "azab".
t_id.sabiq: Dan kami tidak akan diazab karena telah melakukan semua itu."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan kami sekali-kali tidak akan diazab").
t_id.iwq: dan kami sekali-kali tidak akan di "azab".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وما نحن بمعذبين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan kami sekali-kali tidak akan diazab

ar: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهۡلَكۡنَـٰهُمۡۚ إِنَّ فِی ذَ ٰلِكَ لَءَایَةࣰۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِینَ
ar_simple: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهْلَكْنَاهُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ

t.sahih-int: And they denied him, so We destroyed them. Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
t.asad: And so they gave him the lie: and thereupon We destroyed them. In this [story], behold, there is a message [unto men], even though most of them will not believe [in it]
t.yusuf-ali: So they rejected him, and We destroyed them. Verily in this is a Sign: but most of them do not believe
t.pickthall: And they denied him; therefor We destroyed them. Lo! herein is indeed a portent, yet most of them are not believers
t.arberry: So they cried him lies; then We destroyed them. Surely in that is a sign, yet most of them are not believers
t.hilali-khan: So they belied him, and We destroyed them. Verily! In this is indeed a sign, yet most of them are not believers
t.itani: So they denied him, and We destroyed them. Surely in this is a sign, but most of them are not believers.
t.mubarakpuri: So they denied him, and We destroyed them. Verily, in this is indeed a sign, yet most of them are not believers.
t.qarib: They denied him, so We destroyed them. There is a sign in this, but most of them will not believe
t.wahiduddin: So they rejected him; and We destroyed them. There is certainly a sign in that; but most of them would not believe
t.shakir: So they gave him the lie, then We destroyed them. Most surely there is a sign in this, but most of them do not believe
t.haleem: They denounced him as a liar, and so We destroyed them. There truly is a sign in this, though most of them do not believe
t.maariful: Thus they rejected him, so We destroyed them. Surely, in this there is a sign, but most of them are not believers
t.khattab: So they rejected him, and ˹so˺ We destroyed them. Surely in this is a sign. Yet most of them would not believe
t.ghali: So they cried him lies, then We caused them to perish. Surely in that is indeed a sign; and in no way were most of them believers
t.irving: They rejected him, so We wiped them out. In that is a sign; though most of them are not believers
t.iwq: And they denied him, so We destroyed them. Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers

t_id.kemenag: Maka mereka mendustakan Hud, lalu Kami binasakan mereka. Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda (kekuasaan Allah), tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman.
t_id.sabiq: Demikianlah, mereka tetap bersikeras mempertahankan pendustaan yang ada. Maka Allah mempercepat kebinasaan mereka. Sesungguhnya apa yang Allah turunkan kepada kabilah 'Ad sebagai balasan pendustaan mereka, merupakan bukti yang menunjukkan kemahakuasaan Allah. Tetapi kebanyakan mereka yang dibacakan berita 'Ad ini tidak beriman.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka mereka mendustakannya) mendustakan adanya azab itu (lalu Kami binasakan mereka) di dunia dengan angin. (Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda, kekuasaan Allah, tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman).
t_id.iwq: Maka mereka mendustakan Hud, lalu Kami binasakan mereka. Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda (kekuasaan Allah), tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فكذبوه» بالعذاب «فأهلكناهم» في الدنيا بالريح «إن في ذلك لآية وما كان أكثرهم مؤمنين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهۡلَكۡنَٰهُمۡۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka mereka mendustakannya) mendustakan adanya azab itu (lalu Kami binasakan mereka) di dunia dengan angin. (Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda, kekuasaan Allah, tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman)

t.sahih-int: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
t.asad: But, verily, thy Sustainer - He alone - is almighty, a dispenser of grace
t.yusuf-ali: And verily thy Lord is He, the Exalted in Might, Most Merciful
t.pickthall: And lo! thy Lord, He is indeed the Mighty, the Merciful
t.arberry: Surely thy Lord, He is the All-mighty, the All-compassionate
t.hilali-khan: And verily! Your Lord, He is indeed the All-Mighty, the Most Merciful
t.itani: Your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful.
t.mubarakpuri: And verily your Lord, He is indeed the Almighty, the Most Merciful.
t.qarib: Truly your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful-to-all
t.wahiduddin: Surely your Lord is the Mighty One, the Merciful
t.shakir: And most surely your Lord is the Mighty, the Merciful
t.haleem: your Lord alone is the Almighty, the Merciful
t.maariful: and indeed your Lord is the Mighty, the Merciful
t.khattab: And your Lord is certainly the Almighty, Most Merciful
t.ghali: And surely your Lord, He is indeed The Ever-Mighty, The Ever-Merciful
t.irving: Yet your Lord is the Powerful, the Merciful
t.iwq: And verily, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu, Dialah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang.
t_id.sabiq: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu Mahaperkasa untuk menghancurkan para pembangkang; Maha Pengasih terhadap orang-orang beriman.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Rabbmu, Dialah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang).
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu, Dialah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: ««إن ربك لهو العزيز الرحيم»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan sesungguhnya Rabbmu, Dialah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang

t.sahih-int: Thamud denied the messengers
t.asad: [AND the tribe of] Thamud gave the lie to [one of God’s] message-hearers
t.yusuf-ali: The Thamud (people) rejected the messengers
t.pickthall: (The tribe of) Thamud denied the messengers (of Allah)
t.arberry: Thamood cried lies to the Envoys
t.hilali-khan: Thamud (people) belied the Messenger
t.itani: Thamood disbelieved the messengers.
t.mubarakpuri: Thamud denied the Messengers.
t.qarib: [The people of] Thamud denied the Messengers
t.wahiduddin: The tribe of Thamud also rejected the messengers
t.shakir: Samood gave the lie to the apostles
t.haleem: The people of Thamud, too, called the messengers liars
t.maariful: The (people of) Thamūd rejected the messengers
t.khattab: The people of Thamûd rejected the messengers

t.irving: Thamud rejected the emissaries

t_id.kemenag: Kaum Tsamud telah mendustakan rasul-rasul.
t_id.sabiq: Kabilah Tsamûd telah mendustakan risalah dan dakwah Shâlih untuk mengesakan Allah. Itu sama artinya dengan mendustakan seluruh rasul, karena pokok-pokok dasar risalah mereka sama.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kaum Tsamud telah mendustakan Rasul-Rasul).
t_id.iwq: Kaum Tsamud telah mendustakan rasul-rasul.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «كذبت ثمود المرسلين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: كَذَّبَتۡ ثَمُودُ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Kaum Tsamud telah mendustakan Rasul-Rasul

ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ صَـٰلِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ar_simple: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ صَالِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ

t.sahih-int: When their brother Salih said to them, "Will you not fear Allah
t.asad: when their brother Salih said unto them: “Will you not be conscious of God
t.yusuf-ali: Behold, their brother Salih said to them: "Will you not fear (Allah)
t.pickthall: When their brother Salih said unto them: Will ye not ward off (evil)
t.arberry: when their brother Salih said to them, 'Will you not be godfearing
t.hilali-khan: When their brother Salih (Saleh) said to them: "Will you not fear Allah and obey Him
t.itani: When their brother Saleh said to them, “Do you not fear?
t.mubarakpuri: When their brother Salih said to them: "Will you not have Taqwa"
t.qarib: when their brother Salih said to them, "Will you not be mindful of God
t.wahiduddin: When their brother Salih said to them, "Will you not fear God
t.shakir: When their brother Salih said to them: Will you not guard (against evil)
t.haleem: Their brother Salih said to them, ‘Will you not be mindful of God
t.maariful: when their brother SāliH said to them, “Do you not fear Allah
t.khattab: when their brother Ṣâliḥ said to them, “Will you not fear ˹Allah˺
t.ghali: As their brother Salih said to them, "Will you not be pious
t.irving: when their brother Salih said to them: "Will you not do your duty
t.iwq: When their brother Salih said to them, "Will you not fear Allah

t_id.kemenag: Ketika saudara mereka, Shaleh, berkata kepada mereka: "Mengapa kamu tidak bertakwa?
t_id.sabiq: Ingatkanlah kaummu, wahai Muhammad, tatkala Shâlih, saudara sebangsa dan seperanakan kabilah Tsamûd, berkata kepada mereka, "Apakah kalian tidak takut kepada Allah sehingga kalian mengesakan-Nya dalam beribadah?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ketika saudara mereka Saleh, berkata kepada mereka, "Mengapa kalian tidak bertakwa?).
t_id.iwq: Ketika saudara mereka, Shaleh, berkata kepada mereka: "Mengapa kamu tidak bertakwa?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إذ قال لهم أخوهم صالح ألا تتقون»

tafsir.jalalayn-id: Ketika saudara mereka Saleh, berkata kepada mereka, "Mengapa kalian tidak bertakwa

t.sahih-int: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger

t.yusuf-ali: I am to you a messenger worthy of all trust
t.pickthall: Lo! I am a faithful messenger unto you
t.arberry: I am for you a faithful Messenger
t.hilali-khan: I am a trustworthy Messenger to you
t.itani: I am to you a faithful messenger.
t.mubarakpuri: "I am a trustworthy Messenger to you."
t.qarib: I am a trustworthy messenger to you
t.wahiduddin: Truly, I am a trustworthy messenger for you
t.shakir: Surely I am a faithful apostle to you
t.haleem: I am a faithful messenger to you
t.maariful: I am an honest messenger for you
t.khattab: I am truly a trustworthy messenger to you
t.ghali: Surely I am for you a trustworthy Messenger
t.irving: I am a trustworthy messenger for you
t.iwq: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang rasul kepercayaan (yang diutus) kepadamu,
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya aku diutus oleh Allah untuk kebahagiaan dan kebaikan kalian. Dan aku benar-benar menyampaikan risalah ini seperti yang aku terima dari Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang Rasu1 kepercayaan yang diutus kepada kalian).
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang rasul kepercayaan (yang diutus) kepadamu,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إني لكم رسول أمين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنِّي لَكُمۡ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٞ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang Rasu1 kepercayaan yang diutus kepada kalian

t.sahih-int: So fear Allah and obey me
t.asad: be, then, conscious of God, and pay heed unto me
t.yusuf-ali: So fear Allah, and obey me
t.pickthall: So keep your duty to Allah and obey me
t.arberry: so fear you God, and obey you me
t.hilali-khan: So fear Allah, keep your duty to Him, and obey me
t.itani: So fear God, and obey me.
t.mubarakpuri: "So, have Taqwa of Allah, and obey me."
t.qarib: so be mindful of God, and obey me
t.wahiduddin: so fear God and obey me
t.shakir: Therefore guard against (the punishment of) Allah and obey me
t.haleem: be mindful of God and obey me
t.maariful: So, fear Allah and obey me
t.khattab: So fear Allah, and obey me
t.ghali: So be pious to Allah, and obey me
t.irving: so heed God and obey me
t.iwq: Thus fear Allah and obey me

t_id.kemenag: maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku.
t_id.sabiq: Maka takutlah kalian akan siksa Allah, dan ikutilah ajakanku.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka bertakwalah kalian kepada Allah dan taatlah kalian kepadaku).
t_id.iwq: maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فاتقوا الله وأطيعون»

tafsir.jalalayn-id: Maka bertakwalah kalian kepada Allah dan taatlah kalian kepadaku

ar: وَمَاۤ أَسۡءَلُكُمۡ عَلَیۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِیَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَـٰلَمِینَ
ar_simple: وَمَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ

t.sahih-int: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds
t.asad: “And no reward whatever do I ask of you for it: my reward rests with none but the Sustainer of all the worlds
t.yusuf-ali: No reward do I ask of you for it: my reward is only from the Lord of the Worlds
t.pickthall: And I ask of you no wage therefor; my wage is the concern only of the Lord of the Worlds
t.arberry: I ask of you no wage for this; my wage falls only upon the Lord of all Being
t.hilali-khan: No reward do I ask of you for it (my Message of Islamic Monotheism), my reward is only from the Lord of the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists)
t.itani: I ask of you no payment for it. My payment is only from the Lord of the Worlds.
t.mubarakpuri: "No reward do I ask of you for it; my reward is only from the Lord of Al-`Alamin."
t.qarib: I ask no reward from you for doing this; my reward [comes) only from the Lord of the worlds
t.wahiduddin: For this I demand no recompense from you; my reward is only with the Lord of the Universe
t.shakir: And I do not ask you any reward for it; my reward is only with the Lord of the worlds
t.haleem: I ask no reward from you, for my only reward is with the Lord of the Worlds
t.maariful: I do not claim from you any reward for it. My reward is with none but with the Lord of the worlds
t.khattab: I do not ask you for any reward for this ˹message˺. My reward is only from the Lord of all worlds
t.ghali: And in no way do I ask of you any reward for (this); decidedly my reward (falls) upon no one except The Lord of the worlds
t.irving: I do not ask you for any payment for it; my payment only concerns the Lord of the Universe
t.iwq: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from Lord of all worlds

t_id.kemenag: Dan aku sekali-kali tidak minta upah kepadamu atas ajakan itu, upahku tidak lain hanyalah dari Tuhan semesta alam.
t_id.sabiq: Dalam menyampaikan nasihat dan petunjuk ini, aku tidak sedikit pun mengharapkan imbalan kalian. Hanya Penguasa alam semesta yang akan membalasnya."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan aku sekali-kali tidak meminta upah atas ajakan itu, tiada lain) (upahku hanyalah dari Rabb semesta alam).
t_id.iwq: Dan aku sekali-kali tidak minta upah kepadamu atas ajakan itu, upahku tidak lain hanyalah dari Tuhan semesta alam.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وما أسألكم عليه من أجر إن» ما «أجري إلا على رب العالمين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan aku sekali-kali tidak meminta upah atas ajakan itu, tiada lain) (upahku hanyalah dari Rabb semesta alam)
