tafsir.siraj-ar: أَتَأۡتُونَ ٱلذُّكۡرَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mengapa kalian mendatangi jenis laki-laki di antara manusia?) melakukan homosex

ar: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمۡ رَبُّكُم مِّنۡ أَزۡوَ ٰجِكُمۚ بَلۡ أَنتُمۡ قَوۡمٌ عَادُونَ
ar_simple: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ مِنْ أَزْوَاجِكُمْ ۚ بَلْ أَنْتُمْ قَوْمٌ عَادُونَ

t.sahih-int: And leave what your Lord has created for you as mates? But you are a people transgressing
t.asad: keeping yourselves aloof from all the [lawful] spouses whom your Sustainer has created for you? Nay, but you are people who transgress all bounds of what is right!”
t.yusuf-ali: And leave those whom Allah has created for you to be your mates? Nay, ye are a people transgressing (all limits)
t.pickthall: And leave the wives your Lord created for you? Nay, but ye are froward folk
t.arberry: leaving your wives that your Lord created for you? Nay, but you are a people of transgressors
t.hilali-khan: And leave those whom Allah has created for you to be your wives? Nay, you are a trespassing people
t.itani: And forsake the wives your Lord created for you? Indeed, you are intrusive people.”
t.mubarakpuri: "And leave those whom Allah has created for you to be your wives Nay, you are a trespassing people!"
t.qarib: and leave the mates your Lord has created for you? You people have transgressed all bounds
t.wahiduddin: and leave your wives whom your Lord has created for you? You are a people who transgress all bounds
t.shakir: And leave what your Lord has created for you of your wives? Nay, you are a people exceeding limits
t.haleem: and abandon the wives that God has created for you? You are exceeding all bounds,’
t.maariful: and leave your wives whom your Lord has created for you? Indeed you are a people who cross (all) limits.”
t.khattab: leaving the wives that your Lord has created for you? In fact, you are a transgressing people.”
t.ghali: And leave behind what your Lord created for you as spouses? No indeed, (but) you are an aggressive people
t.irving: and ignore any wives whom your Lord has created for you? Indeed you are such defiant folk
t.iwq: And leave what your Lord has created for you as mates? But you are a people transgressing

t_id.kemenag: dan kamu tinggalkan isteri-isteri yang dijadikan oleh Tuhanmu untukmu, bahkan kamu adalah orang-orang yang melampaui batas".
t_id.sabiq: "Dan mengapa," lanjut Lûth, "kalian meninggalkan istri-istri yang halal yang diciptakan Allah untuk kesenangan kalian? Bahkan kalian, dengan melakukan semua kemaksiatan, adalah kaum yang kezalimannya telah melampaui batas?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan kalian tinggalkan istri-istri yang dijadikan oleh Rabb kalian untuk kalian) yakni farji-farji mereka (bahkan kalian adalah orang-orang yang melampaui batas").
t_id.iwq: dan kamu tinggalkan isteri-isteri yang dijadikan oleh Tuhanmu untukmu, bahkan kamu adalah orang-orang yang melampaui batas".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وتذرون ما خلق لكم ربكم من أزواجكم» أي أقبالهن «بل أنتم قوم عادون» متجاوزون الحلال إلى الحرام
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمۡ رَبُّكُم مِّنۡ أَزۡوَٰجِكُمۚ بَلۡ أَنتُمۡ قَوۡمٌ عَادُونَ (عَادُونَ: مُتَجَاوِزُونَ مَا أَبَاحَهُ اللهُ لَكُمْ مِنَ الحَلَالِ إِلَى الحَرَامِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan kalian tinggalkan istri-istri yang dijadikan oleh Rabb kalian untuk kalian) yakni farji-farji mereka (bahkan kalian adalah orang-orang yang melampaui batas)

ar: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمۡ تَنتَهِ یَـٰلُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡمُخۡرَجِینَ
ar_simple: قَالُوا لَئِنْ لَمْ تَنْتَهِ يَا لُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْمُخْرَجِينَ

t.sahih-int: They said, "If you do not desist, O Lot, you will surely be of those evicted
t.asad: Said they: “Indeed, If thou desist not, O Lot, thou wilt most certainly be expelled [from this township]!”
t.yusuf-ali: They said: "If thou desist not, O Lut! thou wilt assuredly be cast out
t.pickthall: They said: If thou cease not, O Lot, thou wilt soon be of the outcast
t.arberry: They said, 'If thou givest not over, Lot, thou shalt assuredly be one of the expelled
t.hilali-khan: They said: "If you cease not. O Lout (Lot)! Verily, you will be one of those who are driven out
t.itani: They said, “Unless you refrain, O Lot, you will be expelled.”
t.mubarakpuri: They said: "If you cease not, O Lut, verily, you will be one of those who are driven out!"
t.qarib: They said, "If you do not stop this, Lot, you will surely be kicked out
t.wahiduddin: They said, "If you do not desist, Lot, you will surely be banished
t.shakir: They said: If you desist not, O Lut! you shall surely be of those who are expelled
t.haleem: but they replied, ‘Lot! If you do not stop this, you will be driven away.’
t.maariful: They said, “If you do not stop O LūT, you shall be included among the outcast.”
t.khattab: They threatened, “If you do not desist, O Lot, you will surely be expelled.”
t.ghali: They said, "Indeed in case you do not refrain, O L?t, indeed you will definitely be of the driven out
t.irving: They said; "If you do not stop, Lot, you will become an exile
t.iwq: And they said, "If you do not desist, O Lot, you will surely be of those evicted

t_id.kemenag: Mereka menjawab: "Hai Luth, sesungguhnya jika kamu tidak berhenti, benar-benar kamu termasuk orang-orang yang diusir"
t_id.sabiq: Mendengar penolakan dan cacian Lûth terhadap praktek buruk itu, mereka--dengan penuh amarah--berkata, "Sungguh, jika kamu tidak berhenti memaki-maki kami, kamu akan kami buang dari negeri ini dengan kondisi yang sangat buruk."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka menjawab, "Hai Luth! Sesungguhnya jika kamu tidak berhenti) dari mengingkari perbuatan kami ini (benar-benar kamu termasuk orang-orang yang diusir") dari negeri kami ini.
t_id.iwq: Mereka menjawab: "Hai Luth, sesungguhnya jika kamu tidak berhenti, benar-benar kamu termasuk orang-orang yang diusir"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا لئن لم تنته يا لوط» عن إنكارك علينا «لتكونن من المخرجين» من بلدتنا
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُواْ لَئِن لَّمۡ تَنتَهِ يَٰلُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡمُخۡرَجِينَ (الْمُخْرَجِينَ: المَطْرُودِينَ مِنْ بِلَادِنَا, الْقَالِينَ: المُبْغِضِينَ لِعَمَلِكُمْ بُغْضًا شَدِيدًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka menjawab, "Hai Luth! Sesungguhnya jika kamu tidak berhenti) dari mengingkari perbuatan kami ini (benar-benar kamu termasuk orang-orang yang diusir") dari negeri kami ini

t.sahih-int: He said, "Indeed, I am, toward your deed, of those who detest [it]
t.asad: [Lot] exclaimed: “Behold, I am one of those who utterly abhor your doings!”
t.yusuf-ali: He said: "I do detest your doings
t.pickthall: He said: I am in truth of those who hate your conduct
t.arberry: He said, 'Truly I am a detester of what you do
t.hilali-khan: He said: "I am, indeed, of those who disapprove with severe anger and fury your (this evil) action (of sodomy)
t.itani: He said, “I certainly deplore your conduct.”
t.mubarakpuri: He said: "I am indeed of those who disapprove with severe anger and fury your behavior."
t.qarib: He said, "I despise your actions
t.wahiduddin: He said, "I am one of those who abhors your ways
t.shakir: He said: Surely I am of those who utterly abhor your doing
t.haleem: So he said, ‘I loathe what you do
t.maariful: He said “Indeed, I am annoyed with your act
t.khattab: Lot responded, “I am truly one of those who despise your ˹shameful˺ practice
t.ghali: He said, "Surely I am of the disfavorers of your doing. (i.e., idisapprove of what you are doing)
t.irving: He said: "I am someone who detests your behavior
t.iwq: He said, "Indeed, I am, toward your deed, of those who detest it

t_id.kemenag: Luth berkata: "Sesungguhnya aku sangat benci kepada perbuatanmu".
t_id.sabiq: Lûth berkata, "Aku memang termasuk orang yang membenci perbuatan kalian ini. Maka aku tidak akan berhenti untuk menolak dan mencela hal ini."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Berkata) Nabi Luth, ("Sesungguhnya aku sangat benci kepada perbuatan kalian) sangat membencinya.
t_id.iwq: Luth berkata: "Sesungguhnya aku sangat benci kepada perbuatanmu".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال» لوط «إني لعملكم من القالين» المبغضين
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ إِنِّي لِعَمَلِكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡقَالِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Berkata) Nabi Luth, ("Sesungguhnya aku sangat benci kepada perbuatan kalian) sangat membencinya

t.sahih-int: My Lord, save me and my family from [the consequence of] what they do
t.asad: [And then he prayed:] “O my Sustainer! Save me and my household from all that they are doing!”
t.yusuf-ali: O my Lord! deliver me and my family from such things as they do
t.pickthall: My Lord! Save me and my household from what they do
t.arberry: My Lord, deliver me and my people from that they do
t.hilali-khan: My Lord! Save me and my family from what they do
t.itani: “My Lord, save me and my family from what they do.”
t.mubarakpuri: "My Lord! Save me and my family from what they do."
t.qarib: My Lord, save me and my family from (the consequence of] what they do
t.wahiduddin: My Lord, save me and my family from their evil doings
t.shakir: My Lord! deliver me and my followers from what they do
t.haleem: Lord, save me and my family from what they are doing.’
t.maariful: My Lord, save me and my family from what they do.”
t.khattab: My Lord! Save me and my family from ˹the consequences of˺ what they do.”
t.ghali: Lord! Deliver me safely and my family from whatever they do
t.irving: My Lord, save me and my family from what they are doing
t.iwq: My Lord, save me and my family from the consequence of what they do

t_id.kemenag: (Luth berdoa): "Ya Tuhanku selamatkanlah aku beserta keluargaku dari (akibat) perbuatan yang mereka kerjakan".
t_id.sabiq: Mendengar jawaban kaumnya, Lûth merasa tidak punya harapan lagi. Ia pun memanjatkan doa kepada Allah agar menyelamatkan dirinya dan keluarganya dari akibat perbuatan bodoh mereka itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ya Rabbku! Selamatkanlah aku beserta keluargaku dari akibat perbuatan yang mereka kerjakan") yakni dari azab yang akan menimpa mereka disebabkan perbuatan itu.
t_id.iwq: (Luth berdoa): "Ya Tuhanku selamatkanlah aku beserta keluargaku dari (akibat) perbuatan yang mereka kerjakan".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «رب نجني وأهلي مما يعلمون» أي من عذابه
tafsir.siraj-ar: رَبِّ نَجِّنِي وَأَهۡلِي مِمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ya Rabbku! Selamatkanlah aku beserta keluargaku dari akibat perbuatan yang mereka kerjakan") yakni dari azab yang akan menimpa mereka disebabkan perbuatan itu

t.sahih-int: So We saved him and his family, all
t.asad: Thereupon We saved him and all his household –
t.yusuf-ali: So We delivered him and his family,- all
t.pickthall: So We saved him and his household, every one
t.arberry: So We delivered him and his people all together
t.hilali-khan: So We saved him and his family, all
t.itani: So We saved him and his family, altogether.
t.mubarakpuri: So, We saved him and his family, all,
t.qarib: So We saved him and his family, all of them
t.wahiduddin: We saved him and all of his family
t.shakir: So We delivered him and his followers all
t.haleem: We saved him and all his family
t.maariful: So We saved him and his family, all of them
t.khattab: So We saved him and all of his family
t.ghali: So We delivered him safely and his family all together
t.irving: So We saved him and his whole family
t.iwq: Thus We saved him and his family, all

t_id.kemenag: Lalu Kami selamatkan ia beserta keluarganya semua,
t_id.sabiq: Allah pun memperkenankan permohonan Lûth untuk menyelamatkannya dan para pengikutnya. Mereka semua diperintahkan untuk meninggalkan rumah-rumah mereka saat akan diturunkan azab kepada orang-orang yang telah mendustakan kebenaran.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Lalu Kami selamatkan ia beserta keluarganya semua).
t_id.iwq: Lalu Kami selamatkan ia beserta keluarganya semua,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فنجيناه وأهله أجمعين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَنَجَّيۡنَٰهُ وَأَهۡلَهُۥٓ أَجۡمَعِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Lalu Kami selamatkan ia beserta keluarganya semua

t.sahih-int: Except an old woman among those who remained behind
t.asad: all but an old woman, who was among those that stayed behind
t.yusuf-ali: Except an old woman who lingered behind
t.pickthall: Save an old woman among those who stayed behind
t.arberry: save an old woman among those that tarried
t.hilali-khan: Except an old woman (his wife) among those who remained behind
t.itani: Except for an old woman among those who tarried.
t.mubarakpuri: Except an old woman among those who remained behind.
t.qarib: except for an old woman who stayed behind
t.wahiduddin: except for an old woman who stayed behind
t.shakir: Except an old woman, among those who remained behind
t.haleem: except for an old woman who stayed behind
t.maariful: except an old woman among those who remained behind
t.khattab: except an old woman, who was one of the doomed
t.ghali: Except an old woman among the laggards
t.irving: except for an old woman among those who stayed behind
t.iwq: Except an old woman among those who remained behind

t_id.kemenag: kecuali seorang perempuan tua (isterinya), yang termasuk dalam golongan yang tinggal.
t_id.sabiq: Kecuali istrinya yang renta. Ia tetap tinggal dan tidak akan keluar bersama Lûth. Maka ia pun binasa karena kekufuran, pengkhianatan dan loyalitasnya terhadap orang-orang yang fasik.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali seorang perempuan tua) yakni istri Nabi Luth sendiri (yang termasuk dalam golongan yang tinggal) orang-orang yang dibinasakan.
t_id.iwq: kecuali seorang perempuan tua (isterinya), yang termasuk dalam golongan yang tinggal.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إلا عجوزا» امرأته «في الغابرين» الباقين أهلكناها
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِلَّا عَجُوزٗا فِي ٱلۡغَٰبِرِينَ (الْغَابِرِينَ: البَاقِينَ فيِ العَذَابِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali seorang perempuan tua) yakni istri Nabi Luth sendiri (yang termasuk dalam golongan yang tinggal) orang-orang yang dibinasakan

t.sahih-int: Then We destroyed the others
t.asad: and then We utterly destroyed the others
t.yusuf-ali: But the rest We destroyed utterly
t.pickthall: Then afterward We destroyed the others
t.arberry: then We destroyed the others
t.hilali-khan: Then afterward We destroyed the others
t.itani: Then We destroyed the others.
t.mubarakpuri: Then afterward We destroyed the others.
t.qarib: Then, We destroyed the others
t.wahiduddin: then We totally destroyed the rest
t.shakir: Then We utterly destroyed the others
t.haleem: then We destroyed the others
t.maariful: Then We destroyed the others
t.khattab: Then We utterly destroyed the rest
t.ghali: Thereafter We destroyed the others
t.irving: Then We annihilated the rest
t.iwq: Then We destroyed the others

t_id.kemenag: Kemudian Kami binasakan yang lain.
t_id.sabiq: Kemudian Allah membinasakan orang-orang kafir yang jahat itu dalam suatu kehancuran yang amat menyeramkan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian Kami binasakan yang lain) yaitu mereka yang tinggal semuanya.
t_id.iwq: Kemudian Kami binasakan yang lain.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ثم دمرنا الآخرين» أهلناهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: ثُمَّ دَمَّرۡنَا ٱلۡأٓخَرِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian Kami binasakan yang lain) yaitu mereka yang tinggal semuanya

ar: وَأَمۡطَرۡنَا عَلَیۡهِم مَّطَرࣰاۖ فَسَاۤءَ مَطَرُ ٱلۡمُنذَرِینَ
ar_simple: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ مَطَرًا ۖ فَسَاءَ مَطَرُ الْمُنْذَرِينَ

t.sahih-int: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones], and evil was the rain of those who were warned
t.asad: and rained down upon them a rain [of destruction]: and dire is such rain upon all who let themselves be warned [to no avail]
t.yusuf-ali: We rained down on them a shower (of brimstone): and evil was the shower on those who were admonished (but heeded not)
t.pickthall: And We rained on them a rain. And dreadful is the rain of those who have been warned
t.arberry: and We rained on them a rain; and evil is the rain of them that are warned
t.hilali-khan: And We rained on them a rain (of torment). And how evil was the rain of those who had been warned
t.itani: And We rained down on them a rain. Dreadful is the rain of those forewarned.
t.mubarakpuri: And We rained on them a rain, and how evil was the rain of those who had been warned!
t.qarib: We poured upon them a rain of destruction. How terrible is such rain on those who had been forewarned
t.wahiduddin: and We poured a rain [of destruction] down upon them -- and how evil was the rain which fell on those who were forewarned
t.shakir: And We rained down upon them a rain, and evil was the rain on those warned
t.haleem: and poured a rain of destruction down upon them. How dreadful that rain was for those who had been forewarned
t.maariful: and subjected them to a terrible rain. So evil was the rain of those who were warned
t.khattab: pouring upon them a rain ˹of brimstone˺. How evil was the rain of those who had been warned
t.ghali: And We rained on them a rain, so odious is the rain of them that are warned
t.irving: We sent a rain down upon them. How evil was such a rain for those who had been warned
t.iwq: And We rained upon them a rain of stones, and evil was the rain of those who were warned

t_id.kemenag: Dan Kami hujani mereka dengan hujan (batu) maka amat jeleklah hujan yang menimpa orang-orang yang telah diberi peringatan itu.
t_id.sabiq: Allah menurunkan hujan batu dari langit kepada kaum yang ganjil ini. Mereka pun akhirnya binasa. Hujan batu itu demikian deras menimpa mereka. Dan hujan ini--yang merupakan bentuk penghancuran terdahsyat--adalah hujan terburuk yang menimpa orang-orang yang diberi peringatan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami hujani mereka dengan hujan) batu sebagai alat untuk membinasakan mereka (maka amat jeleklah hujan yang menimpa orang-orang yang telah diberi peringatan itu) sejelek-jelek hujan adalah hujan yang menimpa mereka itu
t_id.iwq: Dan Kami hujani mereka dengan hujan (batu) maka amat jeleklah hujan yang menimpa orang-orang yang telah diberi peringatan itu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وأمطرنا عليهم مطرا» حجارة من جملة الإهلاك «فساء مطر المنذرين» مطرهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَأَمۡطَرۡنَا عَلَيۡهِم مَّطَرٗاۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلۡمُنذَرِينَ (فَسَاءَ: قَبُحَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami hujani mereka dengan hujan) batu sebagai alat untuk membinasakan mereka (maka amat jeleklah hujan yang menimpa orang-orang yang telah diberi peringatan itu) sejelek-jelek hujan adalah hujan yang menimpa mereka itu

ar: إِنَّ فِی ذَ ٰلِكَ لَءَایَةࣰۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِینَ
ar_simple: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ

t.sahih-int: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
t.asad: In this [story], behold, there is a message [unto men], even though most of them will not believe [in it]
t.yusuf-ali: Verily in this is a Sign: but most of them do not believe
t.pickthall: Lo! herein is indeed a portent, yet most of them are not believers
t.arberry: Surely in that is a sign, yet most of them are not believers
t.hilali-khan: Verily, in this is indeed a sign, yet most of them are not believers
t.itani: Surely in this is a sign, but most of them are not believers.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, in this is indeed a sign, yet most of them are not believers.
t.qarib: There is a sign in this, but most of them will not believe
t.wahiduddin: Surely in this there is a sign: but most of them would not believe
t.shakir: Most surely there is a sign in this, but most of them do not believe
t.haleem: There truly is a sign in this, though most of them will not believe
t.maariful: Surely, in this there is a sign, but most of them are not believers
t.khattab: Surely in this is a sign. Yet most of them would not believe
t.ghali: Surely in that is indeed a sign, and in no way were most of them believers
t.irving: In that is a sign; though most of them are not believers
t.iwq: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers

t_id.kemenag: Sesunguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat bukti-bukti yang nyata. Dan adalah kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya siksa yang Kami timpakan kepada kaum ini merupakan bukti yang menunjukkan kesempurnaan kekuasaan Allah. Tetapi kebanyakan kaummu, Muhammad, tidak mempercayai seruanmu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat bukti-bukti yang nyata, kebanyakan manusia tidak beriman).
t_id.iwq: Sesunguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat bukti-bukti yang nyata. Dan adalah kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن في ذلك لآية وما كان أكثرهم مؤمنين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat bukti-bukti yang nyata, kebanyakan manusia tidak beriman

t.sahih-int: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
t.asad: But, verily, thy Sustainer - He alone - is almighty, a dispenser of grace
t.yusuf-ali: And verily thy Lord is He, the Exalted in Might Most Merciful
t.pickthall: And lo! thy Lord, He is indeed the Mighty, the Merciful
t.arberry: Surely thy Lord, He is the All-mighty, the All-compassionate
t.hilali-khan: And verily! Your Lord, He is indeed the All-Mighty, the Most Merciful
t.itani: Your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful.
t.mubarakpuri: And verily your Lord, He is indeed the All-Mighty, the Most Merciful.
t.qarib: Truly, your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful-to-all
t.wahiduddin: your Lord is the Mighty One, the Merciful
t.shakir: And most surely your Lord is the Mighty, the Merciful
t.haleem: your Lord alone is the Almighty, the Merciful
t.maariful: and indeed your Lord is the Mighty, the Merciful
t.khattab: And your Lord is certainly the Almighty, Most Merciful
t.ghali: And surely your Lord, He is indeed The Ever-Mighty, The Ever-Merciful
t.irving: Yet your Lord is the Powerful, the Merciful
t.iwq: And verily, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu, benar-benar Dialah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu Mahaperkasa dan Maha Penyayang. Dia akan menyiksa orang-orang yang berbuat dosa dan memberi pahala kepada orang-orang yang beriman.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Rabbmu, benar-benar Dia-lah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang).
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu, benar-benar Dialah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإن ربك لهو العزيز الرحيم»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan sesungguhnya Rabbmu, benar-benar Dia-lah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang

t.sahih-int: The companions of the thicket denied the messengers
t.asad: [AND] the dwellers of the wooded dales [of Madyan] gave the lie to [one of God’s] message-bearers
t.yusuf-ali: The Companions of the Wood rejected the messengers
t.pickthall: The dwellers in the wood (of Midian) denied the messengers (of Allah)
t.arberry: The men of the Thicket cried lies to the Envoys
t.hilali-khan: The dwellers of Al-Aiyka [near Madyan (Midian)] belied the Messengers
t.itani: The People of the Woods disbelieved the messengers.
t.mubarakpuri: The companions of Al-Aykah denied the Messengers.
t.qarib: The woods-dwellers denied the Messengers
t.wahiduddin: The dwellers of the forest also rejected the messengers
t.shakir: The dwellers of the thicket gave the lie to the apostles
t.haleem: The forest-dwellers, too, called the messengers liars
t.maariful: The people of Aaikah rejected the messengers
t.khattab: The residents of the Forest rejected the messengers
t.ghali: The companions (i.e., inhabitants) of the Thicket cried lies to the Emissaries
t.irving: The dwellers in the Forest rejected the emissaries
t.iwq: The companions of the thicket denied the messengers

t_id.kemenag: Penduduk Aikah telah mendustakan rasul-rasul;
t_id.sabiq: Inilah kisah Syu'ayb dan penduduk Aykah, penghuni suatu lahan yang dipenuhi dengan pepohonan yang rindang di dekat kota Madyan. Kepada penduduk Aykah ini, Allah telah mengutus Syu'ayb yang juga diutus ke Madyan. Tetapi mereka telah mendustakan seruan rasul mereka. Dengan demikian, mereka--karena kesamaan prinsip dakwah seluruh rasul--berarti telah mengingkari semua risalah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Penduduk Aikah telah mendustakan) dalam satu qiraat Aikati dibaca Laikata; adalah nama sebuah sumber air yang banyak pepohonan di sekitarnya di dekat kota Madyan (Rasul-rasul).
t_id.iwq: Penduduk Aikah telah mendustakan rasul-rasul;

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «كذب أصحاب الأيكة» وفي قراءة بحذف الهمزة وإلقاء حركتها على اللام وفتح الهاء: هي غيضة شجر قرب مدين «المرسلين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: كَذَّبَ أَصۡحَٰبُ لۡـَٔيۡكَةِ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ (أَصْحَابُ الْأَيْكَةِ: أَصْحَابُ الأَرْضِ ذَاتِ الشَّجَرِ المُلْتَفِّ؛ وَهُمْ قَوْمُ شُعَيْبٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Penduduk Aikah telah mendustakan) dalam satu qiraat Aikati dibaca Laikata; adalah nama sebuah sumber air yang banyak pepohonan di sekitarnya di dekat kota Madyan (Rasul-rasul)

ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ شُعَیۡبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ar_simple: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ شُعَيْبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ

t.sahih-int: When Shu'ayb said to them, "Will you not fear Allah
t.asad: when their brother Shu’ayb said unto them: “Will you not be conscious of God
t.yusuf-ali: Behold, Shu'aib said to them: "Will ye not fear (Allah)
t.pickthall: When Shu'eyb said unto them: Will ye not ward off (evil)
t.arberry: when Shuaib said to them, 'Will you not be godfearing
t.hilali-khan: When Shu'aib (Shuaib) said to them: "Will you not fear Allah (and obey Him)
t.itani: When Shuaib said to them, “Do you not fear?
t.mubarakpuri: When Shu`ayb said to them: "Will you not have Taqwa"
t.qarib: When Shu'ayb said to them, "Will you not be mindful of God
t.wahiduddin: Shu'ayb said to them, "Will you not fear God
t.shakir: When Shu'aib said to them: Will you not guard (against evil)
t.haleem: Shuayb said to them, ‘Will you not be mindful of God
t.maariful: when Shu‘aib said to them, “Do you not fear Allah
t.khattab: when Shu’aib said to them, “Will you not fear ˹Allah˺
t.ghali: As Shuaayb said to them, "Will you not be pious
t.irving: when Shuayb said to them: "Will you not perform your duty
t.iwq: When Shu'ayb said to them, "Will you not fear Allah

t_id.kemenag: ketika Syu'aib berkata kepada mereka: "Mengapa kamu tidak bertakwa?,
t_id.sabiq: Ingatkanlah kaummu, wahai Muhammad, tatkala Syu'ayb berkata kepada penduduk Aykah, "Apakah kalian tidak takut kepada Allah dan beriman kepada-Nya?" Dengan segera mereka langsung mendustakannya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ketika Syuaib berkata kepada mereka,) tidak dikatakan saudara mereka, karena Nabi Syuaib bukan berasal dari kalangan mereka ("Mengapa kalian tidak bertakwa?).
t_id.iwq: ketika Syu'aib berkata kepada mereka: "Mengapa kamu tidak bertakwa?,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إذ قال لهم شعيب» لم يقل أخوهم لأنه لم يكن منهم «ألا تتقون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ شُعَيۡبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ketika Syuaib berkata kepada mereka,) tidak dikatakan saudara mereka, karena Nabi Syuaib bukan berasal dari kalangan mereka ("Mengapa kalian tidak bertakwa)

t.sahih-int: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger
t.asad: Behold, I am an apostle [sent by Him] to you, [and therefore] worthy of your trust
t.yusuf-ali: I am to you a messenger worthy of all trust
t.pickthall: Lo! I am a faithful messenger unto you
t.arberry: I am for you a faithful Messenger, so fear you God, and obey you me
t.hilali-khan: I am a trustworthy Messenger to you
t.itani: I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
t.mubarakpuri: "I am a trustworthy Messenger to you."
t.qarib: I am a trustworthy messenger to you
t.wahiduddin: I am a trustworthy messenger to you
t.shakir: Surely I am a faithful apostle to you
t.haleem: I am a faithful messenger to you
t.maariful: I am an honest messenger for you
t.khattab: I am truly a trustworthy messenger to you
t.ghali: Surely I am for you a trustworthy Messenger
t.irving: I am a trustworthy messenger [sent] to you
t.iwq: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang rasul kepercayaan (yang diutus) kepadamu.
t_id.sabiq: "Sesungguhnya aku diutus oleh Tuhan semesta alam kepada kalian untuk menyampaikan petunjuk dan kebenaran. Dan aku terpercaya untuk menyampaikan risalah-Nya ini kepada kalian.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang Rasul kepercayaan yang diutus kepada kalian).
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang rasul kepercayaan (yang diutus) kepadamu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إني لكم رسول أمين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنِّي لَكُمۡ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٞ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Sesungguhnya aku adalah seorang Rasul kepercayaan yang diutus kepada kalian

t.sahih-int: So fear Allah and obey me
t.asad: be, then, conscious of God, and pay heed unto me
t.yusuf-ali: So fear Allah and obey me
t.pickthall: So keep your duty to Allah and obey me
t.arberry: I ask of you no wage for this
t.hilali-khan: So fear Allah, keep your duty to Him, and obey me
t.itani: So fear God, and obey me.
t.mubarakpuri: "So, have Taqwa of Allah, and obey me."
t.qarib: so be mindful of God, and obey me
t.wahiduddin: so fear God, and obey me
t.shakir: Therefore guard against (the punishment of) Allah and obey me
t.haleem: be mindful of God and obey me
t.maariful: So fear Allah and obey me
t.khattab: So fear Allah, and obey me
t.ghali: So be pious to Allah, and obey me
t.irving: so heed God and obey me
t.iwq: Thus fear Allah and obey me

t_id.kemenag: maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku;
t_id.sabiq: Maka waspadalah kalian akan siksa Allah. Patuhilah aku dengan melaksanakan segala perintah Allah dan menyucikan diri kalian dari dosa.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka bertakwalah kalian kepada Allah dan taatlah kalian kepadaku).
t_id.iwq: maka bertakwalah kepada Allah dan taatlah kepadaku;

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فاتقوا الله وأطيعون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Maka bertakwalah kalian kepada Allah dan taatlah kalian kepadaku

ar: وَمَاۤ أَسۡءَلُكُمۡ عَلَیۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِیَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَـٰلَمِینَ
ar_simple: وَمَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ

t.sahih-int: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds
t.asad: “And no reward whatever do I ask of you for it: my reward rests with none but the Sustainer of all the worlds
t.yusuf-ali: No reward do I ask of you for it: my reward is only from the Lord of the Worlds
t.pickthall: And I ask of you no wage for it; my wage is the concern only of the Lord of the Worlds
t.arberry: my wage falls only upon the Lord of all Being
t.hilali-khan: No reward do I ask of you for it (my Message of Islamic Monotheism), my reward is only from the Lord of the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists)
t.itani: I ask of you no payment for it. My payment is only from the Lord of the Worlds.
t.mubarakpuri: "No reward do I ask of you for it; my reward is only from the Lord of Al-`Alamin."
t.qarib: I ask no reward from you for doing this; my reward comes only from the Lord of the worlds
t.wahiduddin: I ask of you no recompense for this; my reward is only with the Lord of the Universe
t.shakir: And I do not ask you any reward for it, my reward is only with the Lord of the worlds
t.haleem: I ask no reward of you, for my only reward is with the Lord of the Worlds
t.maariful: And I do not claim from you any reward for it; my reward is with none but with the Lord of the worlds
t.khattab: I do not ask you for any reward for this ˹message˺. My reward is only from the Lord of all worlds
t.ghali: And in no way do I ask of you any reward for (this); decidedly my reward (falls) upon no one except The Lord of the worlds
t.irving: I do not ask you for any payment for it; my payment only concerns the Lord of the Universe
t.iwq: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from Lord of all worlds

t_id.kemenag: dan aku sekali-kali tidak minta upah kepadamu atas ajakan itu; upahku tidak lain hanyalah dari Tuhan semesta alam.
t_id.sabiq: Aku tidak mengharapkan imbalan apa-apa dari kalian. Imbalanku akan kudapatkan secara utuh--sesuai dengan amal perbuatanku--dari Tuhan semesta alam."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan aku sekali-kali tidak meminta upah kepada kalian atas ajakan itu; tiada lain upahku hanyalah dari Rabb semesta alam).
t_id.iwq: dan aku sekali-kali tidak minta upah kepadamu atas ajakan itu; upahku tidak lain hanyalah dari Tuhan semesta alam.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وما أسألكم عليه من أجر إن» ما «أجري إلا على رب العالمين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan aku sekali-kali tidak meminta upah kepada kalian atas ajakan itu; tiada lain upahku hanyalah dari Rabb semesta alam

ar: ۞ أَوۡفُوا۟ ٱلۡكَیۡلَ وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلۡمُخۡسِرِینَ
ar_simple: ۞ أَوْفُوا الْكَيْلَ وَلَا تَكُونُوا مِنَ الْمُخْسِرِينَ

t.sahih-int: Give full measure and do not be of those who cause loss
t.asad: “[Always] give full measure, and be not among those who [unjustly] cause loss [to others]
t.yusuf-ali: Give just measure, and cause no loss (to others by fraud)
t.pickthall: Give full measure, and be not of those who give less (than the due)
t.arberry: Fill up the measure, and be not cheaters
t.hilali-khan: Give full measure, and cause no loss (to others)
t.itani: Give full measure, and do not cheat.
t.mubarakpuri: "Give full measure, and cause no loss (to others)."
t.qarib: Give full measure, and do not cheat
t.wahiduddin: Give full measure, and cause no loss to others
t.shakir: Give a full measure and be not of those who diminish
t.haleem: Give full measure: do not sell others short
t.maariful: Give full measure, and do not be among those who bring loss to others
t.khattab: Give full measure, and cause no loss ˹to others˺
t.ghali: Fill up the measure, and do not be of them who make others losers
t.irving: Give full measure and do not cause [people] any losses
t.iwq: Give full measure and do not be of those who cause loss

t_id.kemenag: Sempurnakanlah takaran dan janganlah kamu termasuk orang-orang yang merugikan;
t_id.sabiq: Penduduk Aykah itu juga diperintahkan oleh Syu'ayb untuk memberikan timbangan secara utuh, karena pada mereka terdapat kebiasaan memberikan timbangan yang tidak adil dan merugikan orang lain.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sempurnakanlah takaran) genapkanlah (dan janganlah kalian termasuk orang-orang yang merugikan) yakni mengurangi hak-hak orang lain.
t_id.iwq: Sempurnakanlah takaran dan janganlah kamu termasuk orang-orang yang merugikan;

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أوْفوا الكيل» أتموه «ولا تكونوا من المخسرين» الناقصين
tafsir.siraj-ar: ۞أَوۡفُواْ ٱلۡكَيۡلَ وَلَا تَكُونُواْ مِنَ ٱلۡمُخۡسِرِينَ (الْمُخْسِرِينَ: النَّاقِصِينَ لِحُقُوقِ النَّاسِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sempurnakanlah takaran) genapkanlah (dan janganlah kalian termasuk orang-orang yang merugikan) yakni mengurangi hak-hak orang lain

t.sahih-int: And weigh with an even balance
t.asad: and [in all your dealings] weigh with a true balance
t.yusuf-ali: And weigh with scales true and upright
t.pickthall: And weigh with the true balance
t.arberry: and weigh with the straight balance
t.hilali-khan: And weigh with the true and straight balance
t.itani: And weigh with accurate scales.
t.mubarakpuri: "And weigh with the true and straight balance."
t.qarib: Weigh with an even scale
t.wahiduddin: Weigh with correct scales
t.shakir: And weigh (things) with a right balance
t.haleem: Weigh with correct scales
t.maariful: Weigh with an even balance
t.khattab: Weigh with an even balance
t.ghali: And weigh with the straight equitableness
t.irving: Weigh with honest scales
t.iwq: And weigh with an even balance

t_id.kemenag: dan timbanglah dengan timbangan yang lurus.
t_id.sabiq: Syu'ayb melanjutkan, "Dan timbanglah sesuatu dengan timbangan yang sempurna, sehingga orang-orang dapat mengambil haknya secara adil dan benar.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan timbanglah dengan timbangan yang lurus) timbangan yang baik dan tidak berat sebelah.
t_id.iwq: dan timbanglah dengan timbangan yang lurus.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وزنوا بالقسطاس المستقيم» الميزان السوي
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَزِنُواْ بِٱلۡقِسۡطَاسِ ٱلۡمُسۡتَقِيمِ (بِالْقِسْطَاسِ: بِالمِيزَانِ, الْمُسْتَقِيمِ: العَدْلِ السَّوِيِّ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan timbanglah dengan timbangan yang lurus) timbangan yang baik dan tidak berat sebelah

ar: وَلَا تَبۡخَسُوا۟ ٱلنَّاسَ أَشۡیَاۤءَهُمۡ وَلَا تَعۡثَوۡا۟ فِی ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مُفۡسِدِینَ
ar_simple: وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا النَّاسَ أَشْيَاءَهُمْ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا فِي الْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ

t.sahih-int: And do not deprive people of their due and do not commit abuse on earth, spreading corruption
t.asad: and do not deprive people of what is rightfully theirs; and do not act wickedly on earth by spreading corruption
t.yusuf-ali: And withhold not things justly due to men, nor do evil in the land, working mischief
t.pickthall: Wrong not mankind in their goods, and do not evil, making mischief, in the earth
t.arberry: and diminish not the goods of the people, and do not mischief in the earth, working corruption
t.hilali-khan: And defraud not people by reducing their things, nor do evil, making corruption and mischief in the land
t.itani: And do not defraud people of their belongings, and do not work corruption in the land.
t.mubarakpuri: "And defraud not people by reducing their things, nor do evil, making corruption and mischief in the land."
t.qarib: and do not mislead people into thinking that their goods are worth less than their real value, and do not spread corruption on earth
t.wahiduddin: do not defraud people of what is rightfully theirs; and do not spread corruption in the land
t.shakir: And do not wrong men of their things, and do not act corruptly in the earth, making mischief
t.haleem: do not deprive people of what is theirs. Do not spread corruption on earth
t.maariful: and do not make people short of their things, and do not spread disorder in the land as mischief-makers
t.khattab: and do not defraud people of their property. Nor go about spreading corruption in the land
t.ghali: And do not depreciate for mankind (the value) of their things, (i.e., their goods) and do not perpetrate (mischief) in the earth (as) corruptors
t.irving: do not undersell people to cheat them of their things nor storm around the earth in order to spoil matters
t.iwq: And do not deprive people of their due and do not commit abuse on earth, spreading corruption

t_id.kemenag: Dan janganlah kamu merugikan manusia pada hak-haknya dan janganlah kamu merajalela di muka bumi dengan membuat kerusakan;
t_id.sabiq: Janganlah kalian kurangi apa yang menjadi hak orang lain, dan jangan pula membuat kerusakan di muka bumi dengan membunuh, menyamun, melakukan tindak kejahatan dan mengikuti hawa nafsu yang rendah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan janganlah kalian merugikan manusia pada hak-haknya) janganlah kalian mengurangi hak mereka barang sedikit pun (dan janganlah kalian merajalela di muka bumi dengan membuat kerusakan) melakukan pembunuhan dan kerusakan-kerusakan lainnya. Lafal Ta'tsau ini berasal dari 'Atsiya yang artinya membuat kerusakan; dan lafal Mufsidiina merupakan Hal atau kata keterangan keadaan daripada 'Amilnya, yaitu lafal Ta'tsau.
t_id.iwq: Dan janganlah kamu merugikan manusia pada hak-haknya dan janganlah kamu merajalela di muka bumi dengan membuat kerusakan;

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولا تبخسوا الناس أشياءهم» لا تنقصوهم من حقهم شيئا «ولا تعثوْا في الأرض مفسدين» بالقتل وغيره من عَثِيَ بكسر المثلثة أفسد ومفسدين حال مؤكدة لمعنى عاملها
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَا تَبۡخَسُواْ ٱلنَّاسَ أَشۡيَآءَهُمۡ وَلَا تَعۡثَوۡاْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مُفۡسِدِينَ (وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا: لَا تَنْقُصُوا, وَلَا تَعْثَوْا: لَا تُكْثِرُوا الفَسَادَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan janganlah kalian merugikan manusia pada hak-haknya) janganlah kalian mengurangi hak mereka barang sedikit pun (dan janganlah kalian merajalela di muka bumi dengan membuat kerusakan) melakukan pembunuhan dan kerusakan-kerusakan lainnya. Lafal Ta'tsau ini berasal dari 'Atsiya yang artinya membuat kerusakan; dan lafal Mufsidiina merupakan Hal atau kata keterangan keadaan daripada 'Amilnya, yaitu lafal Ta'tsau

t.sahih-int: And fear He who created you and the former creation
t.asad: but be conscious of Him who has created you, just as [He created] those countless generations of old!”
t.yusuf-ali: And fear Him Who created you and (who created) the generations before (you)
t.pickthall: And keep your duty unto Him Who created you and the generations of the men of old
t.arberry: Fear Him who created you, and the generations of the ancients
t.hilali-khan: And fear Him Who created you and the generations of the men of old
t.itani: And fear Him who created you and the masses of old.”
t.mubarakpuri: "And have Taqwa of Him Who created you and the generations of the men of old."
t.qarib: Fear Him who created you and the former generations
t.wahiduddin: Fear Him who created you and those who have gone before you
t.shakir: And guard against (the punishment of) Him who created you and the former nations
t.haleem: Be mindful of God who created you and former generations,’
t.maariful: and be fearful of the One who created you and the former generations.”
t.khattab: And fear the One Who created you and ˹all˺ earlier peoples.”
t.ghali: And be pious to Him Who created you and the earliest crowds
t.irving: Heed Him Who created you and the character of the earliest men
t.iwq: And fear He who created you and the former creation

t_id.kemenag: dan bertakwalah kepada Allah yang telah menciptakan kamu dan umat-umat yang dahulu".
t_id.sabiq: Dan berhati-hatilah akan azab Allah, Tuhan yang telah menciptakan kalian dan umat-umat yang kuat dan sombong sebelum kalian."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan bertakwalah kepada Allah yang telah menciptakan kalian dan makhluk) yakni umat-umat (yang dahulu").
t_id.iwq: dan bertakwalah kepada Allah yang telah menciptakan kamu dan umat-umat yang dahulu".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «واتقوا الذي خلقكم والجبلة» الخليقة «الأولين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَكُمۡ وَٱلۡجِبِلَّةَ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ (وَالْجِبِلَّةَ الْأَوَّلِينَ: الخَلِيقَةَ وَالأُمَمَ المَاضِينَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan bertakwalah kepada Allah yang telah menciptakan kalian dan makhluk) yakni umat-umat (yang dahulu)

t.sahih-int: They said, "You are only of those affected by magic
t.asad: Said they: “Thou art but one of the bewitched
t.yusuf-ali: They said: "Thou art only one of those bewitched
t.pickthall: They said: Thou art but one of the bewitched
t.arberry: They said, 'Thou art merely one of those that are bewitched
t.hilali-khan: They said: "You are only one of those bewitched
t.itani: They said, “You are one of those bewitched.
t.mubarakpuri: They said: "You are only one of those bewitched!"
t.qarib: They said, "You are surely bewitched
t.wahiduddin: They replied, "You are bewitched
t.shakir: They said: You are only of those deluded
t.haleem: but they replied, ‘You are bewitched
t.maariful: They said, “You are but one of the bewitched men
t.khattab: They replied, “You are simply bewitched
t.ghali: They said, "Surely you are only one of the utterly bewitched
t.irving: They said: "You are merely someone bewitched
t.iwq: And they said, "You are only of those affected by magic

t_id.kemenag: Mereka berkata: "Sesungguhnya kamu adalah salah seorang dari orang-orang yang kena sihir,
t_id.sabiq: Mereka berkata, "Kamu hanyalah salah seorang yang dipengaruhi oleh kekuatan sihir, sehingga akal sehatnya menjadi hilang.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata, "Sesungguhnya kamu adalah salah seorang dari orang-orang yang kena sihir).
t_id.iwq: Mereka berkata: "Sesungguhnya kamu adalah salat seorang dari orang-orang yang kena sihir,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا إنما أنت من المسحرين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُسَحَّرِينَ (الْمُسَحَّرِينَ: مَنْ أَصَابَهُمْ سِحْرٌ شَدِيدٌ، فَذَهَبَ بِعُقُولِهِمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Mereka berkata, "Sesungguhnya kamu adalah salah seorang dari orang-orang yang kena sihir

ar: وَمَاۤ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرࣱ مِّثۡلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡكَـٰذِبِینَ
ar_simple: وَمَا أَنْتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِثْلُنَا وَإِنْ نَظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ الْكَاذِبِينَ

t.sahih-int: You are but a man like ourselves, and indeed, we think you are among the liars
t.asad: for thou art nothing but a mortal like ourselves! And, behold, we think that thou art a consummate liar
t.yusuf-ali: Thou art no more than a mortal like us, and indeed we think thou art a liar
t.pickthall: Thou art but a mortal like us, and lo! we deem thee of the liars
t.arberry: thou art naught but a mortal, like us; indeed, we think that thou art one of the liars
t.hilali-khan: You are but a human being like us and verily, we think that you are one of the liars
t.itani: And you are nothing but a man like us; and we think that you are a liar.
t.mubarakpuri: "You are but a human being like us and verily, we think that you are one of the liars!"
t.qarib: You are a man like us, and we think you are a liar
t.wahiduddin: You are only a human being like ourselves. Indeed we think you are a liar
t.shakir: And you are naught but a mortal like ourselves, and we know you to be certainly of the liars
t.haleem: You are nothing but a man like us. In fact we think you are a liar
t.maariful: You are no more than a human like us, and in fact we consider you to be one of the liars
t.khattab: Also, you are only a human being like us, and we think you are indeed a liar
t.ghali: And in no way are you (anything) except a mortal, like us, and decidedly we surmise that you are indeed one of the liars
t.irving: You are only a human being like ourselves, and we think you are a liar
t.iwq: You are but a man like ourselves, and verily, we think you are among the liars

t_id.kemenag: dan kamu tidak lain melainkan seorang manusia seperti kami, dan sesungguhnya kami yakin bahwa kamu benar-benar termasuk orang-orang yang berdusta.
t_id.sabiq: Lagi pula kamu adalah manusia biasa seperti kami. Mengapa kamu merasa lebih istimewa dari kami untuk menyampaikan risalah? Kami yakin kamu tidak lain hanyalah salah seorang pembohong besar.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan kamu tidak lain hanyalah seorang manusia seperti kami, dan sesungguhnya) lafal In di sini adalah bentuk Takhfif daripada Inna, sedangkan isimnya tidak disebutkan, lengkapnya berasal dari Innahuu (kami yakin bahwa kamu benar-benar termasuk orang-orang yang berdusta).
t_id.iwq: dan kamu tidak lain melainkan seorang manusia seperti kami, dan sesungguhnya kami yakin bahwa kamu benar-benar termasuk orang-orang yang berdusta.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وما أنت إلا بشر مثلنا وإن» مخففة من الثقيلة واسمها محذوف أي إنه «نظنك لمن الكاذبين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٞ مِّثۡلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡكَٰذِبِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan kamu tidak lain hanyalah seorang manusia seperti kami, dan sesungguhnya) lafal In di sini adalah bentuk Takhfif daripada Inna, sedangkan isimnya tidak disebutkan, lengkapnya berasal dari Innahuu (kami yakin bahwa kamu benar-benar termasuk orang-orang yang berdusta)

ar: فَأَسۡقِطۡ عَلَیۡنَا كِسَفࣰا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَاۤءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِینَ
ar_simple: فَأَسْقِطْ عَلَيْنَا كِسَفًا مِنَ السَّمَاءِ إِنْ كُنْتَ مِنَ الصَّادِقِينَ

t.sahih-int: So cause to fall upon us fragments of the sky, if you should be of the truthful
t.asad: Cause, then, fragments of the sky to fall down upon us, if thou art a man of truth!”
t.yusuf-ali: Now cause a piece of the sky to fall on us, if thou art truthful
t.pickthall: Then make fragments of the heaven fall upon us, if thou art of the truthful
t.arberry: Then drop down on us lumps from heaven, if thou art one of the truthful
t.hilali-khan: So cause a piece of the heaven to fall on us, if you are of the truthful
t.itani: So bring down on us pieces from the sky, if you are truthful.”
t.mubarakpuri: "So, cause a piece of the heaven to fall on us, if you are of the truthful!"
t.qarib: Make a fragment of the sky fall on us, if you are telling the truth
t.wahiduddin: So cause a fragment of the sky to fall on us, if you are truthful
t.shakir: Therefore cause a portion of the heaven to come down upon us, if you are one of the truthful
t.haleem: Make bits of the heavens fall down on us, if you are telling the truth.’
t.maariful: So cause a piece from the sky to fall down upon us, if you are one of the truthful.”
t.khattab: So cause ˹deadly˺ pieces of the sky to fall upon us, if what you say is true.”
t.ghali: So let fall down on us lumps from the heaven, in case you are of the sincere
t.irving: Let a piece fall out of the sky on us if you are so truthful
t.iwq: Thus cause to fall upon us fragments of the sky, if you should be of the truthful

t_id.kemenag: Maka jatuhkanlah atas kami gumpalan dari langit, jika kamu termasuk orang-orang yang benar.
t_id.sabiq: Jika kamu benar-benar membawa risalah, mengapa tidak dijatuhkan kepada kami suatu bentuk azab dari langit?" Demikianlah, permintaan ini menyiratkan betapa kukuhnya pengingkaran mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka jatuhkanlah atas kami gumpalan) dapat dibaca Kasafan dan Kisfan, artinya gumpalan-gumpalan (dari langit, jika kamu termasuk orang-orang yang benar") dalam pengakuan risalahmu itu.
t_id.iwq: Maka jatuhkanlah atas kami gumpalan dari langit, jika kamu termasuk orang-orang yang benar.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فأسقط علينا كسْفا» بسكون السين وفتحها قطعا «من السماء إن كنت من الصادقين» في رسالتك
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَأَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسَفٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ (كِسَفًا: قِطَعًا مِنَ العَذَابِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka jatuhkanlah atas kami gumpalan) dapat dibaca Kasafan dan Kisfan, artinya gumpalan-gumpalan (dari langit, jika kamu termasuk orang-orang yang benar") dalam pengakuan risalahmu itu

t.sahih-int: He said, "My Lord is most knowing of what you do
t.asad: Answered [Shu’ayb]: “My Sustainer knows fully well what you are doing.”
t.yusuf-ali: He said: "My Lord knows best what ye do
t.pickthall: He said: My Lord is Best Aware of what ye do
t.arberry: He said, 'My Lord knows very well what you are doing
t.hilali-khan: He said: "My Lord is the Best Knower of what you do
t.itani: He said, “My Lord is Well Aware of what you do.”
t.mubarakpuri: He said: "My Lord is the Best Knower of what you do."
t.qarib: He said, "My Lord knows best what you are doing
t.wahiduddin: He said, "My Lord has full knowledge of all your actions
t.shakir: He said: My Lord knows best what you do
t.haleem: He said, ‘My Lord knows best what you do.’
t.maariful: He said, “My Lord knows well what you do.”
t.khattab: Shu’aib responded, “My Lord knows best whatever you do.”
t.ghali: He said, "My Lord knows best whatever you do
t.irving: He said: "My Lord is quite Aware of what you are doing
t.iwq: And he said, "My Lord is most knowing of what you do

t_id.kemenag: Syu'aib berkata: "Tuhanku lebih mengetahui apa yang kamu kerjakan".
t_id.sabiq: Syu'ayb berkata, "Tuhanku Maha Mengetahui kemaksiatan yang kalian lakukan, dan kalian berhak mendapatkan azab. Dia akan menimpakan azab itu kepada kalian pada saat yang telah ditentukan." Ucapan ini mencerminkan kepasrahan Syu'ayb kepada Allah. Tujuannya tidak lain untuk memperingatkan mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Syuaib berkata, "Rabbku lebih mengetahui apa yang kalian kerjakan") maka Dia kelak akan membalasnya kepada kalian.
t_id.iwq: Syu'aib berkata: "Tuhanku lebih mengetahui apa yang kamu kerjakan".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال ربي أعلم بما تعملون» فيجازيكم به
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ رَبِّيٓ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Syuaib berkata, "Rabbku lebih mengetahui apa yang kalian kerjakan") maka Dia kelak akan membalasnya kepada kalian

ar: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمۡ عَذَابُ یَوۡمِ ٱلظُّلَّةِۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَذَابَ یَوۡمٍ عَظِیمٍ
ar_simple: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمِ الظُّلَّةِ ۚ إِنَّهُ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ

t.sahih-int: And they denied him, so the punishment of the day of the black cloud seized them. Indeed, it was the punishment of a terrible day
t.asad: But they gave him the lie. And thereupon suffering overtook them on a day dark with shadows: and, verily, it was the suffering of an awesome day
t.yusuf-ali: But they rejected him. Then the punishment of a day of overshadowing gloom seized them, and that was the Penalty of a Great Day
t.pickthall: But they denied him, so there came on them the retribution of the day of gloom. Lo! it was the retribution of an awful day
t.arberry: But they cried him lies; then there seized them the chastisement of the Day of Shadow; assuredly it was the chastisement of a dreadful day
t.hilali-khan: But they belied him, so the torment of the day of shadow (a gloomy cloud) seized them, indeed that was the torment of a Great Day
t.itani: But they denied him. So the punishment of the day of gloom gripped them. It was the punishment of a great day.
t.mubarakpuri: But they denied him, so the torment of the Day of Shadow (a gloomy cloud) seized them. Indeed that was the torment of a Great Day.
t.qarib: But they did not believe him, and the punishment of the day of shadow seized them truly, the punishment of a terrible day
t.wahiduddin: They rejected him, and then had to suffer the punishment of a day of overshadowing gloom. That was indeed the punishment of an awful day
t.shakir: But they called him a liar, so the punishment of the day of covering overtook them; surely it was the punishment of a grievous day
t.haleem: They called him a liar, and so the torment of the Day of Shadow came upon them- it was the torment of a terrible day
t.maariful: Thus they rejected him, so they were seized by the torment of the Day of Canopy. Indeed it was the punishment of a terrible day
t.khattab: So they rejected him, and ˹so˺ were overtaken by the torment of the day of the ˹deadly˺ cloud. That was really a torment of a tremendous day
t.ghali: Yet they cried him lies; then the torment of the Day of the Overshadowing took them (away); surely it was the torment of a Tremendous Day
t.irving: So they rejected him, and the torment of a gloomy day gripped them; it was the torment of a terrible day
t.iwq: And they denied him, so the punishment of the day of the black cloud seized them. Indeed, it was the punishment of a terrible day

t_id.kemenag: Kemudian mereka mendustakan Syu'aib, lalu mereka ditimpa azab pada hari mereka dinaungi awan. Sesungguhnya azab itu adalah azab hari yang besar.
t_id.sabiq: Akan tetapi, mereka tetap bersikukuh mendustakan Syu'ayb. Lalu Allah menurunkan kepada mereka cuaca yang sangat panas, sehingga membuat mereka berlarian tanpa membawa naungan apa-apa. Tatkala mereka semua berkumpul di bawah naungan awan, Allah menimpakan kepada mereka gumpalan-gumpalan api. Mereka pun binasa di hari yang luar biasa dahsyat itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian mereka mendustakan Syuaib, lalu mereka ditimpa azab pada hari mereka dinaungi awan) yakni awan yang menaungi mereka sesudah hari yang panas sekali, kemudian awan itu menurunkan hujan api kepada mereka sehingga terbakarlah mereka semuanya (sesungguhnya azab itu adalah azab hari yang besar).
t_id.iwq: Kemudian mereka mendustakan Syu'aib, lalu mereka ditimpa azab pada hari mereka dinaungi awan. Sesungguhnya azab itu adalah azab hari yang besar.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فكذبوه فأخذهم عذاب يوم الظلة» هي سحابة أظلتهم بعد حر شديد أصابهم فأمطرت عليهم نارا فاحترقوا «إنه كان عذاب يوم عظيم»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمۡ عَذَابُ يَوۡمِ ٱلظُّلَّةِۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمٍ (الظُّلَّةِ: سَحَابَةٍ أَظَلَّتْهُمْ وَجَدُوا تَحْتَهَا بَرْدًا، فَلمَّا اجْتَمَعُوا أَحْرَقَتْهُمْ بِنَارِهَا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian mereka mendustakan Syuaib, lalu mereka ditimpa azab pada hari mereka dinaungi awan) yakni awan yang menaungi mereka sesudah hari yang panas sekali, kemudian awan itu menurunkan hujan api kepada mereka sehingga terbakarlah mereka semuanya (sesungguhnya azab itu adalah azab hari yang besar)

ar: إِنَّ فِی ذَ ٰلِكَ لَءَایَةࣰۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِینَ
ar_simple: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ

t.sahih-int: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
t.asad: In this [story], behold, there is a message [unto men], even though most of them will not believe [in it]
t.yusuf-ali: Verily in that is a Sign: but most of them do not believe
t.pickthall: Lo! herein is indeed a portent; yet most of them are not believers
t.arberry: Surely in that is a sign, yet most of them are not believers
t.hilali-khan: Verily, in this is indeed a sign, yet most of them are not believers
t.itani: Surely in this is a sign, but most of them are not believers.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, in this is indeed a sign, yet most of them are not believers.
t.qarib: There is a sign in this, but most of them will not believe
t.wahiduddin: Surely, in this is indeed a sign; but most of them would not believe
t.shakir: Most surely there is a sign in this, but most of them do not believe
t.haleem: There truly is a sign in this, though most of them will not believe
t.maariful: Surely, in this there is a sign, but most of them are not believers
t.khattab: Surely in this is a sign. Yet most of them would not believe
t.ghali: Surely in that is indeed a sign, and in no way were most of them believers
t.irving: In that is a sign, though most of them are not believers
t.iwq: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda (kekuasaan Allah), tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya azab yang diturunkan kepada penduduk Aykah yang membangkang itu merupakan bukti kemahakuasaan Allah. Tetapi kebanyakan kaummu, Muhammad, tidak meyakininya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda kekuasaan Allah, tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman).
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda (kekuasaan Allah), tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن في ذلك لآية وما كان أكثرهم مؤمنين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda kekuasaan Allah, tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak beriman

t.sahih-int: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful

t.arberry: Surely thy Lord, He is the All-mighty, the All-compassionate
t.hilali-khan: And verily! Your Lord, He is indeed the All-Mighty, the Most Merciful
t.itani: Your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful.
t.mubarakpuri: And verily your Lord, He is indeed the All-Mighty, the Most Merciful.
t.qarib: Truly your Lord is the Almighty, the Merciful-to-all

t.irving: Yet your Lord is the Powerful, the Merciful

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu benar-benar Dialah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu Mahaesa dalam kekuatan dan kemenangan. Dan Dia Maha Pengasih kepada orang-orang yang beriman.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Rabbmu benar-benar Dia-lah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang).
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu benar-benar Dialah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang.

tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan sesungguhnya Rabbmu benar-benar Dia-lah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Al Quran ini benar-benar diturunkan oleh Tuhan semesta alam,
t_id.sabiq: Dan sesungguhnya al-Qur'ân, yang telah memaparkan kisah-kisah yang benar-benar terjadi ini, diturunkan oleh Sang Pencipta, Penguasa dan Pemelihara alam semesta. Maka berita al-Qur'ân itu adalah benar, dan hukumnya terus berlaku hingga hari kiamat nanti.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya ia) yakni Alquran ini (benar-benar diturunkan oleh Rabb semesta alam).
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya Al Al-Quran ini benar-benar diturunkan oleh Tuhan semesta alam,

tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya ia) yakni Alquran ini (benar-benar diturunkan oleh Rabb semesta alam)

t_id.sabiq: Al-Qur'ân itu diturunkan lewat perantaraan al-Rûh al-Amîn, Jibril a. s.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan dibawa turun oleh Ruhul Amin) yakni malaikat Jibril.
t_id.iwq: dia dibawa turun oleh Ar-Ruh Al-Amin (Jibril),

t.iwq: Upon your heart, O Muhammad - that you may be of the warners

t_id.kemenag: ke dalam hatimu (Muhammad) agar kamu menjadi salah seorang di antara orang-orang yang memberi peringatan,
t_id.sabiq: Jibrîl menurunkannya ke dalam hatimu sehingga kamu dapat memelihara dan memahaminya, dan sehingga al-Qur'ân itu tertancap kuat di dalam hatimu yang tak mungkin bisa terlupakan. Dengan demikian, kamu--lewat kandungan al-Qur'ân--dapat memberi peringatan akan akibat yang didapatkan oleh orang-orang yang mengingkari kebenaran.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ke dalam kalbumu agar kamu menjadi salah seorang di antara orang-orang yang memberi peringatan).
t_id.iwq: ke dalam hatimu (Muhammad) agar kamu menjadi salat seorang di antara orang-orang yang memberi peringatan,

tafsir.jalalayn-id: Ke dalam kalbumu agar kamu menjadi salah seorang di antara orang-orang yang memberi peringatan

t_id.kemenag: dengan bahasa Arab yang jelas.
t_id.sabiq: Al-Qur'ân itu diturunkan kepadamu melalui Jibrîl dalam bahasa Arab yang jelas makna dan petunjuknya, agar manusia mendapatkan kebaikan, baik agama maupun dunia.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dengan bahasa Arab yang jelas) yang terang. Dan menurut qiraat yang lain lafal Nazala dibaca Nazzala dan lafal Ar Ruuhu dibaca Ar Ruuha, sedangkan yang menjadi Fa'ilnya adalah Allah. Maksudnya, Alquran itu diturunkan oleh Allah melalui Ruhul Amin.
t_id.iwq: dengan bahasa Arab yang jelas.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «بلسان عربي مبين» بيَّن وفي قراءة بتشديد نزل ونصب الروح والفاعل الله
tafsir.siraj-ar: بِلِسَانٍ عَرَبِيّٖ مُّبِينٖ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dengan bahasa Arab yang jelas) yang terang. Dan menurut qiraat yang lain lafal Nazala dibaca Nazzala dan lafal Ar Ruuhu dibaca Ar Ruuha, sedangkan yang menjadi Fa'ilnya adalah Allah. Maksudnya, Alquran itu diturunkan oleh Allah melalui Ruhul Amin

t.sahih-int: And indeed, it is [mentioned] in the scriptures of former peoples
t.asad: And, verily, [the essence of] this [revelation] is indeed found in the ancient books of divine wisdom [as well]
t.yusuf-ali: Without doubt it is (announced) in the mystic Books of former peoples
t.pickthall: And lo! it is in the Scriptures of the men of old
t.arberry: Truly it is in the Scriptures of the ancients
t.hilali-khan: And verily, it (the Quran, and its revelation to Prophet Muhammad SAW) is (announced) in the Scriptures [i.e. the Taurat (Torah) and the Injeel (Gospel)] of former people
t.itani: And it is in the scriptures of the ancients.
t.mubarakpuri: And verily, it is in the Zubur of the former people.
t.qarib: It is mentioned in the scriptures of the ancients
t.wahiduddin: Surely, it is foretold in the ancient scriptures
t.shakir: And most surely the same is in the scriptures of the ancients
t.haleem: This was foretold in the scriptures of earlier religions
t.maariful: And of course, it is (mentioned) in the Scriptures of the former people
t.khattab: And it has indeed been ˹foretold˺ in the Scriptures of those before
t.ghali: And surely it is indeed in the Scriptures (Literally: Zubur, i.e. the Psalms) of the earliest (people)
t.irving: It [can be found] in the Psalms of early men
t.iwq: And indeed, it is mentioned in the scriptures of former peoples

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Al Quran itu benar-benar (tersebut) dalam Kitab-kitab orang yang dahulu.
t_id.sabiq: Dan sesungguhnya berita tentang al-Qur'ân yang diturunkan dari sisi Allah kepada Muhammad saw. ini telah termaktub dalam kitab suci-kitab suci para nabi sebelumnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya) mengenai Alquran yang diturunkan kepada Muhammad itu (benar-benar tersebut dalam kitab-kitab) yakni kitab-kitab suci (orang-orang dahulu) seperti kitab Taurat dan kitab Injil.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya Al Al-Quran itu benar-benar (tersebut) dalam Kitab-kitab orang yang dahulu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإنه» ذكر القرآن المنزل على محمد «لفي زُبُر» كتب «الأولين» كالتوراة والإنجيل
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَفِي زُبُرِ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ (زُبُرِ الْأَوَّلِينَ: كُتُبِ الأَنْبِيَاءِ السَّابِقِينَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya) mengenai Alquran yang diturunkan kepada Muhammad itu (benar-benar tersebut dalam kitab-kitab) yakni kitab-kitab suci (orang-orang dahulu) seperti kitab Taurat dan kitab Injil

ar: أَوَ لَمۡ یَكُن لَّهُمۡ ءَایَةً أَن یَعۡلَمَهُۥ عُلَمَـٰۤؤُا۟ بَنِیۤ إِسۡرَ ٰۤءِیلَ
ar_simple: أَوَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُمْ آيَةً أَنْ يَعْلَمَهُ عُلَمَاءُ بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ

t.sahih-int: And has it not been a sign to them that it is recognized by the scholars of the Children of Israel
t.asad: Is it not evidence enough for them that [so many] learned men from among the children of Israel have recognized this [as true]
t.yusuf-ali: Is it not a Sign to them that the Learned of the Children of Israel knew it (as true)
t.pickthall: Is it not a token for them that the doctors of the Children of Israel know it
t.arberry: Was it not a sign for them, that it is known to the learned of the Children of Israel
t.hilali-khan: Is it not a sign to them that the learned scholars (like 'Abdullah bin Salam who embraced Islam) of the Children of Israel knew it (as true)
t.itani: Is it not a sign for them that the scholars of the Children of Israel recognized it?
t.mubarakpuri: Is it not a sign to them that the learned scholars of the Children of Israel knew it
t.qarib: Is it not a sign that the scholars of the Children of Israel knew it
t.wahiduddin: Is it not evidence enough for them that the learned among the Children of Israel have recognized this [as true]
t.shakir: Is it not a sign to them that the learned men of the Israelites know it
t.haleem: Is it not proof enough for them that the learned men of the Children of Israel have recognized it
t.maariful: Is it not a proof for them that the knowledgeable of the children of Isrā’īl recognize him (the prophet)
t.khattab: Was it not sufficient proof for the deniers that it has been recognized by the knowledgeable among the Children of Israel
t.ghali: And was it not a sign for them, that it is known to the men of knowledge of the Seeds (Or: sons) of ? Israel
t.irving: Do they not have a sign since the scholars Children of Israel knew about it
t.iwq: And has it not been a sign to them that it is recognized by the scholars of the Children of Israel

t_id.kemenag: Dan apakah tidak cukup menjadi bukti bagi mereka, bahwa para ulama Bani Israil mengetahuinya?
t_id.sabiq: Dari itu, adakah para pembangkang masih bersikeras mengingkari al-Qur'ân? Padahal mereka, sebenarnya, memiliki bukti yang membenarkan Muhammad saw. melalui pengetahuan para cerdik pandai Banû Isrâ'îl, bahwa--seperti termaktub dalam kitab suci mereka--al-Qur'ân benar-benar akan diturunkan kepadanya (Muhammad).
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan apakah tidak cukup bagi mereka) orang-orang kafir Mekah (sebagai suatu bukti) yang menunjukkan hal tersebut (bahwa para ulama Bani Israel mengetahuinya?) seperti Abdullah ibnu Salam dan pengikut-pengikutnya yang beriman kepada Muhammad, maka sesungguhnya mereka memberitakan hal tersebut. Kalau dibaca Yakun maka dibaca Ayatan; dan kalau dibaca Takun maka dibaca Ayatun.
t_id.iwq: Dan apakah tidak cukup menjadi bukti bagi mereka, bahwa para ulama Bani Israil mengetahuinya?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أو لم يكن لهم» لكفار مكة «آية» على ذلك «أن يعلمه علماء بني إسرائيل» كعبد الله بن سلام وأصحابه من الذين آمنوا فإنهم يخبرون بذلك، ويكن بالتحتانية ونصب آية وبالفوقانية ورفع آية
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَوَلَمۡ يَكُن لَّهُمۡ ءَايَةً أَن يَعۡلَمَهُۥ عُلَمَـٰٓؤُاْ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ (آيَةً: عَلَامَةً عَلَى صِحَّةِ نُبُوَّتِكَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan apakah tidak cukup bagi mereka) orang-orang kafir Mekah (sebagai suatu bukti) yang menunjukkan hal tersebut (bahwa para ulama Bani Israel mengetahuinya?) seperti Abdullah ibnu Salam dan pengikut-pengikutnya yang beriman kepada Muhammad, maka sesungguhnya mereka memberitakan hal tersebut. Kalau dibaca Yakun maka dibaca Ayatan; dan kalau dibaca Takun maka dibaca Ayatun

t.haleem: If We had sent it down to someone who was not an Arab
t.maariful: Even if We had revealed it to a Non-Arab
t.khattab: Had We revealed it to a non-Arab
t.ghali: And if We had been sending it down on some non-Arabs
t.irving: If We had sent it down to some outsider

t_id.kemenag: Dan kalau Al Quran itu Kami turunkan kepada salah seorang dari golongan bukan Arab,
t_id.sabiq: Kalaupun, umapamanya, al-Qur'ân diturunkan kepada beberapa orang non Arab yang dapat berbicara bahasa Arab, meskipun tidak fasih, yang mustahil dituduh dapat membuat al-Qur'ân,
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan kalau Alquran itu Kami turunkan kepada salah seorang dari golongan bukan Arab) lafal A'jamiina adalah bentuk jamak dari lafal A'jam.
t_id.iwq: Dan kalau Al Al-Quran itu Kami turunkan kepada salat seorang dari golongan bukan Arab,

tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَوۡ نَزَّلۡنَٰهُ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضِ ٱلۡأَعۡجَمِينَ (الْأَعْجَمِينَ: الَّذِينَ لَا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ العَرَبِيَّةَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan kalau Alquran itu Kami turunkan kepada salah seorang dari golongan bukan Arab) lafal A'jamiina adalah bentuk jamak dari lafal A'jam

ar_simple: فَقَرَأَهُ عَلَيْهِمْ مَا كَانُوا بِهِ مُؤْمِنِينَ
