t_id.kemenag: lalu ia membacakannya kepada mereka (orang-orang kafir); niscaya mereka tidak akan beriman kepadanya.
t_id.sabiq: lalu ia membacakan kepada mereka--dan ini merupakan kejadian luar biasa--dengan bacaan yang benar, niscaya mereka akan tetap mengingkarinya. Mereka akan terus mencari-cari alasan untuk mempertahankan pengingkaran mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Lalu ia membacakannya kepada mereka) yakni kepada orang-orang kafir Mekah (niscaya mereka tidak akan beriman kepadanya) karena enggan untuk mengikutinya.
t_id.iwq: lalu ia membacakannya kepada mereka (orang-orang kafir); niscaya mereka tidak akan beriman kepadanya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فقرأه عليهم» كفار مكة «ما كانوا به مؤمنين» أنفة من اتباعه
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَقَرَأَهُۥ عَلَيۡهِم مَّا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ مُؤۡمِنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Lalu ia membacakannya kepada mereka) yakni kepada orang-orang kafir Mekah (niscaya mereka tidak akan beriman kepadanya) karena enggan untuk mengikutinya

t.sahih-int: Thus have We inserted disbelief into the hearts of the criminals
t.asad: Thus have We caused this [message] to pass [unheeded] through the hearts of those who are lost in sin
t.yusuf-ali: Thus have We caused it to enter the hearts of the sinners
t.pickthall: Thus do We make it traverse the hearts of the guilty
t.arberry: Even so We have caused it to enter into the hearts of the sinners
t.hilali-khan: Thus have We caused it (the denial of the Quran) to enter the hearts of the Mujrimun (criminals, polytheists, sinners, etc)
t.itani: Thus We make it pass through the hearts of the guilty.
t.mubarakpuri: Thus have We caused it to enter the hearts of the criminals.
t.qarib: This is how We make it go unheeded through the hearts of those who force others to reject Our messages
t.wahiduddin: We have thus caused denial of truth to enter into the hearts of the sinners
t.shakir: Thus have We caused it to enter into the hearts of the guilty
t.haleem: So We make it pass straight through the hearts of the guilty
t.maariful: This is how We have made it pass through the hearts of the sinners
t.khattab: This is how We allow denial ˹to steep˺ into the hearts of the wicked
t.ghali: Thus We have inserted it into the hearts of the criminals
t.irving: Despite that, We slip it into criminals´ hearts
t.iwq: Thus have We inserted disbelief into the hearts of the criminals

t_id.kemenag: Demikianlah Kami masukkan Al Quran ke dalam hati orang-orang yang durhaka.
t_id.sabiq: Pendustaan telah Kami masukkan dan tetapkan ke dalam hati mereka, juga kepada orang-orang yang mempunyai sifat yang sama seperti mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Demikianlah), sebagaimana Kami masukkan dusta ke dalam hati mereka jika Alquran diturunkan dengan bahasa Ajam (Kami masukkan Alquran) maksudnya, Kami masukkan dusta pula terhadap Alquran (ke dalam hati orang-orang yang durhaka) maksudnya orang-orang kafir Mekah tidak mempercayainya bila Nabi saw. membacakannya.
t_id.iwq: Demikianlah Kami masukkan Al Al-Quran ke dalam hati orang-orang yang durhaka.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «كذلك» أي مثل إدخالنا التكذيب به بقراءة الأعجمي «سلكناه» أدخلنا التكذيب به «في قلوب المجرمين» كفار مكة بقراءة النبي
tafsir.siraj-ar: كَذَٰلِكَ سَلَكۡنَٰهُ فِي قُلُوبِ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ (سَلَكْنَاهُ: أَدْخَلْنَا التَّكْذِيبَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Demikianlah), sebagaimana Kami masukkan dusta ke dalam hati mereka jika Alquran diturunkan dengan bahasa Ajam (Kami masukkan Alquran) maksudnya, Kami masukkan dusta pula terhadap Alquran (ke dalam hati orang-orang yang durhaka) maksudnya orang-orang kafir Mekah tidak mempercayainya bila Nabi saw. membacakannya

ar: لَا یُؤۡمِنُونَ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ یَرَوُا۟ ٱلۡعَذَابَ ٱلۡأَلِیمَ
ar_simple: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُا الْعَذَابَ الْأَلِيمَ

t.sahih-int: They will not believe in it until they see the painful punishment
t.asad: they will not believe in it till they behold the grievous suffering
t.yusuf-ali: They will not believe in it until they see the grievous Penalty
t.pickthall: They will not believe in it till they behold the painful doom
t.arberry: who will not believe in it, until they see the painful chastisement
t.hilali-khan: They will not believe in it until they see the painful torment
t.itani: They will not believe in it until they witness the painful punishment.
t.mubarakpuri: They will not believe in it until they see the painful torment.
t.qarib: they will not believe until they see the painful punishment
t.wahiduddin: they will not believe in it until they see the grievous punishment
t.shakir: They will not believe in it until they see the painful punishment
t.haleem: they will not believe in it until they see the grievous torment
t.maariful: They will not believe in it until they will see the painful punishment
t.khattab: They will not believe in it until they see the painful punishment
t.ghali: They (will) not believe in it until they see the painful torment
t.irving: They will not believe in it until they see painful torment
t.iwq: And they will not believe in it until they see the painful punishment

t_id.kemenag: Mereka tidak beriman kepadanya, hingga mereka melihat azab yang pedih,
t_id.sabiq: Tidak ada cara lain untuk mengubah pengingkaran yang ada pada mereka kecuali mereka lihat sendiri betapa pedihnya azab yang mengancam mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka tidak beriman kepadanya, hingga mereka melihat azab yang pedih).
t_id.iwq: Mereka tidak beriman kepadanya, hingga mereka melihat azab yang pedih,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «لا يؤمنون به حتى يروا العذاب الأليم»
tafsir.siraj-ar: لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُاْ ٱلۡعَذَابَ ٱلۡأَلِيمَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Mereka tidak beriman kepadanya, hingga mereka melihat azab yang pedih

t.sahih-int: And it will come to them suddenly while they perceive [it] not
t.asad: that will come upon them [on resurrection,] all of a sudden, without their being aware [of its approach]
t.yusuf-ali: But the (Penalty) will come to them of a sudden, while they perceive it not
t.pickthall: So that it will come upon them suddenly, when they perceive not
t.arberry: so that it will come upon them suddenly, while they are not aware
t.hilali-khan: It shall come to them of a sudden, while they perceive it not
t.itani: It will come to them suddenly, while they are unaware.
t.mubarakpuri: It shall come to them of a sudden, while they perceive it not.
t.qarib: that will come upon them suddenly, when they do not expect it
t.wahiduddin: It will come upon them suddenly when they are not expecting it
t.shakir: And it shall come to them all of a sudden, while they shall not perceive
t.haleem: which will suddenly hit them when they are not expecting it
t.maariful: and it will come to them suddenly while they will not be anticipating (it)
t.khattab: which will take them by surprise when they least expect ˹it˺
t.ghali: So that it will come up to them suddenly, and they are not aware
t.irving: it will come upon them suddenly while they least suspect it
t.iwq: And it will come to them suddenly while they perceive it not

t_id.kemenag: maka datanglah azab kepada mereka dengan mendadak, sedang mereka tidak menyadarinya,
t_id.sabiq: Maka, secara tiba-tiba dan tanpa diduga, azab itu Kami turunkan kepada mereka. Dan mereka benar- benar tidak menyadari kedatangannya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka datanglah azab kepada mereka dengan mendadak, sedangkan mereka tidak menyadarinya).
t_id.iwq: maka datanglah azab kepada mereka dengan mendadak, sedang mereka tidak menyadarinya,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فيأتيهم بغتة وهم لا يشعرون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَيَأۡتِيَهُم بَغۡتَةٗ وَهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُونَ (بَغْتَةً: فَجْأَةً)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Maka datanglah azab kepada mereka dengan mendadak, sedangkan mereka tidak menyadarinya

t.sahih-int: And they will say, "May we be reprieved
t.asad: and then they will exclaim, “Could we have a respite?”
t.yusuf-ali: Then they will say: "Shall we be respited
t.pickthall: Then they will say: Are we to be reprieved
t.arberry: and they will say, 'Shall we be respited
t.hilali-khan: Then they will say: "Can we be respited
t.itani: Then they will say, “Are we given any respite?”
t.mubarakpuri: Then they will say: "Can we be respited"
t.qarib: They will say, "May we have more time
t.wahiduddin: Then they will exclaim, "Could we have some respite
t.shakir: Then they will say: Shall we be respited
t.haleem: and then they will say, ‘Can we have more time?’
t.maariful: and (then) they will say, “Is it (possible) that we are given some respite?”
t.khattab: Then they will cry, “Can we be allowed more time?”
t.ghali: Then they will say, "will we be respited
t.irving: and so they say: "Will we be allowed to wait
t.iwq: And they will say, "May we be reprieved

t_id.kemenag: lalu mereka berkata: "Apakah kami dapat diberi tangguh?"
t_id.sabiq: Di saat azab itu turun, mereka--dengan perasaan menyesal dan meminta diberi kesempatan lagi--berkata, "Adakah kesempatan lagi untuk kami?" Tetapi permintaan mereka ini akan ditolak.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Lalu mereka berkata, "Apakah kami dapat diberi tangguh?") supaya kami mempunyai kesempatan untuk beriman. Maka dikatakan kepada mereka, "Tidak". Mereka berkata: "Kapankah datangnya azab itu?" Maka Allah swt. berfirman,
t_id.iwq: lalu mereka berkata: "Apakah kami dapat diberi tangguh?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فيقولوا هل نحن منظرون» لنؤمن فيقال لهم: لا قالوا: متى هذا العذاب، قال تعالى
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَيَقُولُواْ هَلۡ نَحۡنُ مُنظَرُونَ (مُنظَرُونَ: مُمْهَلُونَ مُؤَخَّرُونَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Lalu mereka berkata, "Apakah kami dapat diberi tangguh?") supaya kami mempunyai kesempatan untuk beriman. Maka dikatakan kepada mereka, "Tidak". Mereka berkata: "Kapankah datangnya azab itu?" Maka Allah swt. berfirman

t.sahih-int: So for Our punishment are they impatient
t.asad: Do they, then, [really] wish that Our chastisement be hastened on
t.yusuf-ali: Do they then ask for Our Penalty to be hastened on
t.pickthall: Would they (now) hasten on Our doom
t.arberry: What, do they seek to hasten Our chastisement
t.hilali-khan: Would they then wish for Our Torment to be hastened on
t.itani: Do they seek to hasten Our punishment?
t.mubarakpuri: Would they then wish for Our torment to be hastened on
t.qarib: Why do they ask that we hasten Our punishment
t.wahiduddin: Do they want to hasten Our punishment
t.shakir: What! do they still seek to hasten on Our punishment
t.haleem: How can they ask that Our punishment be brought to them sooner
t.maariful: Is it then Our punishment that they are trying to hasten up
t.khattab: Do they ˹really˺ seek to hasten Our torment
t.ghali: So, do they seek to hasten Our torment
t.irving: Are they trying to hasten up Our torment
t.iwq: Thus for Our punishment are they impatient

t_id.kemenag: Maka apakah mereka meminta supaya disegerakan azab Kami?
t_id.sabiq: Allah menjelaskan kedunguan mereka yang ingin mempercepat turunnya azab setelah berkali-kali mendapat peringatan dan ancaman. Allah Swt. berfirman, "Orang-orang kafir Mekah telah tertipu dengan penundaan yang Aku berikan, mengapa mereka ingin cepat-cepat diturunkan azab?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: ("Maka apakah mereka meminta supaya disegerakan azab Kami?).
t_id.iwq: Maka apakah mereka meminta supaya disegerakan azab Kami?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أفبعذابنا يستعجلون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَفَبِعَذَابِنَا يَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Maka apakah mereka meminta supaya disegerakan azab Kami

t.sahih-int: Then have you considered if We gave them enjoyment for years
t.asad: But hast thou ever considered [this]: If We do allow them to enjoy [this life] for some years
t.yusuf-ali: Seest thou? If We do let them enjoy (this life) for a few years
t.pickthall: Hast thou then seen, if We content them for (long) years
t.arberry: What thinkest thou? If We give them enjoyment of days for many years
t.hilali-khan: Tell Me, if We do let them enjoy for years
t.itani: Have you considered: if We let them enjoy themselves for some years.
t.mubarakpuri: Think, if We do let them enjoy for years,
t.qarib: Do you see that, if We gave them years of enjoyment
t.wahiduddin: Think! If We let them enjoy life for some years
t.shakir: Have you then considered if We let them enjoy themselves for years
t.haleem: Think, if we let them enjoy this life for some years
t.maariful: So tell me, if We give them enjoyment for years
t.khattab: Imagine ˹O Prophet˺ if We allowed them enjoyment for years
t.ghali: Then, have you seen, in case We give them enjoyment for (many) years
t.irving: Have you seen how We let them enjoy themselves for years
t.iwq: Then have you considered if We gave them enjoyment for years

t_id.kemenag: Maka bagaimana pendapatmu jika Kami berikan kepada mereka kenikmatan hidup bertahun-tahun,
t_id.sabiq: Pikirkanlah, niscaya kamu akan mengetahui mengapa Kami memberikan kepada mereka kenikmatan hidup bertahun-tahun dengan kehidupan yang laik?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka bagaimana pendapatmu) bagaimana menurutmu (jika Kami berikan kepada mereka kenikmatan hidup bertahun-tahun).
t_id.iwq: Maka bagaimana pendapatmu jika Kami berikan kepada mereka kenikmatan hidup bertahun-tahun,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أفرأيت» أخبرني «إن متَّعناهم سنين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَفَرَءَيۡتَ إِن مَّتَّعۡنَٰهُمۡ سِنِينَ (أَفَرَأَيْتَ: أَفَعَلِمْتَ؟)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka bagaimana pendapatmu) bagaimana menurutmu (jika Kami berikan kepada mereka kenikmatan hidup bertahun-tahun)

t.sahih-int: And then there came to them that which they were promised
t.asad: and thereupon that [chastisement] which they were promised befalls them –
t.yusuf-ali: Yet there comes to them at length the (Punishment) which they were promised
t.pickthall: And then cometh that which they were promised
t.arberry: then there comes on them that they were promised
t.hilali-khan: And afterwards comes to them that (punishment) which they had been promised
t.itani: Then there comes to them what they were promised.
t.mubarakpuri: And afterwards comes to them that which they had been promised.
t.qarib: then inflicted the punishment as promised
t.wahiduddin: and then the promised punishment fell upon them
t.shakir: Then there comes to them that with which they are threatened
t.haleem: and then the promised torment came upon them
t.maariful: then comes to them what they are warned of
t.khattab: then there came to them what they had been threatened with
t.ghali: Thereafter (there) comes to them what they have been promised
t.irving: then whatever they have been threatened with, comes to them
t.iwq: And then there came to them that which they were promised

t_id.kemenag: Kemudian datang kepada mereka azab yang telah diancamkan kepada mereka,
t_id.sabiq: Lalu Kami menurunkan kepada mereka azab yang pedih yang telah diperingatkan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian datang kepada mereka azab yang telah diancamkan kepada mereka).
t_id.iwq: Kemudian datang kepada mereka azab yang telah diancamkan kepada mereka,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ثم جاءهم ما كانوا يوعدون» من العذاب
tafsir.siraj-ar: ثُمَّ جَآءَهُم مَّا كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Kemudian datang kepada mereka azab yang telah diancamkan kepada mereka

ar: مَاۤ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنۡهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ یُمَتَّعُونَ
ar_simple: مَا أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُمْ مَا كَانُوا يُمَتَّعُونَ

t.sahih-int: They would not be availed by the enjoyment with which they were provided
t.asad: of what avail to them will be all their past enjoyments
t.yusuf-ali: It will profit them not that they enjoyed (this life)
t.pickthall: (How) that wherewith they were contented naught availeth them
t.arberry: what will it then avail them, the enjoyment of days they were given
t.hilali-khan: All that with which they used to enjoy shall not avail them
t.itani: Of what avail to them will be their past enjoyments?
t.mubarakpuri: All that with which they used to enjoy shall not avail them.
t.qarib: what good would the years of enjoyment be to them
t.wahiduddin: of what avail would their past enjoyment be to them
t.shakir: That which they were made to enjoy shall not avail them
t.haleem: what good would their past enjoyment be to them
t.maariful: what help can they receive from the comforts they were given to enjoy
t.khattab: would that enjoyment be of any benefit to them ˹at all˺
t.ghali: In no way will avail them whatever they had been given to enjoy
t.irving: Whatever they have been enjoying will never benefit them
t.iwq: And they would not be availed by the enjoyment with which they were provided

t_id.kemenag: niscaya tidak berguna bagi mereka apa yang mereka selalu menikmatinya.
t_id.sabiq: Umur panjang dan kesenangan hidup yang mereka dapatkan tidak dapat menepis azab yang Allah turunkan. Cepat atau lambat, azab-Nya pasti datang. Maka kenikmatan yang berakhir dengan azab bukanlah merupakan suatu kebaikan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Apakah) huruf Maa di sini bermakna Istifham yakni kata tanya, maksudnya, apakah (dapat menjamin mereka apa yang mereka selalu menikmatinya?") untuk menolak azab dari diri mereka atau meringankannya; maksudnya tidak berguna.
t_id.iwq: niscaya tidak berguna bagi mereka apa yang mereka selalu menikmatinya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ما» إستفهامية بمعنى: أي شيء «أغنى عنهم ما كانوا يمتعون» في دفع العذاب أو تخفيفه أي: لم يغن
tafsir.siraj-ar: مَآ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنۡهُم مَّا كَانُواْ يُمَتَّعُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Apakah) huruf Maa di sini bermakna Istifham yakni kata tanya, maksudnya, apakah (dapat menjamin mereka apa yang mereka selalu menikmatinya?") untuk menolak azab dari diri mereka atau meringankannya; maksudnya tidak berguna

ar: وَمَاۤ أَهۡلَكۡنَا مِن قَرۡیَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنذِرُونَ
ar_simple: وَمَا أَهْلَكْنَا مِنْ قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنْذِرُونَ

t.sahih-int: And We did not destroy any city except that it had warners
t.asad: And withal, never have We destroyed any community unless it had been warned
t.yusuf-ali: Never did We destroy a population, but had its warners
t.pickthall: And We destroyed no township but it had its warners
t.arberry: Never a city We destroyed, but it had warners
t.hilali-khan: And never did We destroy a township, but it had its warners
t.itani: Never did We destroy a town, but it had warners.
t.mubarakpuri: And never did We destroy a township but it had its warners
t.qarib: We have never destroyed a town without sending messengers to warn
t.wahiduddin: Never have We destroyed a town without sending down messengers to warn it
t.shakir: And We did not destroy any town but it had (its) warners
t.haleem: Never have We destroyed a town without sending down messengers to warn it
t.maariful: We did not destroy any town unless it has had warners
t.khattab: We have never destroyed a society without warners
t.ghali: And in no way did We cause (any) town to perish except that it had warners
t.irving: We never wipe out any town unless it has had its warners
t.iwq: And We did not destroy any city except that it had warners

t_id.kemenag: Dan Kami tidak membinasakan sesuatu negeripun, melainkan sesudah ada baginya orang-orang yang memberi peringatan;
t_id.sabiq: Telah menjadi hukum Kami (sunnatullâh), bahwa Kami tidak akan membinasakan suatu umat tanpa lebih dulu mengutus para rasul untuk memberikan peringatan. Dengan demikian, mereka tak memiliki alasan lagi.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami tidak membinasakan sesuatu negeri pun, melainkan sesudah ada baginya orang-orang yang memberi peringatan) yakni para Rasul yang memberi peringatan kepada para penduduknya.
t_id.iwq: Dan Kami tidak membinasakan sesuatu negeripun, melainkan sesudah ada baginya orang-orang yang memberi peringatan;

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وما أهلكنا من قرية إلا لها منذرون» رسل تنذر أهلها
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَآ أَهۡلَكۡنَا مِن قَرۡيَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنذِرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami tidak membinasakan sesuatu negeri pun, melainkan sesudah ada baginya orang-orang yang memberi peringatan) yakni para Rasul yang memberi peringatan kepada para penduduknya

t.sahih-int: As a reminder; and never have We been unjust
t.asad: and reminded: for, never do We wrong [anyone]
t.yusuf-ali: By way of reminder; and We never are unjust
t.pickthall: For reminder, for We never were oppressors
t.arberry: for a reminder; and never did We wrong
t.hilali-khan: By way of reminder, and We have never been unjust
t.itani: As a reminder—We are never unjust.
t.mubarakpuri: By way of reminder, and We have never been unjust.
t.qarib: and remind it, for We have never been unjust
t.wahiduddin: as a reminder from Us: We are never unjust
t.shakir: To remind, and We are never unjust
t.haleem: as a reminder from Us: We are never unjust
t.maariful: to give advice, and We have never been unjust
t.khattab: to remind ˹them˺, for We would never wrong ˹anyone˺
t.ghali: For a Reminding, and in no way have We been unjust
t.irving: to remind [it]. We have never been unfair
t.iwq: As a reminder; and never have We been unjust

t_id.kemenag: untuk menjadi peringatan. Dan Kami sekali-kali tidak berlaku zalim.
t_id.sabiq: Agar hal ini dapat dijadikan sebagai suatu peringatan dan bahan renungan. Kami tidak akan berbuat zalim dengan mengazab suatu kaum yang belum diutus rasul.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Peringatan-Ku) sebagai pelajaran untuk mereka. (Dan Kami sekali-kali tidak berlaku zalim) di dalam membinasakan mereka melainkan setelah terlebih dahulu mereka mendapat peringatan. Ayat ini diturunkan berkenaan dengan jawaban terhadap perkataan orang-orang musyrik, yaitu firman Allah berikut:
t_id.iwq: untuk menjadi peringatan. Dan Kami sekali-kali tidak berlaku zalim.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ذكرى» عظة لهم «وما كنا ظالمين» في إهلاكهم بعد إنذارهم ونزل ردا لقول المشركين
tafsir.siraj-ar: ذِكۡرَىٰ وَمَا كُنَّا ظَٰلِمِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Peringatan-Ku) sebagai pelajaran untuk mereka. (Dan Kami sekali-kali tidak berlaku zalim) di dalam membinasakan mereka melainkan setelah terlebih dahulu mereka mendapat peringatan. Ayat ini diturunkan berkenaan dengan jawaban terhadap perkataan orang-orang musyrik, yaitu firman Allah berikut

t.sahih-int: And the devils have not brought the revelation down
t.asad: And [this divine writ is such a reminder:] no evil spirits have brought it down
t.yusuf-ali: No evil ones have brought down this (Revelation)
t.pickthall: The devils did not bring it down
t.arberry: Not by the Satans has it been brought down
t.hilali-khan: And it is not the Shayatin (devils) who have brought it (this Quran) down
t.itani: It was not the devils that revealed it.
t.mubarakpuri: And it is not the Shayatin (devils) who have brought it down.
t.qarib: The devils did not bring it [this Qur'an] down
t.wahiduddin: It was not the devils who brought down the Quran
t.shakir: And the Shaitans have not come down with it
t.haleem: It was not the jinn who brought down this Quran
t.maariful: And this (Qur’ān) is not brought down by devils
t.khattab: It was not the devils who brought this ˹Quran˺ down
t.ghali: And in no way have Ash-Shayatin (The ever-Vicious (ones), i.e., the devils) been coming down with it
t.irving: The devils did not descend with it
t.iwq: And the devils have not brought the revelation down

t_id.kemenag: Dan Al Quran itu bukanlah dibawa turun oleh syaitan-syaitan.
t_id.sabiq: Al-Qur'ân menafikan ucapan orang kafir Mekah bahwa Muhammad telah dirasuki jin yang membisikkan al-Qur'ân. Maka difirmankan, "Setan-setan itu tak dapat menurunkan dan membisikkan al-Qur'ân!
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan dia itu tidak dibawa turun) yakni Alquran itu tidak dibawa turun oleh (setan-setan).
t_id.iwq: Dan Al Al-Quran itu bukanlah dibawa turun oleh syaitan-syaitan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وما تنزلت به» بالقرآن «الشياطين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَا تَنَزَّلَتۡ بِهِ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan dia itu tidak dibawa turun) yakni Alquran itu tidak dibawa turun oleh (setan-setan)

t.sahih-int: It is not allowable for them, nor would they be able
t.asad: for, neither does it suit their ends, nor is it in their power [to impart it to man]
t.yusuf-ali: It would neither suit them nor would they be able (to produce it)
t.pickthall: It is not meet for them, nor is it in their power
t.arberry: it behoves them not, neither are they able
t.hilali-khan: Neither would it suit them, nor they can (produce it)
t.itani: It is not in their interests, nor in their power.
t.mubarakpuri: Neither would it suit them nor are they able.
t.qarib: They are not able, nor are they capable
t.wahiduddin: neither are they worthy of it, nor are they capable of it
t.shakir: And it behoves them not, and they have not the power to do (it)
t.haleem: it is neither in their interests nor in their power
t.maariful: It neither suits them, nor are they able to (do this)
t.khattab: it is not for them ˹to do so˺, nor can they
t.ghali: And in no way does it behoove them, And in no way are they able to do (that)
t.irving: it does not suit them to, nor can they manage it
t.iwq: It indeed is not allowable for them, nor would they be able

t_id.kemenag: Dan tidaklah patut mereka membawa turun Al Quran itu, dan merekapun tidak akan kuasa.
t_id.sabiq: Mereka tidak boleh dan tidak akan mampu membuat dan menurunkan al-Qur'ân.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan tidaklah patut) tidak pantas (bagi setan-setan itu) untuk membawa turun Alquran (dan mereka pun tidak akan kuasa) melakukannya.
t_id.iwq: Dan tidaklah patut mereka membawa turun Al Al-Quran itu, dan merekapun tidak akan kuasa.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وما ينبغي» يصلح «لهم» أن ينزلوا به «وما يستطيعون» ذلك
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِي لَهُمۡ وَمَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan tidaklah patut) tidak pantas (bagi setan-setan itu) untuk membawa turun Alquran (dan mereka pun tidak akan kuasa) melakukannya

t.sahih-int: Indeed they, from [its] hearing, are removed
t.asad: verily, [even] from hearing it are they utterly debarred
t.yusuf-ali: Indeed they have been removed far from even (a chance of) hearing it
t.pickthall: Lo! verily they are banished from the hearing
t.arberry: Truly, they are expelled from hearing
t.hilali-khan: Verily, they have been removed far from hearing it
t.itani: They are barred from hearing.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, they have been removed far from hearing it.
t.qarib: As they are indeed barred from hearing [what goes on around the throne of His majesty]
t.wahiduddin: indeed they are debarred from overhearing it
t.shakir: Most surely they are far removed from the hearing of it
t.haleem: indeed they are prevented from overhearing it
t.maariful: In fact, they are kept far away from hearing (it at the time of revelation)
t.khattab: for they are strictly barred from ˹even˺ overhearing ˹it˺
t.ghali: Surely they are indeed kept apart from hearing
t.irving: they are too withdrawn to even hear it
t.iwq: Indeed they, from its hearing, are removed

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya mereka benar-benar dijauhkan daripada mendengar Al Quran itu.
t_id.sabiq: Dan sesungguhnya setan-setan itu dijauhkan dan tidak dapat mendengar al-Qur'ân yang diturunkan kepada Muhammad saw."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya mereka dari pada mendengarkan) percakapan para Malaikat (benar-benar dijauhkan) dengan dilempar oleh batu-batu meteor.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya mereka benar-benar dijauhkan daripada mendengar Al Al-Quran itu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنهم عن السمع» لكلام الملائكة «لمعزولون» بالشهب
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّهُمۡ عَنِ ٱلسَّمۡعِ لَمَعۡزُولُونَ (السَّمْعِ: اسْتِمَاعِ القُرْآنِ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ, لَمَعْزُولُونَ: لَمَحْجُوبُونَ مَرْجُومُونَ بِالشُّهُبِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya mereka dari pada mendengarkan) percakapan para Malaikat (benar-benar dijauhkan) dengan dilempar oleh batu-batu meteor

ar: فَلَا تَدۡعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُعَذَّبِینَ
ar_simple: فَلَا تَدْعُ مَعَ اللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا آخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ الْمُعَذَّبِينَ

t.sahih-int: So do not invoke with Allah another deity and [thus] be among the punished
t.asad: Hence, [O man,] do not invoke any other deity side by side with God, lest thou find thyself among those who are made to suffer [on Judgment Day]
t.yusuf-ali: So call not on any other god with Allah, or thou wilt be among those under the Penalty
t.pickthall: Therefor invoke not with Allah another god, lest thou be one of the doomed
t.arberry: So call thou not upon another god with God, lest thou shouldst be one of those that are chastised
t.hilali-khan: So invoke not with Allah another ilah (god) lest you be among those who receive punishment
t.itani: So do not pray to another god with God, else you will be of those tormented.
t.mubarakpuri: So, invoke not with Allah another god lest you should be among those who receive punishment.
t.qarib: So do not invoke another deity beside God, or you will incur punishment
t.wahiduddin: So do not call on any deity besides God, lest you incur His punishment
t.shakir: So call not upon another god with Allah, lest you be of those who are punished
t.haleem: So [Prophet] do not invoke any gods beside God, or you will incur punishment
t.maariful: So do not invoke any other god along with Allah, otherwise you will be among those who are to be punished
t.khattab: So do not ever call upon any other god besides Allah, or you will be one of the punished
t.ghali: So do not invoke another god with Allah, then you should be of the tormented
t.irving: Do not appeal to any other deity along with God, lest you be tormented
t.iwq: So do not invoke with Allah another deity and thus be among the punished

t_id.kemenag: Maka janganlah kamu menyeru (menyembah) tuhan yang lain di samping Allah, yang menyebabkan kamu termasuk orang-orang yang diazab.
t_id.sabiq: Maka hadapkanlah dirimu, Muhammad, kepada Allah. Ikhlaslah selalu dalam beribadah kepada-Nya, dan jangan hirukan anggapan-anggapan orang-orang musyrik yang rancu dan salah itu. (Ajakan kepada rasul untuk mengikhlaskan diri, seperti termaktub dalam ayat ini, juga merupakan ajakan untuk seluruh umatnya).
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka janganlah kamu menyeru tuhan yang lain di samping Allah, yang menyebabkan kalian termasuk orang-orang yang diazab) jika kamu melakukan hal tersebut, sebagaimana yang dimintakan oleh orang-orang musyrik itu.
t_id.iwq: Maka janganlah kamu menyeru (menyembah) tuhan yang lain di samping Allah, yang menyebabkan kamu termasuk orang-orang yang diazab.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فلا تدع مع الله إلها آخر فتكون من المعذبين» إن فعلت ذلك الذي دعوك إليه
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَلَا تَدۡعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُعَذَّبِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka janganlah kamu menyeru tuhan yang lain di samping Allah, yang menyebabkan kalian termasuk orang-orang yang diazab) jika kamu melakukan hal tersebut, sebagaimana yang dimintakan oleh orang-orang musyrik itu

t.sahih-int: And warn, [O Muhammad], your closest kindred
t.asad: And warn [whomever thou canst reach, beginning with] thy kinsfolk
t.yusuf-ali: And admonish thy nearest kinsmen
t.pickthall: And warn thy tribe of near kindred
t.arberry: And warn thy clan, thy nearest kin
t.hilali-khan: And warn your tribe (O Muhammad SAW) of near kindred
t.itani: And warn your close relatives.
t.mubarakpuri: And warn your tribe of near kindred.
t.qarib: Warn your closest relatives
t.wahiduddin: Warn your nearest kinsmen
t.shakir: And warn your nearest relations
t.haleem: Warn your nearest kinsfolk
t.maariful: And warn the nearest people of your clan
t.khattab: And warn ˹all, starting with˺ your closest relatives
t.ghali: And warn your kinsmen, the nearest kin
t.irving: Warn your nearest kinfolk
t.iwq: And warn, O Muhammad, your closest kindred

t_id.kemenag: Dan berilah peringatan kepada kerabat-kerabatmu yang terdekat,
t_id.sabiq: Peringatkanlah keluarga dekatmu akan azab akibat kemusyrikan dan kemaksiatan. Kemudian peringatkanlah mereka yang hubungan keluarganya lebih jauh, dan begitu seterusnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan berilah peringatan kepada kerabat-kerabatmu yang terdekat) mereka adalah Bani Hasyim dan Bani Mutalib, lalu Nabi saw. memberikan peringatan kepada mereka secara terang-terangan; demikianlah menurut keterangan hadis yang telah dikemukakan oleh Imam Bukhari dan Imam Muslim.
t_id.iwq: Dan berilah peringatan kepada kerabat-kerabatmu yang terdekat,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: (وأنذر عشيرتك الأقربين) وهم بنو هاشم وبنو عبد المطلب "" وقد أنذرهم جهارا "" رواه البخاري ومسلم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَأَنذِرۡ عَشِيرَتَكَ ٱلۡأَقۡرَبِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan berilah peringatan kepada kerabat-kerabatmu yang terdekat) mereka adalah Bani Hasyim dan Bani Mutalib, lalu Nabi saw. memberikan peringatan kepada mereka secara terang-terangan; demikianlah menurut keterangan hadis yang telah dikemukakan oleh Imam Bukhari dan Imam Muslim

ar: وَٱخۡفِضۡ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِینَ
ar_simple: وَاخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ

t.sahih-int: And lower your wing to those who follow you of the believers
t.asad: and spread the wings of thy tenderness over all of the believers who may follow thee
t.yusuf-ali: And lower thy wing to the Believers who follow thee
t.pickthall: And lower thy wing (in kindness) unto those believers who follow thee
t.arberry: Lower thy wing to those who follow thee, being believers
t.hilali-khan: And be kind and humble to the believers who follow you
t.itani: And lower your wing to those of the believers who follow you.
t.mubarakpuri: And be kind and humble to the believers who follow you.
t.qarib: and be humble and kind to the believers who follow you
t.wahiduddin: and extend kindness and affection to those of the believers who follow you
t.shakir: And be kind to him who follows you of the believers
t.haleem: and lower your wing tenderly over the believers who follow you
t.maariful: and be kind with humbleness to the believers who followed you
t.khattab: and be gracious to the believers who follow you
t.ghali: And lower your wing to the ones who closely follow you of the believers
t.irving: lower your [protecting] wing over any believers who may follow you
t.iwq: And lower your wing to those who follow you of those who believe

t_id.kemenag: dan rendahkanlah dirimu terhadap orang-orang yang mengikutimu, yaitu orang-orang yang beriman.
t_id.sabiq: Dan berlemah lembutlah kepada mereka yang telah menerima seruanmu untuk beriman.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan rendahkanlah dirimu) berlaku lemah lembutlah kamu (terhadap orang-orang yang mengikutimu, yaitu orang-orang yang beriman).
t_id.iwq: dan rendahkanlah dirimu terhadap orang-orang yang mengikutimu, yaitu orang-orang yang beriman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «واخفض جناحكْ» ألن جانبك «لمن اتبعك من المؤمنين» الموحدين
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱخۡفِضۡ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ (وَاخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ: أَلِنْ جَانِبَكَ وَكَلامَكَ تَوَاضُعًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan rendahkanlah dirimu) berlaku lemah lembutlah kamu (terhadap orang-orang yang mengikutimu, yaitu orang-orang yang beriman)

ar: فَإِنۡ عَصَوۡكَ فَقُلۡ إِنِّی بَرِیۤءࣱ مِّمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
ar_simple: فَإِنْ عَصَوْكَ فَقُلْ إِنِّي بَرِيءٌ مِمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ

t.sahih-int: And if they disobey you, then say, "Indeed, I am disassociated from what you are doing
t.asad: but if they disobey thee, say, “I am free of responsibility for aught that you may do!” –
t.yusuf-ali: Then if they disobey thee, say: "I am free (of responsibility) for what ye do
t.pickthall: And if they (thy kinsfolk) disobey thee, say: Lo! I am innocent of what they do
t.arberry: then, if they disobey thee, say, 'I am quit of that you do
t.hilali-khan: Then if they disobey you, say: "I am innocent of what you do
t.itani: And if they disobey you, say, “I am innocent of what you do.”
t.mubarakpuri: Then if they disobey you, say: "I am innocent of what you do."
t.qarib: but, if they disobey you, then say, "I am not responsible for what you are doing
t.wahiduddin: If they disobey you, say, "I bear no responsibility for what you do
t.shakir: But if they disobey you, then say: Surely I am clear of what you do
t.haleem: If they disobey you, say, ‘I bear no responsibility for your actions.’
t.maariful: So if they disobey you, then say, “I disown what you do,”
t.khattab: But if they disobey you, say, “I am certainly free of what you do.”
t.ghali: Yet, in case they disobey you, then say, "Surely I am quit of whatever you do
t.irving: I opposed to you, then SAY: "I am innocent of whatever doing
t.iwq: And if they disobey you, then say, "Indeed, I am disassociated from what you are doing

t_id.kemenag: Jika mereka mendurhakaimu maka katakanlah: "Sesungguhnya aku tidak bertanggung jawab terhadap apa yang kamu kerjakan";
t_id.sabiq: Jika mereka, ternyata, tetap mendurhakai dan tidak mematuhimu, maka bebaskanlah dirimu dari mereka dan dari perbuatan-perbuatan mereka seperti kemusyrikan dan kemaksiatan-kemaksiatan lainnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Jika mereka mendurhakaimu) yakni kerabat-kerabat terdekatmu itu (maka katakanlah) kepada mereka; ("Sesungguhnya aku tidak bertanggung jawab terhadap apa yang kalian kerjakan") tentang penyembahan kalian kepada selain Allah itu.
t_id.iwq: Jika mereka mendurhakaimu maka katakanlah: "Sesungguhnya aku tidak bertanggung jawab terhadap apa yang kamu kerjakan";

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فإن عصوك» عشيرتك «فقل» لهم «إني بريء مما تعملون» من عبادة غير الله
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَإِنۡ عَصَوۡكَ فَقُلۡ إِنِّي بَرِيٓءٞ مِّمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Jika mereka mendurhakaimu) yakni kerabat-kerabat terdekatmu itu (maka katakanlah) kepada mereka; ("Sesungguhnya aku tidak bertanggung jawab terhadap apa yang kalian kerjakan") tentang penyembahan kalian kepada selain Allah itu

t.sahih-int: And rely upon the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
t.asad: and place thy trust in the Almighty, the Dispenser of Grace
t.yusuf-ali: And put thy trust on the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
t.pickthall: And put thy trust in the Mighty, the Merciful
t.arberry: Put thy trust in the All-mighty, the All-compassionate
t.hilali-khan: And put your trust in the All-Mighty, the Most Merciful
t.itani: And put your trust in the Almighty, the Merciful.
t.mubarakpuri: And put your trust in the All-Mighty, the Most Merciful,
t.qarib: And rely upon the Almighty, the Merciful-to-all
t.wahiduddin: Put your trust in the Mighty One, the Merciful
t.shakir: And rely on the Mighty, the Merciful
t.haleem: Put your trust in the Almighty, the Merciful
t.maariful: and place your trust in the Mighty, the Merciful
t.khattab: Put your trust in the Almighty, Most Merciful
t.ghali: And put your trust in The Ever-Mighty, The Ever-Merciful
t.irving: Rely on the Powerful, the Merciful
t.iwq: And rely upon the All-Mighty, the Merciful

t_id.kemenag: Dan bertawakkallah kepada (Allah) Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang,
t_id.sabiq: Lalu serahkanlah segala urusanmu kepada Sang Mahaperkasa lagi Mahakuasa untuk menghancurkan--dengan 'izzah-Nya--musuh-musuhmu. Dia akan memberikan pertolongan kepadamu, juga kepada orang-orang yang ikhlas dalam perbuatan dengan rahmat-Nya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan bertawakallah) dapat dibaca Watawakkal dan Fatawakkal, jika dibaca Fatawakkal artinya, maka bertawakallah (kepada Allah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang) maksudnya, serahkanlah semua perkaramu kepada-Nya.
t_id.iwq: Dan bertawakkallah kepada (Allah) Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وتوكل» بالواو والفاء «على العزيز الرحيم» الله أي فوض إليه جميع أمورك
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَى ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan bertawakallah) dapat dibaca Watawakkal dan Fatawakkal, jika dibaca Fatawakkal artinya, maka bertawakallah (kepada Allah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Penyayang) maksudnya, serahkanlah semua perkaramu kepada-Nya

t.sahih-int: Who sees you when you arise
t.asad: who sees thee when thou standest [alone]
t.yusuf-ali: Who seeth thee standing forth (in prayer)
t.pickthall: Who seeth thee when thou standest up (to pray)
t.arberry: who sees thee when thou standest
t.hilali-khan: Who sees you (O Muhammad SAW) when you stand up (alone at night for Tahajjud prayers)
t.itani: He Who sees you when you rise.
t.mubarakpuri: Who sees you when you stand up.
t.qarib: Who sees you when you arise
t.wahiduddin: who sees you when you stand up [for prayer]
t.shakir: Who sees you when you stand up
t.haleem: who sees you when you stand up [for prayer]
t.maariful: Who sees you when you stand (in prayer)
t.khattab: Who sees you when you rise ˹for prayer at night˺
t.ghali: Who sees you while you rise (in prayer)
t.irving: Who sees you whenever you stand up [in prayer]
t.iwq: Who sees you when you arise

t_id.kemenag: Yang melihat kamu ketika kamu berdiri (untuk sembahyang),
t_id.sabiq: Yang menyaksikanmu bangun untuk bertahajud dan saat kamu mengerjakan kebajikan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Yang melihat kamu ketika kamu berdiri) untuk melakukan salat.
t_id.iwq: Yang melihat kamu ketika kamu berdiri (untuk sembahyang),

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «الذي يراك حين تقوم» إلى الصلاة
tafsir.siraj-ar: ٱلَّذِي يَرَىٰكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ (حِينَ تَقُومُ: تُصَلِّي اللَّيْلَ وَحْدَكَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Yang melihat kamu ketika kamu berdiri) untuk melakukan salat

t.sahih-int: And your movement among those who prostrate
t.asad: and [sees] thy behaviour among those who prostrate themselves [before Him]
t.yusuf-ali: And thy movements among those who prostrate themselves
t.pickthall: And (seeth) thine abasement among those who fall prostrate (in worship)
t.arberry: and when thou turnest about among those who bow
t.hilali-khan: And your movements among those who fall prostrate (along with you to Allah in the five compulsory congregational prayers)
t.itani: And your devotions amidst the worshipers.
t.mubarakpuri: And your movements among those who fall prostrate.
t.qarib: and when you move among those who prostrate themselves
t.wahiduddin: and sees your movements among those who prostrate themselves
t.shakir: And your turning over and over among those who prostrate themselves before Allah
t.haleem: and sees your movements among the worshippers
t.maariful: and (sees) your movement among those who prostrate themselves
t.khattab: as well as your movements ˹in prayer˺ along with ˹fellow˺ worshippers
t.ghali: And (Ever) your turning about among the prostrate
t.irving: as well as how you move around among those who are bowing down on their knees
t.iwq: And your movement among those who prostrate

t_id.kemenag: dan (melihat pula) perubahan gerak badanmu di antara orang-orang yang sujud.
t_id.sabiq: Dan Yang memperhatikan tingkah lakumu di tengah-tengah mereka yang sedang salat, ketika kamu sedang bediri, rukuk, sujud dan ketika engkau sedang memimpin mereka bersembahyang.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan melihat pula perubahan gerakmu) ketika kamu menjalankan rukun-rukun salat; mulai dari berdiri, duduk, rukuk dan sujud (di antara orang-orang yang sujud).
t_id.iwq: dan (melihat pula) perubahan gerak badanmu di antara orang-orang yang sujud.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وتقلبك» في أركان الصلاة قائما وقاعدا وراكعا وساجدا «في الساجدين» المصلين
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَتَقَلُّبَكَ فِي ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan melihat pula perubahan gerakmu) ketika kamu menjalankan rukun-rukun salat; mulai dari berdiri, duduk, rukuk dan sujud (di antara orang-orang yang sujud)

t.sahih-int: Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing
t.asad: for, verily, He alone is all-hearing, all-knowing
t.yusuf-ali: For it is He Who heareth and knoweth all things
t.pickthall: Lo! He, only He, is the Hearer, the Knower
t.arberry: Surely He is the All-hearing, the All-knowing
t.hilali-khan: Verily! He, only He, is the All-Hearer, the All-Knower
t.itani: He is indeed the Hearer, the Aware.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, He, only He, is the All-Hearer, the All-Knower.
t.qarib: He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing
t.wahiduddin: He is the All Hearing, the All Knowing
t.shakir: Surely He is the Hearing, the Knowing
t.haleem: He is the All Hearing, the All Knowing
t.maariful: Surely, He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing
t.khattab: He ˹alone˺ is indeed the All-Hearing, All-Knowing
t.ghali: Surely He, Ever He, is The Ever-Hearing, The Ever-Knowing
t.irving: He is the Alert, Aware
t.iwq: Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya Dia adalah Yang Maha Mendengar lagi Maha Mengetahui.
t_id.sabiq: Allah Swt. sungguh Maha Mendengar doa dan zikirmu; Maha Mengetahui niat dan perbuatanmu. Seolah-olah Allah berkata kepada Nabi, "Jangan kamu memaksakan dirimu menahan keberatan-keberatan beribadah, karena kamu berada dalam penglihatan dan pengawasan Kami."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Dia adalah Yang Maha Mendengar lagi Maha Mengetahui).
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya Dia adalah Yang Maha Mendengar lagi Maha Mengetahui.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنه هو السميع العليم»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Sesungguhnya Dia adalah Yang Maha Mendengar lagi Maha Mengetahui

ar: هَلۡ أُنَبِّئُكُمۡ عَلَىٰ مَن تَنَزَّلُ ٱلشَّیَـٰطِینُ
ar_simple: هَلْ أُنَبِّئُكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَنْ تَنَزَّلُ الشَّيَاطِينُ

t.sahih-int: Shall I inform you upon whom the devils descend
t.asad: [And] shall I tell you upon whom it is that those evil spirits descend
t.yusuf-ali: Shall I inform you, (O people!), on whom it is that the evil ones descend
t.pickthall: Shall I inform you upon whom the devils descend
t.arberry: Shall I tell you on whom the Satans come down
t.hilali-khan: Shall I inform you (O people!) upon whom the Shayatin (devils) descend
t.itani: Shall I inform you upon whom the devils descend?
t.mubarakpuri: Shall I inform you upon whom the Shayatin descend
t.qarib: Shall I inform you upon whom the devils descend
t.wahiduddin: Shall I tell you upon whom the devils descend
t.shakir: Shall I inform you (of him) upon whom the Shaitans descend
t.haleem: Shall I tell you who the jinn come down to
t.maariful: Shall I tell you on whom the devils descend
t.khattab: Shall I inform you of whom the devils ˹actually˺ descend upon
t.ghali: Shall I (fully) inform you on whom Ash-Shayatin keep coming down
t.irving: Shall I tell you who are the ones on whom the devils descend
t.iwq: Shall I inform you upon whom the devils descend

t_id.kemenag: Apakah akan Aku beritakan kepadamu, kepada siapa syaitan-syaitan itu turun?
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang musyrik berkata, "Sungguh telah datang sekelompok setan yang meggoda Muhammad." Al-Qur'ân membantah tuduhan mereka dengan menyatakan, "Maukah kalian Kami beritahu siapakah orang yang telah didatangi dan digoda oleh setan?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Apakah akan Aku beritakan kepada kalian) hai orang-orang kafir Mekah (kepada siapa setan-setan itu turun?) Tanazzalu pada asalnya dibaca Tatanazzalu kemudian salah satu huruf Ta dibuang sehingga menjadi Tanazzalu.
t_id.iwq: Apakah akan Aku beritakan kepadamu, kepada siapa syaitan-syaitan itu turun?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «هل أنبئكم» يا كفرا مكة «على من تنزل الشياطين» بحذف إحدى التاءين من الأصل
tafsir.siraj-ar: هَلۡ أُنَبِّئُكُمۡ عَلَىٰ مَن تَنَزَّلُ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Apakah akan Aku beritakan kepada kalian) hai orang-orang kafir Mekah (kepada siapa setan-setan itu turun?) Tanazzalu pada asalnya dibaca Tatanazzalu kemudian salah satu huruf Ta dibuang sehingga menjadi Tanazzalu

t.sahih-int: They descend upon every sinful liar
t.asad: They descend upon all sinful self-deceivers
t.yusuf-ali: They descend on every lying, wicked person
t.pickthall: They descend on every sinful, false one
t.arberry: They come down on every guilty impostor
t.hilali-khan: They descend on every lying (one who tells lies), sinful person
t.itani: They descend upon every sinful liar.
t.mubarakpuri: They descend on every lying, sinful person (Athim).
t.qarib: They descend upon every sinful liar
t.wahiduddin: They descend on every lying sinner
t.shakir: They descend upon every lying, sinful one
t.haleem: They come down to every lying sinner
t.maariful: They descend on every sinful liar
t.khattab: They descend upon every sinful liar
t.ghali: They keep coming down on every most vicious (and) constant falsifier
t.irving: They come down upon every bluffing sinner
t.iwq: And they descend upon every sinful liar

t_id.kemenag: Mereka turun kepada tiap-tiap pendusta lagi yang banyak dosa,
t_id.sabiq: Setan akan menghampiri setiap orang yang membuat kebohongan paling buruk dan melakukan dosa amat keji. Mereka adalah para pendeta jahat yang memiliki perangai menyerupai setan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka turun kepada tiap-tiap pendusta) yakni orang yang banyak berdusta (lagi yang banyak dosa) durhaka, seperti Musailamah dan lain-lainnya dari kalangan orang-orang ahli peramal.
t_id.iwq: Mereka turun kepada tiap-tiap pendusta lagi yang banyak dosa,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «تنزل على كل أفاك» كذاب «أثيم» فاجر مثل مسيلمة وغيره من الكهنة
tafsir.siraj-ar: تَنَزَّلُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ أَفَّاكٍ أَثِيمٖ (أَفَّاكٍ: كَذَّابٍ, أَثِيمٍ: كَثِيرِ الآثَامِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka turun kepada tiap-tiap pendusta) yakni orang yang banyak berdusta (lagi yang banyak dosa) durhaka, seperti Musailamah dan lain-lainnya dari kalangan orang-orang ahli peramal

t.sahih-int: They pass on what is heard, and most of them are liars
t.asad: who readily lend ear [to every falsehood], and most of whom lie to others as well
t.yusuf-ali: (Into whose ears) they pour hearsay vanities, and most of them are liars
t.pickthall: They listen eagerly, but most of them are liars
t.arberry: They give ear, but most of them are liars
t.hilali-khan: Who gives ear (to the devils and they pour what they may have heard of the unseen from the angels), and most of them are liars
t.itani: They give ear, and most of them are liars.
t.mubarakpuri: Who gives ear, and most of them are liars.
t.qarib: who readily lends an ear, but most of them are liars
t.wahiduddin: who lends an ear to them, and most of them are liars
t.shakir: They incline their ears, and most of them are liars
t.haleem: who readily lends an ear to them, and most of them are liars
t.maariful: They give ear to hear (secretly,) and most of them tell lies
t.khattab: who gives an ˹attentive˺ ear ˹to half-truths˺, mostly passing on sheer lies
t.ghali: They are eager on hearing, and most of them are liars
t.irving: They even try to eavesdrop, since most of them are liars
t.iwq: And they pass on what is heard, and most of them are liars

t_id.kemenag: mereka menghadapkan pendengaran (kepada syaitan) itu, dan kebanyakan mereka adalah orang-orang pendusta.
t_id.sabiq: Mereka menyimak kata-kata setan yang memperdengarkan dugaan-dugaan yang menjadikan mereka sebagai pendusta.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka menghadapkan) yakni setan-setan itu (pendengaran) apa yang telah mereka curi dengar dari para malaikat, kemudian mereka menyampaikannya kepada para ahli ramal (dan kebanyakan mereka itu adalah orang-orang pendusta) mereka menambahi kedustaan kepada apa yang telah mereka dengar itu dengan kedustaan yang banyak; hal ini berlangsung sebelum setan-setan itu dihalangi untuk mencapai langit.
t_id.iwq: mereka menghadapkan pendengaran (kepada syaitan) itu, dan kebanyakan mereka adalah orang-orang pendusta.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «يلقون» الشياطين «السمع» ما سمعوه من الملائكة إلى الكهنة «وأكثرهم كاذبون» يضمنون إلى المسموع كذبا وكان هذا قبل أن حجبت الشياطين عن السماء
tafsir.siraj-ar: يُلۡقُونَ ٱلسَّمۡعَ وَأَكۡثَرُهُمۡ كَٰذِبُونَ (يُلْقُونَ السَّمْعَ: تُلْقِي الشَّيَاطِينُ إِلَى الكُهَّانِ مَا يَسْتَرِقُونَ مِنَ المَلَأِ الأَعْلَى)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka menghadapkan) yakni setan-setan itu (pendengaran) apa yang telah mereka curi dengar dari para malaikat, kemudian mereka menyampaikannya kepada para ahli ramal (dan kebanyakan mereka itu adalah orang-orang pendusta) mereka menambahi kedustaan kepada apa yang telah mereka dengar itu dengan kedustaan yang banyak; hal ini berlangsung sebelum setan-setan itu dihalangi untuk mencapai langit

t.sahih-int: And the poets - [only] the deviators follow them
t.asad: And as for the poets [they, too, are prone to deceive themselves: and so, only] those who are lost in grievous error would follow them
t.yusuf-ali: And the Poets,- It is those straying in Evil, who follow them
t.pickthall: As for poets, the erring follow them
t.arberry: And the poets -- the perverse follow them
t.hilali-khan: As for the poets, the erring follow them
t.itani: And as for the poets—the deviators follow them.
t.mubarakpuri: As for the poets, the astray follow them,
t.qarib: As for the poets, [only] the perverse follow them
t.wahiduddin: And as for the poets -- it is the misled who follow them
t.shakir: And as to the poets, those who go astray follow them
t.haleem: only those who are lost in error follow the poets
t.maariful: As for the poets, they are followed by the straying people
t.khattab: As for poets, they are followed ˹merely˺ by deviants
t.ghali: And the poets, the misguided closely follow them
t.irving: and poets are followed around by them bewildered
t.iwq: And the poets - only the deviators follow them

t_id.kemenag: Dan penyair-penyair itu diikuti oleh orang-orang yang sesat.
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang kafir berkata, "Al-Qur'ân itu hanyalah puisi karangan seorang penyair bernama Muhammad." Allah memperlihatkan kepalsuan tuduhan mereka dengan memberikan penjelasan bahwa al-Qur'ân itu penuh dengan kata-kata bijak (hikam) dan aturan-aturan hukum (ahkâm). Gaya bahasa al-Qur'ân itu sangat berlainan dengan gaya bahasa kebanyakan para penyair di masa itu yang sarat dengan kepalsuan dan kebohongan. Dan watak Muhammad sendiri pun berbeda dengan watak para penyair kebanyakan yang selalu berkata bohong.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan penyair-penyair itu diikuti oleh orang-orang yang sesat) di dalam syair-syair mereka, lalu mereka mengatakannya dan meriwayatkannya dari orang-orang yang sesat itu, maka mereka adalah orang-orang yang tercela.
t_id.iwq: Dan penyair-penyair itu diikuti oleh orang-orang yang sesat.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والشعراء يتبعهم الغاوون» في شعرهم فيقولن به ويرونه عنهم فهم مذمومون
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلشُّعَرَآءُ يَتَّبِعُهُمُ ٱلۡغَاوُۥنَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan penyair-penyair itu diikuti oleh orang-orang yang sesat) di dalam syair-syair mereka, lalu mereka mengatakannya dan meriwayatkannya dari orang-orang yang sesat itu, maka mereka adalah orang-orang yang tercela

ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّهُمۡ فِی كُلِّ وَادࣲ یَهِیمُونَ
ar_simple: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّهُمْ فِي كُلِّ وَادٍ يَهِيمُونَ

t.sahih-int: Do you not see that in every valley they roam
t.asad: Art thou not aware that they roam confusedly through all the valleys [of words and thoughts]
t.yusuf-ali: Seest thou not that they wander distracted in every valley
t.pickthall: Hast thou not seen how they stray in every valley
t.arberry: hast thou not seen how they wander in every valley
t.hilali-khan: See you not that they speak about every subject (praising others right or wrong) in their poetry
t.itani: Do you not see how they ramble in every style?
t.mubarakpuri: See you not that they speak about every subject in their poetry
t.qarib: Do you not see that they wander aimlessly in every valley
t.wahiduddin: Do you not see how they wander aimlessly in every valley
t.shakir: Do you not see that they wander about bewildered in every valley
t.haleem: Do you not see how they rove aimlessly in every valley
t.maariful: Did you not see that they wander in every valley
t.khattab: Do you not see how they rant in every field
t.ghali: Have you not seen that they wander in every valley
t.irving: Do you not see them staggering around in every river-valley
t.iwq: Do you not see that in every valley they roam

t_id.kemenag: Tidakkah kamu melihat bahwasanya mereka mengembara di tiap-tiap lembah,
t_id.sabiq: Tidakkah kalian mengetahui bagaimana para penyair itu mempermainkan kata-kata yang menutupi jalan kebenaran?
t_id.jalalayn-id: Tidakkah kamu melihat) apakah kamu tidak memperhatikan (bahwasanya mereka di tiap-tiap lembah) yaitu di majelis-majelis pembicaraan dan sastra-sastranya, yakni majelis kesusasteraan (mengembara) yakni mereka mendatanginya, kemudian mereka melampaui batas di dalam pujian dan hinaan mereka melalui syair-syairnya.
t_id.iwq: Tidakkah kamu melihat bahwasanya mereka mengembara di tiap-tiap lembah,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ألم تر» تعلم «أنهم في كل واد» من أودية الكلام وفنونه «يهيمون» يمضون فيجازون الحد مدحا وهجاء
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّهُمۡ فِي كُلِّ وَادٖ يَهِيمُونَ (وَادٍ: فَنٍّ مِنْ فُنُونِ البَاطِلِ، وَالكَذِبِ, يَهِيمُونَ: يَخُوضُونَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Tidakkah kamu melihat) apakah kamu tidak memperhatikan (bahwasanya mereka di tiap-tiap lembah) yaitu di majelis-majelis pembicaraan dan sastra-sastranya, yakni majelis kesusasteraan (mengembara) yakni mereka mendatanginya, kemudian mereka melampaui batas di dalam pujian dan hinaan mereka melalui syair-syairnya

t.sahih-int: And that they say what they do not do
t.asad: and that they [so often] say what they do not do [or feel]
t.yusuf-ali: And that they say what they practise not
t.pickthall: And how they say that which they do not
t.arberry: and how they say that which they do not
t.hilali-khan: And that they say what they do not do
t.itani: And how they say what they do not do?
t.mubarakpuri: And that they say what they do not do.
t.qarib: and say what they do not do
t.wahiduddin: preaching what they do not practice
t.shakir: And that they say that which they do not do
t.haleem: how they say what they do not do
t.maariful: and that they say what they do not
t.khattab: only saying what they never do
t.ghali: And that they say what they do not perform
t.irving: They preach what they never practice
t.iwq: And that they say what they do not do

t_id.kemenag: dan bahwasanya mereka suka mengatakan apa yang mereka sendiri tidak mengerjakan(nya)?
t_id.sabiq: Dan sungguh mereka seringkali mengatakan sesuatu yang tidak pernah mereka lakukan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan bahwasanya mereka suka mengatakan) kami telah mengerjakan (apa yang mereka sendiri tidak mengerjakannya) artinya, mereka suka berdusta.
t_id.iwq: dan bahwasanya mereka suka mengatakan apa yang mereka sendiri tidak mengerjakan(nya)?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وأنهم يقولون» فعلنا «مالا يفعلون» يكذبون
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَأَنَّهُمۡ يَقُولُونَ مَا لَا يَفۡعَلُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan bahwasanya mereka suka mengatakan) kami telah mengerjakan (apa yang mereka sendiri tidak mengerjakannya) artinya, mereka suka berdusta

ar: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِینَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَذَكَرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ كَثِیرࣰا وَٱنتَصَرُوا۟ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا ظُلِمُوا۟ۗ وَسَیَعۡلَمُ ٱلَّذِینَ ظَلَمُوۤا۟ أَیَّ مُنقَلَبࣲ یَنقَلِبُونَ
ar_simple: إِلَّا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ وَذَكَرُوا اللَّهَ كَثِيرًا وَانْتَصَرُوا مِنْ بَعْدِ مَا ظُلِمُوا ۗ وَسَيَعْلَمُ الَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا أَيَّ مُنْقَلَبٍ يَنْقَلِبُونَ

t.sahih-int: Except those [poets] who believe and do righteous deeds and remember Allah often and defend [the Muslims] after they were wronged. And those who have wronged are going to know to what [kind of] return they will be returned
t.asad: [Most of them are of this kind] save those who have attained to faith, and do righteous deeds, and remember God unceasingly, and defend themselves [only] after having been wronged, and [trust in God’s promise that] those who are bent on wrongdoing will in time come to know how evil a turn their destinies are bound to take
t.yusuf-ali: Except those who believe, work righteousness, engage much in the remembrance of Allah, and defend themselves only after they are unjustly attacked. And soon will the unjust assailants know what vicissitudes their affairs will take
t.pickthall: Save those who believe and do good works, and remember Allah much, and vindicate themselves after they have been wronged. Those who do wrong will come to know by what a (great) reverse they will be overturned
t.arberry: Save those that believe, and do righteous deeds, and remember God oft, and help themselves after being wronged; and those who do wrong shall surely know by what overturning they will he overturned
t.hilali-khan: Except those who believe (in the Oneness of Allah Islamic Monotheism), and do righteous deeds, and remember Allah much, and reply back (in poetry) to the unjust poetry (which the pagan poets utter against the Muslims). And those who do wrong will come to know by what overturning they will be overturned
t.itani: Except for those who believe, and do good deeds, and remember God frequently, and defend themselves after they are wronged. As for those who do wrong, they will know by what overturning they will be overturned.
t.mubarakpuri: Except those who believe and do righteous deeds, and remember Allah much and vindicate themselves after they have been wronged. And those who do wrong will come to know by what overturning they will be overturned.
t.qarib: But except those [poets) who believe, do righteous deeds, remember God often, and defend themselves after they were wronged. Those who do wrong will soon know the kind of reversal they will receive
t.wahiduddin: Not so the true believers who do good works and remember God with fervour and defend themselves only after they are wronged. The wrongdoers will soon know how evil a turn their affairs will take
t.shakir: Except those who believe and do good and remember Allah much, and defend themselves after they are oppressed; and they who act unjustly shall know to what final place of turning they shall turn back
t.haleem: Not so those [poets] who believe, do good deeds, remember God often, and defend themselves after they have been wronged. The evildoers will find out what they will return to
t.maariful: Except those who believe and do righteous deeds and remember Allah very much, and defend themselves after they are wronged. And the wrongdoers will soon know to which place they are going to return
t.khattab: Except those who believe, do good, remember Allah often, and ˹poetically˺ avenge ˹the believers˺ after being wrongfully slandered. The wrongdoers will come to know what ˹evil˺ end they will meet
t.ghali: Excepting the ones who have believed, and done deeds of righteousness, and remember Allah much, and vindicate themselves ever after being unjustly treated. And soon the ones who did injustice will know by whatever overturning they will be overturned
t.irving: except for those who believe and perform honorable deeds, remember God often, and protect themselves once they have been wronged. Those who do wrong shall know what sort of upsets they may expect to face
t.iwq: Except those poets who believe and do righteous deeds and remember Allah often and defend the Muslims after they were wronged. And those who have wronged are going to know to what kind of return they will be returned

t_id.kemenag: kecuali orang-orang (penyair-penyair) yang beriman dan beramal saleh dan banyak menyebut Allah dan mendapat kemenangan sesudah menderita kezaliman. Dan orang-orang yang zalim itu kelak akan mengetahui ke tempat mana mereka akan kembali.
t_id.sabiq: Akan tetapi, kalangan penyair yang mengikuti petunjuk-petunjuk ketuhanan dan berbuat kebajikan sehingga memiliki kepribadian yang luhur, dan selalu mengingat Allah dengan penuh rasa khusyuk hingga timbul rasa takutnya kepada Allah, adalah penyair-penyair yang menjadikan syairnya sebagai pelipur lara dan sebagai sarana untuk membela agama dan mempertahankan kebenaran pada saat kebenaran diinjak- injak. Orang-orang yang menzalimi diri sendiri dengan berbuat syirik dan mengejek Rasulullah saw. itu kelak akan tahu akibat buruk mana yang menjadi tempat kembali mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali orang-orang yang beriman dan beramal saleh) dari kalangan para penyair itu (dan banyak menyebut Allah) maksudnya syair tidaklah melupakan mereka untuk berzikir kepada Allah (dan mendapat kemenangan) melalui syairnya atas orang-orang kafir (sesudah menderita' kelaliman) artinya sesudah orang-orang kafir menghina mereka melalui syair-syairnya yang ditujukan kepada kaum Mukminin semuanya. Mereka tidak tercela dengan syair mereka itu, karena dalam firman yang lain Allah swt. telah berfirman, "Allah tidak menyukai ucapan buruk yang diucapkan dengan terus terang kecuali orang-orang yang dianiaya." (Q.S. An Nisa 148). Allah telah berfirman pula dalam ayat yang lain, yaitu, "Oleh karena itu barang siapa yang menyerang kalian, maka seranglah ia seimbang dengan serangannya terhadap kalian." (Q.S. 2 Al Baqarah, 194) ("Dan orang-orang yang zalim itu kelak akan mengetahui) yaitu mereka yang zalim dari kalangan para penyair dan lain-lainnya (ke tempat mana) yakni tempat kembali yang mana (mereka akan kembali") sesudah mereka mati nanti.
t_id.iwq: kecuali orang-orang (penyair-penyair) yang beriman dan beramal saleh dan banyak menyebut Allah dan mendapat kemenangan sesudah menderita kezaliman. Dan orang-orang yang zalim itu kelak akan mengetahui ke tempat mana mereka akan kembali.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إلا الذين آمنوا وعملوا الصالحات» من الشعراء. «وذكروا الله كثيرا» لم يشغلهم الشعر عن الذكر «وانتصروا» بهجوهم الكفار «من بعد ما ظلموا» بهجو الكفار لهم في جملة المؤمنين فليسو مذمومين قال الله تعالى: (لا يحب الله الجهر بالسوء من القول إلا من ظلم) وقال تعالى (فمن اعتدى عليكم فاعتدوا عليه بمثل ما اعتدي عليكم) «وسيعلم الذين ظلموا» من الشعراء وغيرهم «أي منقلب» مرجع «ينقلبون» يرجعون بعد الموت
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ وَذَكَرُواْ ٱللَّهَ كَثِيرٗا وَٱنتَصَرُواْ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا ظُلِمُواْۗ وَسَيَعۡلَمُ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓاْ أَيَّ مُنقَلَبٖ يَنقَلِبُونَ (مُنقَلَبٍ: مَرْجِعٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali orang-orang yang beriman dan beramal saleh) dari kalangan para penyair itu (dan banyak menyebut Allah) maksudnya syair tidaklah melupakan mereka untuk berzikir kepada Allah (dan mendapat kemenangan) melalui syairnya atas orang-orang kafir (sesudah menderita' kelaliman) artinya sesudah orang-orang kafir menghina mereka melalui syair-syairnya yang ditujukan kepada kaum Mukminin semuanya. Mereka tidak tercela dengan syair mereka itu, karena dalam firman yang lain Allah swt. telah berfirman, "Allah tidak menyukai ucapan buruk yang diucapkan dengan terus terang kecuali orang-orang yang dianiaya." (Q.S. An Nisa 148). Allah telah berfirman pula dalam ayat yang lain, yaitu, "Oleh karena itu barang siapa yang menyerang kalian, maka seranglah ia seimbang dengan serangannya terhadap kalian." (Q.S. 2 Al Baqarah, 194) ("Dan orang-orang yang zalim itu kelak akan mengetahui) yaitu mereka yang zalim dari kalangan para penyair dan lain-lainnya (ke tempat mana) yakni tempat kembali yang mana (mereka akan kembali") sesudah mereka mati nanti
